CD-Games\Jocuri\Fox Jones\readme.txt:
```

FOX JONES: THE TREASURES OF EL DORADO 
======================================================

1. Game Rules
2. Controls
3. System requirements


FOX JONES: THE TREASURES OF EL DORADO results from modern development of the Bomberman and Eric and Floaters games.

Fox Jones, the famous and fearless fortune hunter, started his quest for treasures again.

He finds himself in the ancient land El Dorado where he meets the demon Necroarch and a horde of fierce monsters. You need to help Fox Jones harvest the treasures of El Dorado and defeat Necroarch!


Game Rules.
===============================
The action takes place in the labyrinth. You must find a certain number of keys (from 1 to 4) to open the gate and pass to the next level. The keys are hidden in the labyrinth walls. Blow up the walls to find the keys, pick up treasures and various bonuses. 


Controls.
================================
The game has two modes differing by controls and playing abilities as well. 

CLASSIC 

This mode is similar to the original Bomberman. You control Fox with arrow keys. To lay bombs, press spacebar. You can lay bombs while running.

MODERN 

In this mode, Fox can throw grenades and lay super bombs. These weapons have great destructive power but cannot be used while running.

Fox is controlled with the mouse. 

Use the right mouse button to change moving direction.Left mouse button releases a bomb or launches a grenade.

To throw a grenade, choose the target with your mouse. Note that you cannot choose a target close to your hero. 

To lay a bomb, aim your mouse close to Fox. 


System requirements:
==============================
Windows 95/98/2000/ME/XP
DirectX 8.0 or better
Pentium 400 with 64Mb or better 
3D accelerator with 8Mb AGP  video memory or better
DirectX-compatible sound card

EvisGames:
EMail:  info@evis-games.com
---------------------------------

2003 (c) EvisGames


```

Desktop Old\asdasd.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;

public class BlueBirdEnemyController : Enemy
{
    [Header("Initial Settings")]
    public bool faceLeft = false; // Inspector field to set the initial facing direction
    public bool startFromEnd = false; // Inspector field to set if the bird starts from the end position

    [Header("Movement Settings")]
    public Vector3 startPositionOffset; // Start position offset for the bird
    public Vector3 endPositionOffset; // End position offset for the bird
    public float smoothTime = 1f; // Time to reach full speed or stop
    public float positionTolerance = 0.01f; // Tolerance for reaching the target position

    [Header("Floating Settings")]
    public float floatingAmplitude = 0.25f; // Amplitude of the floating effect
    public float floatingFrequency = 14f; // Frequency of the floating effect
    public float upwardForce = 5f; // The force applied upwards when propelling
    public float floatingStartLifetime = 0.0f; // Start time for the floating effect

    private Vector3 startPosition; // Actual start position
    private Vector3 endPosition; // Actual end position
    private bool isGoingToEnd = false;
    private bool reachedStart = false;
    private bool reachedEnd = false;
    private float baseY; // Base Y position for sinusoidal movement
    private float elapsedTime; // To maintain the phase of the sinusoidal movement

    protected override void InitializeEnemy()
    {
        // Set initial facing direction based on faceLeft
        facingRight = !faceLeft;
        if (!faceLeft)
        {
            Flip(); // Ensure the sprite is facing the correct direction if starting to move left
        }

        // Calculate actual start and end positions based on offsets
        startPosition = transform.position + startPositionOffset;
        endPosition = transform.position + endPositionOffset;
        baseY = transform.position.y;

        // Set initial state
        if (startFromEnd)
        {
            transform.position = endPosition;
            reachedEnd = true;
            reachedStart = false;
            isGoingToEnd = false;
        }
        else
        {
            transform.position = startPosition;
            reachedStart = true;
            reachedEnd = false;
            isGoingToEnd = true;
        }

        // Start the movement loop
        StartCoroutine(MovePlatform());
    }

    protected override void CheckForObstacles()
    {
        // No obstacle checking for the bird
    }

    private IEnumerator MovePlatform()
    {
        while (true)
        {
            if (reachedStart)
            {
                reachedStart = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(endPosition));
                reachedEnd = true;
                isGoingToEnd = false;
                Flip();
            }
            else if (reachedEnd)
            {
                reachedEnd = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(startPosition));
                reachedStart = true;
                isGoingToEnd = true;
                Flip();
            }
            yield return null;
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator MoveToPosition(Vector3 targetPosition)
    {
        Vector3 initialPosition = transform.position;
        float journeyLength = Mathf.Abs(targetPosition.x - initialPosition.x);
        float startTime = Time.time;

        while (Mathf.Abs(transform.position.x - targetPosition.x) > positionTolerance)
        {
            float distanceCovered = (Time.time - startTime) * moveSpeed;
            float fractionOfJourney = distanceCovered / journeyLength;
            float smoothStep = Mathf.SmoothStep(0, 1, fractionOfJourney);

            // Calculate the new x position using linear interpolation
            float newX = Mathf.Lerp(initialPosition.x, targetPosition.x, smoothStep);

            // Calculate the new y position using sinusoidal movement with offset
            float elapsedTime = (Time.time - startTime) + floatingStartLifetime;

            // Calculate the new y position using sinusoidal movement with offset
            float newY = baseY + Mathf.Sin(elapsedTime * floatingFrequency) * floatingAmplitude;

            // Set the new position
            transform.position = new Vector3(newX, newY, transform.position.z);

            yield return null;
        }

        // Ensure the final position is exactly the target position
        transform.position = new Vector3(targetPosition.x, transform.position.y, transform.position.z);
    }

    public void PropulseUpward()
    {
        // Apply upward force for floating effect
        rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, upwardForce);
    }

    private void OnDrawGizmos()
    {
        // Calculate actual start and end positions based on current position and offsets
        Vector3 gizmoStartPosition = Application.isPlaying ? startPosition : transform.position + startPositionOffset;
        Vector3 gizmoEndPosition = Application.isPlaying ? endPosition : transform.position + endPositionOffset;

        Gizmos.color = Color.green;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoStartPosition, 0.1f);

        Gizmos.color = Color.red;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoEndPosition, 0.1f);

        // Draw yellow line between start and end positions
        Gizmos.color = Color.yellow;
        Gizmos.DrawLine(gizmoStartPosition, gizmoEndPosition);
    }
}

```

RДғspuns:
a) [tex] z = 0, \; z = 1, \; z = -1 [/tex]  
b) [tex] z = 1, \; z = -1 [/tex]  
c) [tex] z = \tan\Bigl(\frac{\pi}{6n} + \frac{k\pi}{n}\Bigr), \quad k \in \mathbb{Z} [/tex]


ExplicaИӣie pas cu pas:
a) Rezolvarea ecuaИӣiei:  
[tex] \left( \frac{z + i}{z - i} \right)^3 + \left( \frac{z + i}{z - i} \right)^2 + \left( \frac{z + i}{z - i} \right) + 1 = 0 [/tex]  
Substituim [tex] t = \frac{z + i}{z - i} [/tex]. EcuaИӣia devine:  
[tex] t^3 + t^2 + t + 1 = 0 [/tex]  
Se factorizeazДғ astfel:  
[tex] (t + 1)(t^2 + 1) = 0 [/tex]  
Deci, [tex] t = -1, \; t = i, \; t = -i [/tex].


Ne Г®ntoarcem la [tex] z [/tex]:  
- Pentru [tex] t = -1 [/tex]: [tex] z = 0 [/tex].  
- Pentru [tex] t = i [/tex]: [tex] z = 1 [/tex].  
- Pentru [tex] t = -i [/tex]: [tex] z = -1 [/tex].


SoluИӣiile sunt: [tex] z = 0, \; z = 1, \; z = -1 [/tex].


b) Rezolvarea ecuaИӣiei:  
[tex] \left( \frac{1 - i z}{1 + i z} \right)^3 + \left( \frac{1 - i z}{1 + i z} \right)^2 + \left( \frac{1 - i z}{1 + i z} \right) + 1 = 0 [/tex]  
Substituim [tex] t = \frac{1 - i z}{1 + i z} [/tex]. EcuaИӣia devine:  
[tex] t^3 + t^2 + t + 1 = 0 [/tex]  
Se factorizeazДғ astfel:  
[tex] (t + 1)(t^2 + 1) = 0 [/tex]  
Deci, [tex] t = -1, \; t = i, \; t = -i [/tex].


ГҺntoarcem la [tex] z [/tex]:  
- Pentru [tex] t = -1 [/tex]: nu existДғ soluИӣie.  
- Pentru [tex] t = i [/tex]: [tex] z = 1 [/tex].  
- Pentru [tex] t = -i [/tex]: [tex] z = -1 [/tex].


SoluИӣiile sunt: [tex] z = 1, \; z = -1 [/tex].


c) Rezolvarea ecuaИӣiei:  
[tex] (1 + i z)^{2n} + (1 - i z)^{2n} = (1 + z^2)^n [/tex]  
Scriem Г®n formДғ trigonometricДғ Иҷi folosim formula lui De Moivre. ObИӣinem:  
[tex] 2(1 + z^2)^n \cos(2n \theta) = (1 + z^2)^n [/tex].  
ГҺmpДғrИӣim la [tex] (1 + z^2)^n [/tex], rezultГўnd:  
[tex] 2 \cos(2n \theta) = 1 [/tex], deci [tex] \cos(2n \theta) = \frac{1}{2} [/tex].


SoluИӣiile pentru [tex] \cos x = \frac{1}{2} [/tex] sunt:  
[tex] x = \pm \frac{\pi}{3} + 2\pi k, \; k \in \mathbb{Z} [/tex].  
RezolvГўnd pentru [tex] \theta [/tex], obИӣinem:  
[tex] \theta = \pm \frac{\pi}{6n} + \frac{\pi k}{n}, \; k \in \mathbb{Z} [/tex].  
Cum [tex] \theta = \arctan(z) [/tex], rezultДғ:  
[tex] z = \tan\Bigl(\frac{\pi}{6n} + \frac{k\pi}{n}\Bigr), \; k \in \mathbb{Z} [/tex].


SoluИӣiile pentru c) sunt: [tex] z = \tan\Bigl(\frac{\pi}{6n} + \frac{k\pi}{n}\Bigr), \; k \in \mathbb{Z} [/tex].

Desktop Old\Ca sa gasesti bine solutia, imagine.txt:
```
Ca sa gasesti bine solutia, imagineazДғ-Иӣi cДғ este Иҷarpele din snake xenzia, Иҷi peste tot sunt numai mere (inafara de S, F si X) (le compari cu "O") si trebuie sa le ia pe toate fДғrДғ sДғ se atingДғ, iar ultimul mДғr care trebuie luat este F.

Vreau ca algoritmul sДғ adauge Иҷi obstacole "X", fiindca vad ca acestea nu se genereaza in final.
Si vreau sa te verifici cu code interpretor-ul daca ai generat bine si chiar se gaseste o solutie.
Vreau sa imi arДғИӣi soluИӣia prin miИҷcДғrile numerotate cu "1", "2", "3", "4", etc.
de exemplu, pentru jocul:
"
        ['F', 'O'],
        ['O', 'O', 'O', 'O'],
        ['O', 'O', 'O', 'O'],
        ['S', 'O', 'O', 'O']
"
O solutie ar fi:
"
        ['14', '13'],
        ['11', '12', '7', '6'],
        ['10', 9 '8', '5'],
        ['1', '2', '3', '4']
"
Intelegi ce vreau sa zic?

Desktop Old\ch - Copy.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

public class GridManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public GameObject cellPrefab; // Assign in editor 
    public GameObject paintPrefab; // Assign in editor 
    public float cellSpacing = 0.2f; // Adjust this value to increase or decrease the space between cells 
    [SerializeField]
    private float padding = 4f;
    [SerializeField]
    private float painterOffset = 1f;


    // Add a 2D array to hold references to all cell GameObjects 
    private GameObject[,] cellObjects;
    //private GameObject currentlyClickedCell = null;
    private Bounds gridBounds;
    public bool hintsActive = false; // Tracks whether hints are currently shown 
    //private bool levelFinished; 
    //private bool mousePressing = false;
    Vector3 mouseWorldPos;
    public BoxCollider2D gridCollider; // Reference to the BoxCollider2D component

    public GameObject squaresParent; // Empty GameObject "Squares"

    public Vector2 gridColliderOffset;
    public Vector2 gridColliderSize;

    [Header("Painter Colors")]
    public GridColors gridColors;

    [Header("Painter Settings")]
    public List<PainterSettings> paintersFromBottom;
    public List<PainterSettings> paintersFromRight;

    [Dropdown("gridColors")]
    public string initiallyGridColor;

    [Header("Pattern Reference")]
    public Pattern pattern; // Reference to the Pattern object

    [Range(-100f, 100f)]
    public float yOffsetPercentage = 0f; // Percentage-based offset

    private List<List<string>> gridColorPattern; // Color pattern for the grid

    private void Start()
    {
        if (gridCollider == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("BoxCollider2D component not found on Squares GameObject.");
            return;
        }

        // Calculate the yOffset based on the screen height and percentage
        float screenHeight = Screen.height;
        float yOffset = screenHeight * (yOffsetPercentage / 100f) / Screen.dpi;

        transform.position = new Vector3(transform.position.x, transform.position.y + yOffset, transform.position.z);
        LoadLevel();

        // Start the coroutine to log the pattern matrix every 5 seconds
        //StartCoroutine(LogPatternMatrixEveryFiveSeconds());

    }

    private void Update()
    {
        // Check if the Escape key is pressed 
        if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape))
        {
            // Load the Main Menu scene 
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
        }
    }

    private void LoadLevel()
    {
        // After the grid is fully set up, adjust its scale to fit the window 
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;
        // Initialize or clear the cellObjects array 
        cellObjects = new GameObject[rows, cols];
        gridColorPattern = new List<List<string>>(rows);
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            gridColorPattern.Add(new List<string>(new string[cols]));
        }
        // Adjust the total size calculation to account for spacing 
        float gridWidth = (cols * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing; // Subtract cellSpacing once to avoid extra space at the end 
        float gridHeight = (rows * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        // Calculate the offset needed to center the grid 
        Vector2 gridOffset = new Vector2(-gridWidth / 2 + 0.5f, gridHeight / 2 - 0.5f);
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                Vector2 position = new Vector2(j * (1 + cellSpacing), -i * (1 + cellSpacing)) + gridOffset;
                GameObject cell = Instantiate(cellPrefab, position, Quaternion.identity, squaresParent.transform);
                cellObjects[i, j] = cell; // Store the cell reference 
                // Assign a tag to your cellPrefab in the Unity Editor and use it here 
                cell.tag = "Cell";
                cell.layer = LayerMask.NameToLayer("Cell");

                // Set default color from GridColors
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent != null && gridColors.colors.Count > 0)
                {
                    cellComponent.SetGridColors(gridColors);
                    cellComponent.SetColorName(initiallyGridColor); // Use the selected initial color
                    gridColorPattern[i][j] = initiallyGridColor; // Initialize with the selected color
                }
            }
        }

        // Ensure the lists have the correct number of elements
        while (paintersFromBottom.Count < cols)
        {
            paintersFromBottom.Add(new PainterSettings());
        }

        while (paintersFromRight.Count < rows)
        {
            paintersFromRight.Add(new PainterSettings());
        }

        // Instantiate paintPrefabs at the bottom of the grid 
        for (int i = 0; i < cols; i++)
        {
            Vector2 position = new Vector2(i * (1 + cellSpacing), -rows * (1 + cellSpacing) - painterOffset) + gridOffset;
            GameObject paint = Instantiate(paintersFromBottom[i].Prefab, position, Quaternion.identity, transform);
            // Assign the color to the paintPrefab 
            //paint.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>().color = painterFromBottomColor;
            paint.transform.localScale /= 1f;
            paint.tag = "PainterFromBottom";

            // Set the GridManager reference in the painter
            Painter painterComponent = paint.GetComponent<Painter>();
            if (painterComponent != null)
            {
                painterComponent.gridManager = this;
                painterComponent.painterColorName = paintersFromBottom[i].ColorName;
                painterComponent.paintDirection = "up";
                painterComponent.painterRotationOffset = 0f;
            }
        }

        // Instantiate paintPrefabs on the right side of the grid 
        for (int j = 0; j < rows; j++)
        {
            Vector2 position = new Vector2(cols * (1 + cellSpacing) + painterOffset, -j * (1 + cellSpacing)) + gridOffset;
            GameObject paint = Instantiate(paintersFromRight[j].Prefab, position, Quaternion.identity, transform);
            // Assign the color to the paintPrefab 
            //paint.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>().color = painterFromRightColor;
            paint.transform.localScale /= 1f;
            paint.tag = "PainterFromRight";

            // Set the GridManager reference in the painter
            Painter painterComponent = paint.GetComponent<Painter>();
            if (painterComponent != null)
            {
                painterComponent.gridManager = this;
                painterComponent.painterColorName = paintersFromRight[j].ColorName;
                painterComponent.paintDirection = "left";
                painterComponent.painterRotationOffset = 90f;
            }
        }

        AdjustGridToFitScreen();
        UpdateGridBounds();

        /*
        if (!Input.GetMouseButton(0))
        {
            mousePressing = false;
        }*/

        //DebugLogGridPatternMatrix();
    }

    private Color GetColorByName(string colorName)
    {
        foreach (var colorDef in gridColors.colors)
        {
            if (colorDef.name == colorName)
            {
                return colorDef.color;
            }
        }
        return Color.white; // Default color if not found
    }

    public string GetColorNameByColor(Color color)
    {
        foreach (var colorDef in gridColors.colors)
        {
            if (colorDef.color == color)
            {
                return colorDef.name;
            }
        }
        return "Unknown"; // Default name if not found
    }

    private void AdjustGridToFitScreen()
    {
        Camera mainCamera = Camera.main;
        float screenHeight = 2f * mainCamera.orthographicSize;
        float screenWidth = screenHeight * mainCamera.aspect;
        // Define padding as a percentage of the screen size 
        float paddingPercentage = padding / 100; // 4% padding 
        float paddedScreenHeight = screenHeight * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce height by padding on top and bottom 
        float paddedScreenWidth = screenWidth * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce width by padding on left and right 
        float gridPhysicalWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridPhysicalHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        // Calculate scale factors based on the padded screen size 
        float scaleX = paddedScreenWidth / gridPhysicalWidth;
        float scaleY = paddedScreenHeight / gridPhysicalHeight;
        float scale = Mathf.Min(scaleX, scaleY);
        // Adjust the scale of the grid 
        transform.localScale = new Vector3(scale, scale, 1);
        // Optionally adjust the position if needed 
        // Since you're scaling the grid down, you might not need to adjust its position. 
    }

    private void UpdateGridBoundsOld()
    {
        float gridWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        gridWidth *= transform.localScale.x;
        gridHeight *= transform.localScale.y;
        Vector3 gridCenter = transform.position;
        float expansionAmount = 2 * cellSpacing * Mathf.Max(transform.localScale.x, transform.localScale.y);
        gridWidth += expansionAmount;
        gridHeight += expansionAmount;
        Vector3 size = new Vector3(gridWidth, gridHeight, 0);
        gridBounds = new Bounds(gridCenter, size);
    }

    private void UpdateGridBounds()
    {
        Bounds bounds = new Bounds(squaresParent.transform.position, Vector3.zero);
        foreach (Transform child in squaresParent.transform)
        {
            bounds.Encapsulate(child.GetComponent<Renderer>().bounds);
        }
        gridBounds = bounds;

        // Update the BoxCollider2D to match the bounds
        gridCollider.offset = gridColliderOffset;
        gridCollider.size = gridColliderSize;
    }

    public Bounds GetGridBounds()
    {
        return gridBounds;
    }



    public void UpdateColorPatternMatrix()
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                Cell cellComponent = cellObjects[i, j].GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent != null)
                {
                    gridColorPattern[i][j] = cellComponent.ColorName;
                }
            }
        }

        //CheckLevelCompletion();
    }

    public bool IsCellOnEdge(int row, int col)
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;

        return row == 0 || row == rows - 1 || col == 0 || col == cols - 1;
    }

    public (int, int)? GetCellIndex(Cell cell)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                if (cellObjects[i, j] != null && cellObjects[i, j].GetComponent<Cell>() == cell)
                {
                    return (i, j);
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }


    public void CheckLevelCompletion()
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                if (gridColorPattern[i][j] != pattern.colorPattern[i][j])
                {
                    return; // If any cell doesn't match, the level is not complete
                }
            }
        }
        GameManager.Instance.MarkLevelAsUnlocked();
        GameManager.Instance.MarkLevelAsFinished();
        LevelButtonsManager.Instance.InitializeButtons();
        UIManager.Instance.ShowLevelCompletedPanel();
        UIManager.Instance.UpdateButtonVisibility(); // Update button visibility when moving to the next level
    }

    private void DebugLogGridPatternMatrix()
    {
        string matrixString = "Grid Pattern Matrix:\n";
        for (int i = 0; i < gridColorPattern.Count; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < gridColorPattern[i].Count; j++)
            {
                matrixString += gridColorPattern[i][j] + " ";
            }
            matrixString += "\n";
        }
        Debug.Log(matrixString);
    }


    [System.Serializable]
    public class PainterSettings
    {
        [Dropdown("gridColors")]
        public string ColorName;
        public GameObject Prefab;
    }
    
    private IEnumerator LogPatternMatrixEveryFiveSeconds()
    {
        while (true)
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(3);
            UpdateColorPatternMatrix(); // Ensure the grid matrix is updated
            DebugLogGridPatternMatrix();
        }
    }
}

```

using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

public class GridManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public GameObject cellPrefab; // Assign in editor 
    public GameObject paintPrefab; // Assign in editor 
    public float cellSpacing = 0.2f; // Adjust this value to increase or decrease the space between cells 
    [SerializeField]
    private float padding = 4f;
    [SerializeField]
    private float painterOffset = 1f;

    // Add a 2D array to hold references to all cell GameObjects 
    private GameObject[,] cellObjects;
    private Bounds gridBounds;
    public bool hintsActive = false; // Tracks whether hints are currently shown 
    Vector3 mouseWorldPos;
    public BoxCollider2D gridCollider; // Reference to the BoxCollider2D component

    public GameObject squaresParent; // Empty GameObject "Squares"

    public Vector2 gridColliderOffset;
    public Vector2 gridColliderSize;

    public List<PainterSettings> paintersFromRight;

    public string initiallyGridColor;

                painterComponent.painterColorName = paintersFromBottom[i].ColorName;
                painterComponent.paintDirection = "up";
                painterComponent.painterRotationOffset = 0f;
            }
        }

        // Instantiate paintPrefabs on the right side of the grid 
        for (int j = 0; j < rows; j++)
        {
            Vector2 position = new Vector2(cols * (1 + cellSpacing) + painterOffset, -j * (1 + cellSpacing)) + gridOffset;
            GameObject paint = Instantiate(paintersFromRight[j].Prefab, position, Quaternion.identity, transform);

            Painter painterComponent = paint.GetComponent<Painter>();

                painterComponent.painterColorName = paintersFromRight[j].ColorName;
                painterComponent.paintDirection = "left";
                painterComponent.painterRotationOffset = 90f;

        UpdateGridBounds();
    }

    private void AdjustGridToFitScreen()
    {
        Camera mainCamera = Camera.main;
        float screenHeight = 2f * mainCamera.orthographicSize;
        float screenWidth = screenHeight * mainCamera.aspect;
        // Define padding as a percentage of the screen size 
        float paddingPercentage = padding / 100; // 4% padding

        float paddedScreenWidth = screenWidth * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce width by padding on left and right 
        float gridPhysicalWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridPhysicalHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        // Calculate scale factors based on the padded screen size 
        float scaleX = paddedScreenWidth / gridPhysicalWidth;
        float scaleY = paddedScreenHeight / gridPhysicalHeight;
        float scale = Mathf.Min(scaleX, scaleY);
        // Adjust the scale of the grid 
        transform.localScale = new Vector3(scale, scale, 1);
    }

    private void UpdateGridBounds()
    {
        Bounds bounds = new Bounds(squaresParent.transform.position, Vector3.zero);
        foreach (Transform child in squaresParent.transform)
        {
            bounds.Encapsulate(child.GetComponent<Renderer>().bounds);
        }
        gridBounds = bounds;

        // Update the BoxCollider2D to match the bounds
        gridCollider.offset = gridColliderOffset;
        gridCollider.size = gridColliderSize;
    }

    public Bounds GetGridBounds()
    {
        return gridBounds;
    }

    public void UpdateColorPatternMatrix()
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                Cell cellComponent = cellObjects[i, j].GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent != null)
                {
                    gridColorPattern[i][j] = cellComponent.ColorName;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public bool IsCellOnEdge(int row, int col)
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;

        return row == 0 || row == rows - 1 || col == 0 || col == cols - 1;
    }

    public (int, int)? GetCellIndex(Cell cell)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                if (cellObjects[i, j] != null && cellObjects[i, j].GetComponent<Cell>() == cell)
                {
                    return (i, j);
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    public void CheckLevelCompletion()
    {
        int rows = pattern.rows;
        int cols = pattern.cols;
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                if (gridColorPattern[i][j] != pattern.colorPattern[i][j])
                {
                    return; // If any cell doesn't match, the level is not complete
                }
            }
        }
        GameManager.Instance.MarkLevelAsUnlocked();
        GameManager.Instance.MarkLevelAsFinished();
        LevelButtonsManager.Instance.InitializeButtons();
        UIManager.Instance.ShowLevelCompletedPanel();
        UIManager.Instance.UpdateButtonVisibility(); // Update button visibility when moving to the next level
    }

    private void DebugLogGridPatternMatrix()
    {
        string matrixString = "Grid Pattern Matrix:\n";
        for (int i = 0; i < gridColorPattern.Count; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < gridColorPattern[i].Count; j++)
            {
                matrixString += gridColorPattern[i][j] + " ";
            }
            matrixString += "\n";
        }
        Debug.Log(matrixString);
    }

    public class PainterSettings
    {
        [Dropdown("gridColors")]
        public string ColorName;
        public GameObject Prefab;
    }

Desktop Old\ColScale.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Tilemaps;
public class IndividualTileColliders : MonoBehaviour
{
    public Tilemap tilemap;
    public GameObject tileColliderPrefab;
    public TileBase[] tiles; 
    private Dictionary<Vector3Int, GameObject> tileColliders = new Dictionary<Vector3Int, GameObject>();
    [SerializeField]
    private Vector3 offset;
    public bool withLevels;
    public PowerManager powerManager;

    void Start()
    {
        AddCollidersToSpecificTiles();
        //transform.position = tilemap.transform.position;
        //CalculateAndApplyOffset();
    }

    void AddCollidersToSpecificTiles()
    {
     

        foreach (var position in tilemap.cellBounds.allPositionsWithin)
        {
            Vector3Int localPlace = position;
            TileBase tile = tilemap.GetTile(localPlace);

            if (tile != null && ArrayContainsTile(tile))
            {
                Vector3 centerOffset = new Vector3(tilemap.cellSize.x * 0.5f, tilemap.cellSize.y * 0.5f, 0);
                Vector3 worldPosition = tilemap.CellToWorld(localPlace) + centerOffset;

                GameObject colliderObject = Instantiate(tileColliderPrefab, worldPosition, Quaternion.identity, transform);
                tileColliders.Add(localPlace, colliderObject);
                GameManager.TilesCount++;
            }
        }
    }
    void CalculateAndApplyOffset()
    {
        // Calculate the center offset based on the cell size of the tilemap
        Vector3 centerOffset = new Vector3(tilemap.cellSize.x * 0.5f, tilemap.cellSize.y * 0.5f, 0);

        // Apply the center offset to the transform.position
        transform.position += centerOffset;
    }

    public Vector3Int? FindLocalPlaceOfCollider(GameObject collider)
    {
        foreach (var pair in tileColliders)
        {
            if (pair.Value == collider)
            {
                return pair.Key;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    public void RemoveTileAndCollider(GameObject collider)
    {
        Vector3Int? localPlace = FindLocalPlaceOfCollider(collider);
        if (localPlace.HasValue)
        {
            TileBase tileToRemove = tilemap.GetTile(localPlace.Value);
            int tileIndex = Array.IndexOf(tiles, tileToRemove);

            if (withLevels)
            {
                if (tiles.Length > 0)
                {
                    int newIndex = (tileIndex + 1) % tiles.Length;
                    if (tileIndex < 2)
                    {
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, tiles[newIndex]);
                    }
                    else if (tileIndex == 2)
                    {

                        Vector3 spawnPosition = CalculateSpawnPosition(localPlace.Value);
                        powerManager.SpawnPowerUp(spawnPosition);
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                        RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);

                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    if (tileIndex < 0)
                    {
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                        RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);
                    }
                }
            }
            else
            {
                if (tileToRemove != null && tileIndex != tiles.Length - 1)
                {

                   
                    Vector3 spawnPosition = CalculateSpawnPosition(localPlace.Value);
                    powerManager.SpawnPowerUp(spawnPosition);
                    tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                    RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);
                }
                else
                {
                
                }
            }


        }
    }

    public Vector3 CalculateSpawnPosition(Vector3Int cellPosition)
    {
        Vector3 cellWorldPosition = tilemap.CellToWorld(cellPosition);

        // Adjust for the tilemap's scale
        float tileWidth = tilemap.cellSize.x * tilemap.transform.localScale.x;
        float tileHeight = tilemap.cellSize.y * tilemap.transform.localScale.y;

        Vector3 spawnPosition = new Vector3(
            cellWorldPosition.x + tileWidth / 2,
            cellWorldPosition.y + tileHeight / 2,
            cellWorldPosition.z
        );

        return spawnPosition;
    }

    public void RemoveCollider(Vector3Int tilePosition)
    {
        if (tileColliders.TryGetValue(tilePosition, out GameObject colliderObject))
        {
            Destroy(colliderObject);
            tileColliders.Remove(tilePosition);
            GameManager.TilesCount--;
            //Debug.Log(GameManager.TilesCount);
            CheckForWin();
        }
    }

    private void CheckForWin()
    {
        if (GameManager.TilesCount == 0)
        {
            // Call ShowWinMessage() from MainMenu
            FindObjectOfType<MainMenu>().ShowWinMessage();
        }
    }

    bool ArrayContainsTile(TileBase tileToCheck)
    {
        foreach (TileBase tile in tiles)
        {
            if (tile == tileToCheck)
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}
```

Desktop Old\DatabaseHelperr.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Data.SqlClient;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using System.Linq;
using System.Data;

namespace WindowsFormsApp1
{
    public static class DatabaseHelper
    {
        private static string connectionString = @"";

        public static void CreateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Create table for authors
                    string createAuthorsTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Autori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Autori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for books
                    string createBooksTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Carti]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Carti] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            titlu NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            id_autor INT NOT NULL,
                            gen NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_autor) REFERENCES Autori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for users
                    string createUsersTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Utilizatori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Utilizatori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            email NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for loans
                    string createLoansTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Imprumuturi]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            id_carte INT NOT NULL,
                            id_utilizator INT NOT NULL,
                            data_imprumut DATETIME NOT NULL,
                            data_returnare DATETIME,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_carte) REFERENCES Carti(id),
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_utilizator) REFERENCES Utilizatori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createAuthorsTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createBooksTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createUsersTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createLoansTableQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Database has been initialized successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while initializing the database: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void PopulateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Insert sample authors
                    string populateAuthorsQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Autori] (nume, prenume) VALUES 
                    ('Ion', 'Creanga'),
                    ('Mihai', 'Eminescu'),
                    ('Marin', 'Preda')";

                    // Insert sample books
                    string populateBooksQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Carti] (titlu, id_autor, gen) VALUES 
                    ('Amintiri din copilarie', 1, 'Literatura Romana'),
                    ('Luceafarul', 2, 'Poezie'),
                    ('Morometii', 3, 'Roman')";

                    // Insert sample users
                    string populateUsersQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Utilizatori] (nume, prenume, email) VALUES 
                    ('Andrei', 'Popescu', 'andrei.popescu@example.com'),
                    ('Ioana', 'Ionescu', 'ioana.ionescu@example.com'),
                    ('Marius', 'Georgescu', 'marius.georgescu@example.com')";

                    // Insert sample loans
                    string populateLoansQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (id_carte, id_utilizator, data_imprumut, data_returnare) VALUES 
                    (1, 1, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (2, 2, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (3, 3, '2023-02-04', '2023-03-04')";

                    // Execute the population queries
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateAuthorsQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been populated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while populating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void UpdateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Update the Users table
                    string updateUsersQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Utilizatori] SET email = 'new.email@example.com'
                        WHERE nume = 'Marius' AND prenume = 'Georgescu';";

                    // Update the Books table
                    string updateBooksQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Carti] SET gen = 'Literatura Contemporana'
                        WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie';";

                    // Update the Loans table
                    string updateLoansQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] SET data_returnare = DATEADD(day, 14, data_imprumut)
                        WHERE id_carte = (SELECT id FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie')
                        AND data_returnare IS NULL;";

                    // Execute the queries to update the tables
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been updated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while updating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
        public static void QueryTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Query 1: Selects all books by an author with a given ID.
                    int authorId = 1;
                    Console.WriteLine("Query 1: Selecting all books by an author with ID = " + authorId);
                    string query1 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE id_autor = {authorId};";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query1);

                    // Query 2: Retrieves authors and the number of books written by each.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 2: Retrieving authors and the number of books written by each.");
                    string query2 = @"
                    SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumberOfBooks
                    FROM [dbo].[Autori]
                    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor
                    GROUP BY Autori.nume, Autori.prenume;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query2);

                    // Query 3: Selects all books of a specific genre.
                    string genre = "Poezie";
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 3: Selecting all books of genre '" + genre + "'.");
                    string query3 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE gen = '{genre}';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query3);

                    // Query 4: Retrieves authors with surnames starting with 'P'.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 4: Retrieving authors with surnames starting with 'P'.");
                    string query4 = "SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Autori] WHERE prenume LIKE 'P%';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query4);

                    // Query 5: Fetches details about loans and associated book information.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 5: Fetching details about loans and associated book information.");
                    string query5 = @"
                    SELECT Imprumuturi.*, Carti.titlu, Carti.gen
                    FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query5);

                    // Query 6: Retrieves users and the books they have borrowed.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 6: Retrieving users and the books they have borrowed.");
                    string query6 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query6);

                    // Query 7: Finds users who have not returned borrowed books.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 7: Finding users who have not returned borrowed books.");
                    string query7 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id
                    WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query7);

                    Console.WriteLine("\nQueries executed successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while querying the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void WipeAndDeleteAllTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Delete data from all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> wipeTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in wipeTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    // Drop all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> dropTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in dropTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine("All tables have been wiped and deleted successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while wiping and deleting the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
                {
                    // Print column names
                    for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                    {
                        Console.Write(reader.GetName(i) + "\t");
                    }
                    Console.WriteLine();

                    // Print rows
                    while (reader.Read())
                    {
                        for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                        {
                            Console.Write(reader.GetValue(i) + "\t");
                        }
                        Console.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteNonQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                command.ExecuteNonQuery();
            }
        }

        public static DataTable ExecuteQueryAndReturnDataTable(string query)
        {
            using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
            {
                SqlDataAdapter adapter = new SqlDataAdapter(query, connection);
                DataTable table = new DataTable();
                adapter.Fill(table);
                return table;
            }
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Data.SqlClient;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using System.Linq;

namespace WindowsFormsApp2
{
    public static class DatabaseHelper
    {
        private static string connectionString = @"Data Source=(LocalDB)\MSSQLLocalDB;AttachDbFilename=C:\Users\dan_a\source\repos\WindowsFormsApp2\WindowsFormsApp2\Database2.mdf;Integrated Security=True";

        public static void InitializeDatabase()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Create table for authors
                    string createAuthorsTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Autori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Autori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for books
                    string createBooksTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Carti]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN

                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,

                        );

                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    {

                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Autori];"

        private static void ExecuteQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
                {
                    // Print column names
                    for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                    {
                        Console.Write(reader.GetName(i) + "\t");
                    }
                    Console.WriteLine();

                    // Print rows

                    {
                        for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                        {
                            Console.Write(reader.GetValue(i) + "\t");
                        }
                        Console.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        {

            {
                command.ExecuteNonQuery();
            }
        }

 Test 5, Section 1. You will hear a woman who has just moved into the area talking to a neighbour about problems she is having in her house. First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 2. You will see that there is an example which has been done for you. On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first. Oh, hi Ruth. How are you? I'm fine. I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm sorry, I'm sorry. Oh, hi Ruth. How are you? I'm sorry to bother you Alastair, but I've been having some problems. Oh, come on in. What's happened? Basically, I had a leak from one of the pipes in the bathroom and water started coming through downstairs and the kitchen ceilings badly stained. I've got the leak fixed temporarily, but I wasn't happy with the plumber and I wanted to ask your advice. Of course. Well, the first thing I'd say is make sure you choose a local company. That way if things go wrong, you're close by and it just makes things easier. Alastair says that Ruth should choose a local company, so local has been written in the space. Now we shall begin. You should answer the questions as you listen, because you will not hear the recording a second time. Listen carefully and answer questions one to two. Oh, hi Ruth. How are you? I'm sorry to bother you Alastair, but I've been having some problems. Oh, come on in. What's happened? Basically, I had a leak from one of the pipes in the bathroom and water started coming through downstairs and the kitchen ceilings badly stained. I've got the leak fixed temporarily, but I wasn't happy with the plumber and I wanted to ask your advice. Of course. Well, the first thing I'd say is make sure you choose a local company. That way if things go wrong, you're close by and it just makes things easier. Let me write this down. Right. Yes, the plumber who fixed things yesterday was from quite far away, but I chose him because his advert said he did emergency repairs. Well, fair enough. You needed something in a hurry. But another piece of advice I'd give is try to avoid calling anybody on weekends. That'll really bump up the prices. Leave it till Monday if you can. Well, yes, I think I can do that because the temporary fix should hold and obviously I'll need the ceiling plastered and eventually redecorated. Yeah, sure. So who would you recommend? You will hear a wildlife expert giving us a talk to a group of bird lovers in the UK about a species called the tawny owl. Before you listen, you have some time to look at questions 31 to 40. Now listen and answer questions 31 to 40. Good evening, everyone. You're all likely to be familiar with pictures of the tawny owl. Because of all the owl species in the UK, it's actually the most common one. But the chances are that you're more likely to have heard one than actually seen one, as it's also strongly nocturnal. This means that it normally ventures out at night. So, what kind of habitat does the tawny owl prefer? Well, a survey carried out in the 1980s confirmed that this owl is most likely to be found in woodland. If you look at a map of tawny owl distribution across Britain, you'll only see gaps in the treeless marshy areas of eastern England, and in some of the more upland parts of north-west Scotland. However, you can sometimes find populations of tawny owls in urban areas too, either in parks or in large gardens. The tawny owl shows some obvious adaptations to its natural habitat. For example, both its wings and its tail are short, which helps it to manoeuvre through the trees. Also, the bird's plumage is a mixture of brown and grey, and this provides suitable camouflage for when the owl perches up against a tree trunk. Then there are its large eyes. The tawny owl's visual capacities are considerably better than those of humans, and although it can't see in complete darkness, it's sufficiently well-equipped to be able to navigate its way around woodland on all but the most overcast nights. Another factor that contributes to the tawny owl's success as a hunter is its excellent memory of the layout of different areas. If you combine this ability with the owl's strongly territorial and sedentary nature, most populations of tawny owl are sit-and-wait predators, you realise that it has a good opportunity to predict where prey might be found. Finally, as well as having large eyes, the owl's sense of hearing is excellent, and this helps it to locate potential prey as it sits on its perch. Turning now to the tawny owl's diet. Woodland tawny owls feed mainly on mammals, especially small ones such as wood mice and bank voles, but they'll also take things like frogs or bats or even fish if they happen to be available. In urbanised landscapes, the owls seem to prey more on birds, so there are some differences there. Let's just look briefly now at survival rates in the tawny owl. Young tawny owls face a difficult time once they leave home, and two out of every three are likely to die within their first year. So with such high mortality levels, it's a good job that established breeding pairs can produce young over a number of seasons, and maximise their chances of passing their genes on to the next generation of owls. I've already mentioned the sedentary nature of the tawny owl, but it's not just adult tawny owls that are sedentary in their habits. Young birds, dispersing away from where they were born, rarely move far. The average distance is just four kilometres. There also appears to be some reluctance to cross large bodies of water. The owl is absent from many of the islands around our shores, with only occasional sightings in Ireland and the Isle of Wight off the south coast of England. Right, well now I'll show you some photographs that have been taken in one or two of the... That is the end of section four. You now have half a minute to check your answers. That is the end of the listening test. You now have ten minutes to transfer your answers to the separate answer sheet.
