Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\Ca sa gasesti bine solutia, imagine.txt:
```
Ca sa gasesti bine solutia, imagineazДғ-Иӣi cДғ este Иҷarpele din snake xenzia, Иҷi peste tot sunt numai mere (inafara de S, F si X) (le compari cu "O") si trebuie sa le ia pe toate fДғrДғ sДғ se atingДғ, iar ultimul mДғr care trebuie luat este F.

Vreau ca algoritmul sДғ adauge Иҷi obstacole "X", fiindca vad ca acestea nu se genereaza in final.
Si vreau sa te verifici cu code interpretor-ul daca ai generat bine si chiar se gaseste o solutie.
Vreau sa imi arДғИӣi soluИӣia prin miИҷcДғrile numerotate cu "1", "2", "3", "4", etc.
de exemplu, pentru jocul:
"
        ['F', 'O'],
        ['O', 'O', 'O', 'O'],
        ['O', 'O', 'O', 'O'],
        ['S', 'O', 'O', 'O']
"
O solutie ar fi:
"
        ['14', '13'],
        ['11', '12', '7', '6'],
        ['10', 9 '8', '5'],
        ['1', '2', '3', '4']
"
Intelegi ce vreau sa zic?
```

Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\ColScale.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Tilemaps;
public class IndividualTileColliders : MonoBehaviour
{
    public Tilemap tilemap;
    public GameObject tileColliderPrefab;
    public TileBase[] tiles; 
    private Dictionary<Vector3Int, GameObject> tileColliders = new Dictionary<Vector3Int, GameObject>();
    [SerializeField]
    private Vector3 offset;
    public bool withLevels;
    public PowerManager powerManager;

    void Start()
    {
        AddCollidersToSpecificTiles();
        //transform.position = tilemap.transform.position;
        //CalculateAndApplyOffset();
    }

    void AddCollidersToSpecificTiles()
    {
     

        foreach (var position in tilemap.cellBounds.allPositionsWithin)
        {
            Vector3Int localPlace = position;
            TileBase tile = tilemap.GetTile(localPlace);

            if (tile != null && ArrayContainsTile(tile))
            {
                Vector3 centerOffset = new Vector3(tilemap.cellSize.x * 0.5f, tilemap.cellSize.y * 0.5f, 0);
                Vector3 worldPosition = tilemap.CellToWorld(localPlace) + centerOffset;

                GameObject colliderObject = Instantiate(tileColliderPrefab, worldPosition, Quaternion.identity, transform);
                tileColliders.Add(localPlace, colliderObject);
                GameManager.TilesCount++;
            }
        }
    }
    void CalculateAndApplyOffset()
    {
        // Calculate the center offset based on the cell size of the tilemap
        Vector3 centerOffset = new Vector3(tilemap.cellSize.x * 0.5f, tilemap.cellSize.y * 0.5f, 0);

        // Apply the center offset to the transform.position
        transform.position += centerOffset;
    }

    public Vector3Int? FindLocalPlaceOfCollider(GameObject collider)
    {
        foreach (var pair in tileColliders)
        {
            if (pair.Value == collider)
            {
                return pair.Key;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    public void RemoveTileAndCollider(GameObject collider)
    {
        Vector3Int? localPlace = FindLocalPlaceOfCollider(collider);
        if (localPlace.HasValue)
        {
            TileBase tileToRemove = tilemap.GetTile(localPlace.Value);
            int tileIndex = Array.IndexOf(tiles, tileToRemove);

            if (withLevels)
            {
                if (tiles.Length > 0)
                {
                    int newIndex = (tileIndex + 1) % tiles.Length;
                    if (tileIndex < 2)
                    {
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, tiles[newIndex]);
                    }
                    else if (tileIndex == 2)
                    {

                        Vector3 spawnPosition = CalculateSpawnPosition(localPlace.Value);
                        powerManager.SpawnPowerUp(spawnPosition);
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                        RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);

                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    if (tileIndex < 0)
                    {
                        tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                        RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);
                    }
                }
            }
            else
            {
                if (tileToRemove != null && tileIndex != tiles.Length - 1)
                {

                   
                    Vector3 spawnPosition = CalculateSpawnPosition(localPlace.Value);
                    powerManager.SpawnPowerUp(spawnPosition);
                    tilemap.SetTile(localPlace.Value, null);
                    RemoveCollider(localPlace.Value);
                }
                else
                {
                
                }
            }


        }
    }

    public Vector3 CalculateSpawnPosition(Vector3Int cellPosition)
    {
        Vector3 cellWorldPosition = tilemap.CellToWorld(cellPosition);

        // Adjust for the tilemap's scale
        float tileWidth = tilemap.cellSize.x * tilemap.transform.localScale.x;
        float tileHeight = tilemap.cellSize.y * tilemap.transform.localScale.y;

        Vector3 spawnPosition = new Vector3(
            cellWorldPosition.x + tileWidth / 2,
            cellWorldPosition.y + tileHeight / 2,
            cellWorldPosition.z
        );

        return spawnPosition;
    }

    public void RemoveCollider(Vector3Int tilePosition)
    {
        if (tileColliders.TryGetValue(tilePosition, out GameObject colliderObject))
        {
            Destroy(colliderObject);
            tileColliders.Remove(tilePosition);
            GameManager.TilesCount--;
            //Debug.Log(GameManager.TilesCount);
            CheckForWin();
        }
    }

    private void CheckForWin()
    {
        if (GameManager.TilesCount == 0)
        {
            // Call ShowWinMessage() from MainMenu
            FindObjectOfType<MainMenu>().ShowWinMessage();
        }
    }

    bool ArrayContainsTile(TileBase tileToCheck)
    {
        foreach (TileBase tile in tiles)
        {
            if (tile == tileToCheck)
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}
```

Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\DatabaseHelperr.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Data.SqlClient;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using System.Linq;
using System.Data;

namespace WindowsFormsApp1
{
    public static class DatabaseHelper
    {
        private static string connectionString = @"";

        public static void CreateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Create table for authors
                    string createAuthorsTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Autori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Autori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for books
                    string createBooksTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Carti]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Carti] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            titlu NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            id_autor INT NOT NULL,
                            gen NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_autor) REFERENCES Autori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for users
                    string createUsersTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Utilizatori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Utilizatori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            email NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for loans
                    string createLoansTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Imprumuturi]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            id_carte INT NOT NULL,
                            id_utilizator INT NOT NULL,
                            data_imprumut DATETIME NOT NULL,
                            data_returnare DATETIME,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_carte) REFERENCES Carti(id),
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_utilizator) REFERENCES Utilizatori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createAuthorsTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createBooksTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createUsersTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createLoansTableQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Database has been initialized successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while initializing the database: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void PopulateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Insert sample authors
                    string populateAuthorsQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Autori] (nume, prenume) VALUES 
                    ('Ion', 'Creanga'),
                    ('Mihai', 'Eminescu'),
                    ('Marin', 'Preda')";

                    // Insert sample books
                    string populateBooksQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Carti] (titlu, id_autor, gen) VALUES 
                    ('Amintiri din copilarie', 1, 'Literatura Romana'),
                    ('Luceafarul', 2, 'Poezie'),
                    ('Morometii', 3, 'Roman')";

                    // Insert sample users
                    string populateUsersQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Utilizatori] (nume, prenume, email) VALUES 
                    ('Andrei', 'Popescu', 'andrei.popescu@example.com'),
                    ('Ioana', 'Ionescu', 'ioana.ionescu@example.com'),
                    ('Marius', 'Georgescu', 'marius.georgescu@example.com')";

                    // Insert sample loans
                    string populateLoansQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (id_carte, id_utilizator, data_imprumut, data_returnare) VALUES 
                    (1, 1, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (2, 2, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (3, 3, '2023-02-04', '2023-03-04')";

                    // Execute the population queries
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateAuthorsQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been populated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while populating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void UpdateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Update the Users table
                    string updateUsersQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Utilizatori] SET email = 'new.email@example.com'
                        WHERE nume = 'Marius' AND prenume = 'Georgescu';";

                    // Update the Books table
                    string updateBooksQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Carti] SET gen = 'Literatura Contemporana'
                        WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie';";

                    // Update the Loans table
                    string updateLoansQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] SET data_returnare = DATEADD(day, 14, data_imprumut)
                        WHERE id_carte = (SELECT id FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie')
                        AND data_returnare IS NULL;";

                    // Execute the queries to update the tables
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been updated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while updating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
        public static void QueryTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Query 1: Selects all books by an author with a given ID.
                    int authorId = 1;
                    Console.WriteLine("Query 1: Selecting all books by an author with ID = " + authorId);
                    string query1 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE id_autor = {authorId};";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query1);

                    // Query 2: Retrieves authors and the number of books written by each.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 2: Retrieving authors and the number of books written by each.");
                    string query2 = @"
                    SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumberOfBooks
                    FROM [dbo].[Autori]
                    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor
                    GROUP BY Autori.nume, Autori.prenume;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query2);

                    // Query 3: Selects all books of a specific genre.
                    string genre = "Poezie";
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 3: Selecting all books of genre '" + genre + "'.");
                    string query3 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE gen = '{genre}';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query3);

                    // Query 4: Retrieves authors with surnames starting with 'P'.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 4: Retrieving authors with surnames starting with 'P'.");
                    string query4 = "SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Autori] WHERE prenume LIKE 'P%';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query4);

                    // Query 5: Fetches details about loans and associated book information.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 5: Fetching details about loans and associated book information.");
                    string query5 = @"
                    SELECT Imprumuturi.*, Carti.titlu, Carti.gen
                    FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query5);

                    // Query 6: Retrieves users and the books they have borrowed.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 6: Retrieving users and the books they have borrowed.");
                    string query6 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query6);

                    // Query 7: Finds users who have not returned borrowed books.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 7: Finding users who have not returned borrowed books.");
                    string query7 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id
                    WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query7);

                    Console.WriteLine("\nQueries executed successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while querying the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void WipeAndDeleteAllTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Delete data from all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> wipeTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in wipeTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    // Drop all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> dropTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in dropTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine("All tables have been wiped and deleted successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while wiping and deleting the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
                {
                    // Print column names
                    for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                    {
                        Console.Write(reader.GetName(i) + "\t");
                    }
                    Console.WriteLine();

                    // Print rows
                    while (reader.Read())
                    {
                        for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                        {
                            Console.Write(reader.GetValue(i) + "\t");
                        }
                        Console.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteNonQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                command.ExecuteNonQuery();
            }
        }

        public static DataTable ExecuteQueryAndReturnDataTable(string query)
        {
            using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
            {
                SqlDataAdapter adapter = new SqlDataAdapter(query, connection);
                DataTable table = new DataTable();
                adapter.Fill(table);
                return table;
            }
        }
    }
}

Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\DatabaseHelper_original.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Data.SqlClient;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using System.Linq;

namespace WindowsFormsApp2
{
    public static class DatabaseHelper
    {
        private static string connectionString = @"Data Source=(LocalDB)\MSSQLLocalDB;AttachDbFilename=C:\Users\dan_a\source\repos\WindowsFormsApp2\WindowsFormsApp2\Database2.mdf;Integrated Security=True";

        public static void InitializeDatabase()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Create table for authors
                    string createAuthorsTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Autori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Autori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for books
                    string createBooksTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Carti]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Carti] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            titlu NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            id_autor INT NOT NULL,
                            gen NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_autor) REFERENCES Autori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for users
                    string createUsersTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Utilizatori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Utilizatori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            email NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for loans
                    string createLoansTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Imprumuturi]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            id_carte INT NOT NULL,
                            id_utilizator INT NOT NULL,
                            data_imprumut DATETIME NOT NULL,
                            data_returnare DATETIME,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_carte) REFERENCES Carti(id),
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_utilizator) REFERENCES Utilizatori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createAuthorsTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createBooksTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createUsersTableQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, createLoansTableQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Database has been initialized successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while initializing the database: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void PopulateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Insert sample authors
                    string populateAuthorsQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Autori] (nume, prenume) VALUES 
                    ('Ion', 'Creanga'),
                    ('Mihai', 'Eminescu'),
                    ('Marin', 'Preda')";

                    // Insert sample books
                    string populateBooksQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Carti] (titlu, id_autor, gen) VALUES 
                    ('Amintiri din copilarie', 1, 'Literatura Romana'),
                    ('Luceafarul', 2, 'Poezie'),
                    ('Morometii', 3, 'Roman')";

                    // Insert sample users
                    string populateUsersQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Utilizatori] (nume, prenume, email) VALUES 
                    ('Andrei', 'Popescu', 'andrei.popescu@example.com'),
                    ('Ioana', 'Ionescu', 'ioana.ionescu@example.com'),
                    ('Marius', 'Georgescu', 'marius.georgescu@example.com')";

                    // Insert sample loans
                    string populateLoansQuery = @"
                    INSERT INTO [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (id_carte, id_utilizator, data_imprumut, data_returnare) VALUES 
                    (1, 1, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (2, 2, '2023-02-04', NULL),
                    (3, 3, '2023-02-04', '2023-03-04')";

                    // Execute the population queries
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateAuthorsQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, populateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been populated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while populating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void UpdateTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Update the Users table
                    string updateUsersQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Utilizatori] SET email = 'new.email@example.com'
                        WHERE nume = 'Marius' AND prenume = 'Georgescu';";

                    // Update the Books table
                    string updateBooksQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Carti] SET gen = 'Literatura Contemporana'
                        WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie';";

                    // Update the Loans table
                    string updateLoansQuery = @"
                        UPDATE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] SET data_returnare = DATEADD(day, 14, data_imprumut)
                        WHERE id_carte = (SELECT id FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE titlu = 'Amintiri din copilarie')
                        AND data_returnare IS NULL;";

                    // Execute the queries to update the tables
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateUsersQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateBooksQuery);
                    ExecuteNonQuery(connection, updateLoansQuery);

                    Console.WriteLine("Tables have been updated successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while updating the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
        public static void QueryTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Query 1: Selects all books by an author with a given ID.
                    int authorId = 1;
                    Console.WriteLine("Query 1: Selecting all books by an author with ID = " + authorId);
                    string query1 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE id_autor = {authorId};";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query1);

                    // Query 2: Retrieves authors and the number of books written by each.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 2: Retrieving authors and the number of books written by each.");
                    string query2 = @"
                    SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumberOfBooks
                    FROM [dbo].[Autori]
                    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor
                    GROUP BY Autori.nume, Autori.prenume;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query2);

                    // Query 3: Selects all books of a specific genre.
                    string genre = "Poezie";
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 3: Selecting all books of genre '" + genre + "'.");
                    string query3 = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE gen = '{genre}';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query3);

                    // Query 4: Retrieves authors with surnames starting with 'P'.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 4: Retrieving authors with surnames starting with 'P'.");
                    string query4 = "SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Autori] WHERE prenume LIKE 'P%';";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query4);

                    // Query 5: Fetches details about loans and associated book information.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 5: Fetching details about loans and associated book information.");
                    string query5 = @"
                    SELECT Imprumuturi.*, Carti.titlu, Carti.gen
                    FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query5);

                    // Query 6: Retrieves users and the books they have borrowed.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 6: Retrieving users and the books they have borrowed.");
                    string query6 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query6);

                    // Query 7: Finds users who have not returned borrowed books.
                    Console.WriteLine("\nQuery 7: Finding users who have not returned borrowed books.");
                    string query7 = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id
                    WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL;";
                    ExecuteQuery(connection, query7);

                    Console.WriteLine("\nQueries executed successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while querying the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        public static void WipeAndDeleteAllTables()
        {
            try
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Delete data from all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> wipeTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DELETE FROM [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in wipeTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    // Drop all tables. Order matters due to foreign key constraints.
                    List<string> dropTableQueries = new List<string>
                    {
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Imprumuturi];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Carti];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Utilizatori];",
                        "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [dbo].[Autori];"
                    };

                    foreach (var query in dropTableQueries)
                    {
                        ExecuteNonQuery(connection, query);
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine("All tables have been wiped and deleted successfully.");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("An error occurred while wiping and deleting the tables: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
                {
                    // Print column names
                    for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                    {
                        Console.Write(reader.GetName(i) + "\t");
                    }
                    Console.WriteLine();

                    // Print rows
                    while (reader.Read())
                    {
                        for (int i = 0; i < reader.FieldCount; i++)
                        {
                            Console.Write(reader.GetValue(i) + "\t");
                        }
                        Console.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        private static void ExecuteNonQuery(SqlConnection connection, string query)
        {
            using (var command = new SqlCommand(query, connection))
            {
                command.ExecuteNonQuery();
            }
        }
    }
}

```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Data;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Windows.Forms;

namespace WindowsFormsApp1
{
    public partial class Form1 : Form
    {
        public Form1()
        {
            InitializeComponent();

            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 1: Select all books by an author with ID 1.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 2: Retrieve authors and the number of books written by each.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 3: Select all books of genre Poezie.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 4: Retrieve authors with surnames starting with 'P'.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 5: Fetch details about loans and associated book information.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 6: Retrieve users and the books they have borrowed.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 7: Find users who have not returned borrowed books.");

            comboBoxQueries.SelectedIndex = 0; // Set the default selected item
        }

        private void Form1_Load(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {

        }

        private void btnCreateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.CreateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables created Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void btnPopulateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.PopulateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Populated Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void btnUpdateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.UpdateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Updated Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void btnQueryTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                string query = GetSelectedQuery(comboBoxQueries.SelectedIndex);
                DataTable dataTable = DatabaseHelper.ExecuteQueryAndReturnDataTable(query);
                dataGridView1.DataSource = dataTable;

                MessageBox.Show("Query executed successfully.");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private string GetSelectedQuery(int selectedIndex)
        {
            string query = string.Empty;
            int authorId = 1; // Example author ID, adjust as needed
            string genre = "Poezie"; // Example genre, adjust as needed

            switch (selectedIndex)
            {
                case 0:
                    query = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE id_autor = {authorId};";
                    break;
                case 1:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumberOfBooks
                    FROM [dbo].[Autori]
                    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor
                    GROUP BY Autori.nume, Autori.prenume;";
                    break;
                case 2:
                    query = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE gen = '{genre}';";
                    break;
                case 3:
                    query = "SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Autori] WHERE prenume LIKE 'P%';";
                    break;
                case 4:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Imprumuturi.*, Carti.titlu, Carti.gen
                    FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    break;
                case 5:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    break;
                case 6:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id
                    WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL;";
                    break;
            }
            return query;
        }

        private void btnRemoveTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.WipeAndDeleteAllTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Removed Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void dataGridView1_CellContentClick(object sender, DataGridViewCellEventArgs e)
        {

        }

    }
}

Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\grafuri.txt:
```
#include <iostream>
using namespace std;

const int N = 10; // Dimensiunea maxima a matricei de adiacenta
const bool orientat = true;

void adaugaMuchie(int graf[N][N], int u, int v, bool orientat = false) {
    graf[u][v] = 1; // Adauga o muchie de la u la vc
    if (!orientat) {
        graf[v][u] = 1; // Adauga si invers pentru grafuri neorientate
    }
}

void afiseazaMatriceAdiacenta(int graf[N][N], int n) {
    cout << "Matricea de adiacenta:\n";
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) {
            cout << graf[i][j] << " ";
        }
        cout << "\n";
    }
}

void afiseazaMuchii(int graf[N][N], int n, bool orientat = false) {
    cout << "Lista de muchii:\n";
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = orientat ? 1 : i + 1; j <= n; j++) {
            if (graf[i][j]) {
                cout << "(" << i << ", " << j << ")\n";
            }
        }
    }
}

int numaraMuchii(int graf[N][N], int n, bool orientat = false) {
    int numarMuchii = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = orientat ? 1 : i + 1; j <= n; j++) {
            if (graf[i][j]) {
                numarMuchii++;
            }
        }
    }
    return numarMuchii;
}

void citesteGrafDeLaTastatura(int graf[N][N], int& numarNoduri, bool orientat = false) {
   //cout << "Introdu muchiile sub forma 'nod_start nod_sfarsit', introdu 0 0 pentru a termina:\n";
    int u, v;
    while (true) {
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == 0 && v == 0) break;
        adaugaMuchie(graf, u, v, orientat);
    }
}

int main() {
    int graf[N][N] = { 0 }; // Initializarea matricei de adiacenta cu 0
    int numarNoduri;
    cin >> numarNoduri;
    citesteGrafDeLaTastatura(graf, numarNoduri, orientat);
    cout << endl;
    afiseazaMatriceAdiacenta(graf, numarNoduri);
    cout << endl;
    afiseazaMuchii(graf, numarNoduri, orientat);
    cout << endl;
    // Afisarea numarului de muchii
    cout << "Numarul de muchii in graf: " << numaraMuchii(graf, numarNoduri, orientat) << endl;
    return 0;
}
```

DimineaИӣДғ - OmletДғ:
- OuДғ (12-18 bucДғИӣi pentru sДғptДғmГўna)
- Unt
- BrГўnzДғ
- ИҳuncДғ
- Ardei
- RoИҷii

PrГўnz - CiorbДғ de Pui a la Grec (https://jamilacuisine.ro/ciorba-de-pui-a-la-grec-reteta-video/):
- Carne de pui cu os (1 kg)
- SmГўntГўnДғ (300 g)
- Orez (80 g)
- GДғlbenuИҷuri (4)
- CeapДғ (2 bucДғИӣi, tocate)
- Morcov (1, tДғiat cubuleИӣe)
- Ardei gras (1, tДғiat cubuleИӣe)
- ИҡelinДғ (1/4, tДғiatДғ cubuleИӣe)
- PДғstГўrnac (1 rДғdДғcinДғ, tДғiatДғ cubuleИӣe)
- PДғtrunjel (1 legДғturДғ, tocat)
- MДғrar (1 legДғturДғ, tocat)
- Zeama de la 2 lДғmГўi
- Sare


CinДғ - Pilaf de Quinoa cu Legume (https://elavegan.com/quinoa-pilaf/)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=95LIkkiU81A&t=26s
- Quinoa (1 canДғ)
- ApДғ sau supДғ de legume (1 Вҫ cani)
- Ulei de mДғsline (1 lingurДғ)
- CeapДғ medie (1, tocatДғ)
- Usturoi (2 cДғИӣei, tocaИӣi)
- Ghimbir proaspДғt (1/2 lingurДғ, ras)
- MazДғre (1 canДғ)
- Cartof dulce (1/2 canДғ, tДғiat fin)
- Ardei gras (1/2 canДғ, tДғiat)
- FrunzДғ de dafin (1)
- Sare de mare Иҷi piper negru (dupДғ gust)
- SupДғ de legume (1/4 canДғ)
- Suc de lДғmГўie sau lime (de la 1/2 fruct)
- SeminИӣe de cumin (1/2 linguriИӣДғ)
- Chili roИҷu (opИӣional, dupДғ gust)

        PackedVaryings PackVaryings (Varyings input)
        {
            PackedVaryings output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(PackedVaryings, output);
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS.xyzw = input.tangentWS;
            output.texCoord0.xyzw = input.texCoord0;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight;
            output.shadowCoord.xyzw = input.shadowCoord;
            output.positionWS.xyz = input.positionWS;
            output.normalWS.xyz = input.normalWS;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        Varyings UnpackVaryings (PackedVaryings input)
        {
            Varyings output;
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS = input.tangentWS.xyzw;
            output.texCoord0 = input.texCoord0.xyzw;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw;
            output.shadowCoord = input.shadowCoord.xyzw;
            output.positionWS = input.positionWS.xyz;
            output.normalWS = input.normalWS.xyz;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }

        void Unity_TilingAndOffset_float(float2 UV, float2 Tiling, float2 Offset, out float2 Out)
        {
            Out = UV * Tiling + Offset;
        }
        
        void Unity_Distance_float2(float2 A, float2 B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = distance(A, B);
        }
        
        void Unity_Subtract_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A - B;
        }
        
        void Unity_Absolute_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = abs(In);

        void Unity_DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            
                    #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_RAY_TRACING) && defined(RAYTRACING_SHADER_GRAPH_DEFAULT)
                    #error 'DDXY' node is not supported in ray tracing, please provide an alternate implementation, relying for instance on the 'Raytracing Quality' keyword
                    #endif
            Out = abs(ddx(In)) + abs(ddy(In));
        }
        
        void Unity_Divide_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A / B;
        }
        
        void Unity_OneMinus_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = 1 - In;

        VertexDescriptionInputs BuildVertexDescriptionInputs(Attributes input)
        {
            VertexDescriptionInputs output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(VertexDescriptionInputs, output);
        
            output.ObjectSpaceNormal =                          input.normalOS;
            output.ObjectSpaceTangent =                         input.tangentOS.xyz;
            output.ObjectSpacePosition =                        input.positionOS;
        
            return output;
        }

        void BuildAppDataFull(Attributes attributes, VertexDescription vertexDescription, inout appdata_full result)
        {
            result.vertex     = float4(attributes.positionOS, 1);
            result.tangent    = attributes.tangentOS;
            result.normal     = attributes.normalOS;
            result.texcoord   = attributes.uv0;
            result.texcoord1  = attributes.uv1;
            result.vertex     = float4(vertexDescription.Position, 1);
            result.normal     = vertexDescription.Normal;
            result.tangent    = float4(vertexDescription.Tangent, 0);
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
        }
        
        void VaryingsToSurfaceVertex(Varyings varyings, inout v2f_surf result)
        {
            result.pos = varyings.positionCS;
            result.worldPos = varyings.positionWS;
            result.worldNormal = varyings.normalWS;
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
        
            result._ShadowCoord = varyings.shadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = varyings.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lmap.xy = varyings.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogCoord = varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x;
                COPY_TO_LIGHT_COORDS(result, varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(varyings, result);
        }
        
        void SurfaceVertexToVaryings(v2f_surf surfVertex, inout Varyings result)
        {
            result.positionCS = surfVertex.pos;
            result.positionWS = surfVertex.worldPos;
            result.normalWS = surfVertex.worldNormal;
            // viewDirectionWS is never filled out in the legacy pass' function. Always use the value computed by SRP
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
            result.shadowCoord = surfVertex._ShadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = surfVertex.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lightmapUV = surfVertex.lmap.xy;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x = surfVertex.fogCoord;
                COPY_FROM_LIGHT_COORDS(result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw, surfVertex);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(surfVertex, result);
        }
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Main
        
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/ShaderPass.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/Varyings.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/PBRForwardPass.hlsl"
        
        ENDHLSL
        }
        Pass
        {
            Name "BuiltIn ForwardAdd"
            Tags
            {
                "LightMode" = "ForwardAdd"
            }
        
        // Render State
        Blend SrcAlpha One, One One
        ZWrite Off
        
        // Debug
        // <None>
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Pass
        
        HLSLPROGRAM
        
        // Pragmas
        #pragma target 3.0
        #pragma multi_compile_instancing
        #pragma multi_compile_fog
        #pragma multi_compile_fwdadd_fullshadows
        #pragma vertex vert
        #pragma fragment frag
        
        // Keywords
        #pragma multi_compile _ _SCREEN_SPACE_OCCLUSION
        #pragma multi_compile _ LIGHTMAP_ON
        #pragma multi_compile _ DIRLIGHTMAP_COMBINED
        #pragma multi_compile _ _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS_CASCADE _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS_SCREEN
        #pragma multi_compile _ADDITIONAL_LIGHTS_VERTEX _ADDITIONAL_LIGHTS _ADDITIONAL_OFF
        #pragma multi_compile _ _ADDITIONAL_LIGHT_SHADOWS
        #pragma multi_compile _ _SHADOWS_SOFT
        #pragma multi_compile _ LIGHTMAP_SHADOW_MIXING
        #pragma multi_compile _ SHADOWS_SHADOWMASK
        // GraphKeywords: <None>
        
        // Defines
        #define _NORMALMAP 1
        #define _NORMAL_DROPOFF_TS 1
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_NORMAL
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TANGENT
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TEXCOORD0
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TEXCOORD1
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_POSITION_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_NORMAL_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_TANGENT_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_TEXCOORD0
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
        #define FEATURES_GRAPH_VERTEX
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'PassInstancing' */
        #define SHADERPASS SHADERPASS_FORWARD_ADD
        #define BUILTIN_TARGET_API 1
        #define _BUILTIN_AlphaClip 1
        #define _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON 1
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT
        #define _SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT _BUILTIN_SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON
        #define _ALPHATEST_ON _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_AlphaClip
        #define _AlphaClip _BUILTIN_AlphaClip
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON
        #define _ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON _BUILTIN_ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON
        #endif

        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'sgci_CustomInterpolatorPreInclude' */

        #include "Packages/com.unity.render-pipelines.core/ShaderLibrary/Color.hlsl"

        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Structs and Packing
        
        // custom interpolators pre packing
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'CustomInterpolatorPrePacking' */
        
        struct Attributes
        {
             float3 positionOS : POSITION;
             float3 normalOS : NORMAL;
             float4 tangentOS : TANGENT;
             float4 uv0 : TEXCOORD0;
             float4 uv1 : TEXCOORD1;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : INSTANCEID_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        struct Varyings
        {
             float4 positionCS : SV_POSITION;
             float3 positionWS;
             float3 normalWS;
             float4 tangentWS;
             float4 texCoord0;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float2 lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float3 sh;
            #endif
             float4 fogFactorAndVertexLight;
             float4 shadowCoord;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : CUSTOM_INSTANCE_ID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 : BLENDINDICES0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx : SV_RenderTargetArrayIndex;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
             FRONT_FACE_TYPE cullFace : FRONT_FACE_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        struct SurfaceDescriptionInputs
        {
             float3 TangentSpaceNormal;
             float4 uv0;
        };
        struct VertexDescriptionInputs
        {
             float3 ObjectSpaceNormal;
             float3 ObjectSpaceTangent;
             float3 ObjectSpacePosition;
        };
        struct PackedVaryings
        {
             float4 positionCS : SV_POSITION;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float2 lightmapUV : INTERP0;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float3 sh : INTERP1;
            #endif
             float4 tangentWS : INTERP2;
             float4 texCoord0 : INTERP3;
             float4 fogFactorAndVertexLight : INTERP4;
             float4 shadowCoord : INTERP5;
             float3 positionWS : INTERP6;
             float3 normalWS : INTERP7;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : CUSTOM_INSTANCE_ID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 : BLENDINDICES0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx : SV_RenderTargetArrayIndex;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
             FRONT_FACE_TYPE cullFace : FRONT_FACE_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        
        PackedVaryings PackVaryings (Varyings input)
        {
            PackedVaryings output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(PackedVaryings, output);
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS.xyzw = input.tangentWS;
            output.texCoord0.xyzw = input.texCoord0;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight;
            output.shadowCoord.xyzw = input.shadowCoord;
            output.positionWS.xyz = input.positionWS;
            output.normalWS.xyz = input.normalWS;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        Varyings UnpackVaryings (PackedVaryings input)
        {
            Varyings output;
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS = input.tangentWS.xyzw;
            output.texCoord0 = input.texCoord0.xyzw;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw;
            output.shadowCoord = input.shadowCoord.xyzw;
            output.positionWS = input.positionWS.xyz;
            output.normalWS = input.normalWS.xyz;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }

        CBUFFER_START(UnityPerMaterial)

        // Graph Includes
        // GraphIncludes: <None>
        
        // Graph Functions
        
        void Unity_TilingAndOffset_float(float2 UV, float2 Tiling, float2 Offset, out float2 Out)
        {
            Out = UV * Tiling + Offset;
        }
        
        void Unity_Distance_float2(float2 A, float2 B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = distance(A, B);
        }
        
        void Unity_Subtract_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A - B;
        }
        
        void Unity_Absolute_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = abs(In);
        }
        
        void Unity_DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            
                    #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_RAY_TRACING) && defined(RAYTRACING_SHADER_GRAPH_DEFAULT)
                    #error 'DDXY' node is not supported in ray tracing, please provide an alternate implementation, relying for instance on the 'Raytracing Quality' keyword
                    #endif
            Out = abs(ddx(In)) + abs(ddy(In));
        }
        
        void Unity_Divide_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A / B;
        }
        
        void Unity_OneMinus_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = 1 - In;
        }
        
        // Custom interpolators pre vertex
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'CustomInterpolatorPreVertex' */
        
        // Graph Vertex
        struct VertexDescription
        {
            float3 Position;
            float3 Normal;
            float3 Tangent;
        };
        
        VertexDescription VertexDescriptionFunction(VertexDescriptionInputs IN)
        {
            VertexDescription description = (VertexDescription)0;
            description.Position = IN.ObjectSpacePosition;
            description.Normal = IN.ObjectSpaceNormal;
            description.Tangent = IN.ObjectSpaceTangent;
            return description;
        }
        
        // Custom interpolators, pre surface
        #ifdef FEATURES_GRAPH_VERTEX
        Varyings CustomInterpolatorPassThroughFunc(inout Varyings output, VertexDescription input)
        {
        return output;
        }
        #define CUSTOMINTERPOLATOR_VARYPASSTHROUGH_FUNC
        #endif
        
        // Graph Pixel
        struct SurfaceDescription
        {
            float3 BaseColor;
            float3 NormalTS;
            float3 Emission;
            float Metallic;
            float Smoothness;
            float Occlusion;
            float Alpha;
            float AlphaClipThreshold;
        };
        
        SurfaceDescription SurfaceDescriptionFunction(SurfaceDescriptionInputs IN)
        {
            SurfaceDescription surface = (SurfaceDescription)0;
            float4 _UV_b21d1fac8347421eac7c2122dfe4e7d1_Out_0_Vector4 = IN.uv0;
            float2 _TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2;
            Unity_TilingAndOffset_float((_UV_b21d1fac8347421eac7c2122dfe4e7d1_Out_0_Vector4.xy), float2 (1, 1), float2 (-0.5, -0.5), _TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2);
            float _Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Distance_float2(_TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2, float2(0, 0), _Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float);
            float _Property_92bc60458f75460fba7c800bc2954b82_Out_0_Float = _Radius;
            float _Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Subtract_float(_Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float, _Property_92bc60458f75460fba7c800bc2954b82_Out_0_Float, _Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float);
            float _Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_Absolute_float(_Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float, _Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float);
            float _Property_1c542ce026034f18a1c252ed7131a7de_Out_0_Float = _Ring_Thickness;
            float _Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Subtract_float(_Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float, _Property_1c542ce026034f18a1c252ed7131a7de_Out_0_Float, _Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float);
            float _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_float(_Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float, _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float);
            float _Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Divide_float(_Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float, _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float, _Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float);
            float _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_OneMinus_float(_Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float, _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float);
            surface.BaseColor = (_Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float.xxx);
            surface.NormalTS = IN.TangentSpaceNormal;
            surface.Emission = float3(0, 0, 0);
            surface.Metallic = 0;
            surface.Smoothness = 0.5;
            surface.Occlusion = 1;
            surface.Alpha = _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float;
            surface.AlphaClipThreshold = 0.5;
            return surface;
        }
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Build Graph Inputs
        
        VertexDescriptionInputs BuildVertexDescriptionInputs(Attributes input)
        {
            VertexDescriptionInputs output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(VertexDescriptionInputs, output);
        
            output.ObjectSpaceNormal =                          input.normalOS;
            output.ObjectSpaceTangent =                         input.tangentOS.xyz;
            output.ObjectSpacePosition =                        input.positionOS;
        
            return output;
        }
        SurfaceDescriptionInputs BuildSurfaceDescriptionInputs(Varyings input)
        {
            SurfaceDescriptionInputs output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(SurfaceDescriptionInputs, output);
        
            
        
        
        
            output.TangentSpaceNormal = float3(0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        
        
            #if UNITY_UV_STARTS_AT_TOP
            #else
            #endif
        
        
            output.uv0 = input.texCoord0;
        #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
        #define BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN output.FaceSign =                    IS_FRONT_VFACE(input.cullFace, true, false);
        #else
        #define BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN
        #endif
        #undef BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN
        
                return output;
        }
        
        void BuildAppDataFull(Attributes attributes, VertexDescription vertexDescription, inout appdata_full result)
        {
            result.vertex     = float4(attributes.positionOS, 1);
            result.tangent    = attributes.tangentOS;
            result.normal     = attributes.normalOS;
            result.texcoord   = attributes.uv0;
            result.texcoord1  = attributes.uv1;
            result.vertex     = float4(vertexDescription.Position, 1);
            result.normal     = vertexDescription.Normal;
            result.tangent    = float4(vertexDescription.Tangent, 0);
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
        }
        
        void VaryingsToSurfaceVertex(Varyings varyings, inout v2f_surf result)
        {
            result.pos = varyings.positionCS;
            result.worldPos = varyings.positionWS;
            result.worldNormal = varyings.normalWS;
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
        
            result._ShadowCoord = varyings.shadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = varyings.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lmap.xy = varyings.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogCoord = varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x;
                COPY_TO_LIGHT_COORDS(result, varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(varyings, result);
        }
        
        void SurfaceVertexToVaryings(v2f_surf surfVertex, inout Varyings result)
        {
            result.positionCS = surfVertex.pos;
            result.positionWS = surfVertex.worldPos;
            result.normalWS = surfVertex.worldNormal;
            // viewDirectionWS is never filled out in the legacy pass' function. Always use the value computed by SRP
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
            result.shadowCoord = surfVertex._ShadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = surfVertex.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lightmapUV = surfVertex.lmap.xy;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x = surfVertex.fogCoord;
                COPY_FROM_LIGHT_COORDS(result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw, surfVertex);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(surfVertex, result);
        }
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Main
        
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/ShaderPass.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/Varyings.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/PBRForwardAddPass.hlsl"
        
        ENDHLSL
        }

            {
                "LightMode" = "Deferred"
            }
