Desktop Old\Desktop Old2\Text.txt:
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.IO;



namespace AplicatieBD
{
    using System;
    using System.Collections.Generic;
    using System.Data.SqlClient;

    namespace AplicatieBD
    {
        public static class DatabaseHelper
        {
            private static string connectionString = @"Data Source=(LocalDB)\MSSQLLocalDB;AttachDbFilename=|DataDirectory|\Database1.mdf;Integrated Security=True;";

            public static void InitializeDatabase()
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Create table for authors
                    string createAuthorsTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Autori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Autori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for books
                    string createBooksTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Carti]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Carti] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            titlu NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            id_autor INT NOT NULL,
                            gen NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_autor) REFERENCES Autori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for users
                    string createUsersTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Utilizatori]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Utilizatori] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            nume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            prenume NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                            email NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL
                        );
                    END";

                    // Create table for loans
                    string createLoansTableQuery = @"
                    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Imprumuturi]') AND type in (N'U'))
                    BEGIN
                        CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Imprumuturi] (
                            id INT PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
                            id_carte INT NOT NULL,
                            id_utilizator INT NOT NULL,
                            data_imprumut DATETIME NOT NULL,
                            data_returnare DATETIME,
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_carte) REFERENCES Carti(id),
                            FOREIGN KEY(id_utilizator) REFERENCES Utilizatori(id)
                        );
                    END";

                    using (var command = new SqlCommand(createAuthorsTableQuery, connection))
                    {
                        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
                    }

                    using (var command = new SqlCommand(createBooksTableQuery, connection))
                    {
                        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
                    }

                    using (var command = new SqlCommand(createUsersTableQuery, connection))
                    {
                        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
                    }

                    using (var command = new SqlCommand(createLoansTableQuery, connection))
                    {
                        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
                    }
                }

                Console.WriteLine("Baza de date a fost iniИӣializatДғ cu succes.");
            }

            public static void PopulateTables()
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Begin a transaction
                    using (var transaction = connection.BeginTransaction())
                    {
                        // Insert authors
                        var insertAuthorCommand = new SqlCommand("INSERT INTO Autori (nume, prenume) VALUES (@nume, @prenume)", connection, transaction);
                        var authorNames = new List<(string nume, string prenume)>
                    {
                        ("Popescu", "Ion"),
                        ("Ionescu", "Gigel"),
                        ("Marinescu", "Maria"),
                        ("Georgescu", "Ana"),
                        ("Stanescu", "Dan"),
                        ("Dumitrescu", "Elena"),
                        ("Luca", "Mihai"),
                        ("Voinescu", "Ioana")
                    };

                        foreach (var (nume, prenume) in authorNames)
                        {
                            insertAuthorCommand.Parameters.Clear();
                            insertAuthorCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@nume", nume);
                            insertAuthorCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@prenume", prenume);
                            insertAuthorCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();
                        }

                        // Insert books
                        var insertBookCommand = new SqlCommand("INSERT INTO Carti (titlu, id_autor, gen) VALUES (@titlu, @id_autor, @gen)", connection, transaction);
                        var books = new List<(string titlu, int id_autor, string gen)>
                        {
                            ("Viata la tara", 1, "Roman"),
                            ("Istoria Romanilor", 2, "Istorie"),
                            ("Poezii", 3, "Poezie"),
                            ("Enigma Otiliei", 4, "Roman"),
                            ("Ion", 1, "Roman"),
                            ("Baltagul", 5, "Roman"),
                            ("Luceafarul", 3, "Poezie"),
                            ("Morometii", 6, "Roman")
                        };

                        foreach (var (titlu, id_autor, gen) in books)
                        {
                            insertBookCommand.Parameters.Clear();
                            insertBookCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@titlu", titlu);
                            insertBookCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id_autor", id_autor);
                            insertBookCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@gen", gen);
                            insertBookCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();
                        }

                        //inserare utilizatori
                        var insertUserCommand = new SqlCommand("INSERT INTO Utilizatori (nume, prenume, email) VALUES (@nume, @prenume, @email)", connection, transaction);
                        var userNames = new List<(string nume, string prenume, string email)>
                        {
                            ("Andrei", "Mihai", "andrei.mihai@email.ro"),
                            ("Elena", "Popa", "elena.popa@email.ro"),
                            ("Petre", "Ion", "petre.ion@email.ro"),
                            ("Iulian", "Andrei", "iulian.andrei@email.ro"),
                            ("Silviu", "Manole", "silviu.manole@email.ro"),
                            ("Sorin", "Oprea", "sorin.oprea@email.ro"),
                            ("Catalina", "Ermina", "catalina.ermina@email.ro"),
                            ("Silvia", "Popescu", "silvia.popescu@email.ro"),
                            // AdaugДғ aici restul utilizatorilor...
                        };

                        // ... inserare Г®mprumuturi ...
                        var insertLoanCommand = new SqlCommand("INSERT INTO Imprumuturi (id_carte, id_utilizator, data_imprumut) VALUES (@id_carte, @id_utilizator, @data_imprumut)", connection, transaction);
                        for (int i = 1; i <= 8; i++)
                        {
                            insertLoanCommand.Parameters.Clear();
                            insertLoanCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id_carte", i);
                            insertLoanCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id_utilizator", i); // Assuming a user with the same ID exists
                            insertLoanCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@data_imprumut", DateTime.Now.AddDays(-i - 20).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd"));
                            insertLoanCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();
                        }

                        // Commit the transaction
                        transaction.Commit();
                    }
                }

                Console.WriteLine("Tabelele au fost populate cu succes.");
            }

            public static void UpdateTables()
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    using (var transaction = connection.BeginTransaction())
                    {
                        // Actualizare gen carte
                        var updateBookCommand = new SqlCommand("UPDATE Carti SET gen = @gen WHERE id = @id", connection);
                        updateBookCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@gen", "GenNou");
                        updateBookCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", 1); // ID-ul cДғrИӣii pe care doreИҷti sДғ o actualizezi
                        updateBookCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();

                        // Actualizare nume autor
                        var updateAuthorCommand = new SqlCommand("UPDATE Autori SET nume = @nume WHERE id = @id", connection);
                        updateAuthorCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@nume", "NumeNou");
                        updateAuthorCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", 1); // ID-ul autorului pe care doreИҷti sДғ Г®l actualizezi
                        updateAuthorCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();

                        // Actualizare date utilizator
                        var updateUserCommand = new SqlCommand("UPDATE Utilizatori SET email = @email WHERE id = @id", connection);
                        updateUserCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@email", "new.email@example.com");
                        updateUserCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", 1); // ID-ul utilizatorului pe care doreИҷti sДғ Г®l actualizezi
                        updateUserCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();

                        // Actualizare data returnare Г®mprumut
                        var updateLoanCommand = new SqlCommand("UPDATE Imprumuturi SET data_returnare = @data_returnare WHERE id = @id", connection);
                        updateLoanCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@data_returnare", DateTime.Now.AddDays(-3).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd"));
                        updateLoanCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", 1); // ID-ul Г®mprumutului pe care doreИҷti sДғ Г®l actualizezi
                        updateLoanCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();

                        // Actualizare data returnare Г®mprumut
                        var updateLoanCommand2 = new SqlCommand("UPDATE Imprumuturi SET data_returnare = @data_returnare WHERE id = @id", connection);
                        updateLoanCommand2.Parameters.AddWithValue("@data_returnare", DateTime.Now.AddDays(-5).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd"));
                        updateLoanCommand2.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", 2); // ID-ul Г®mprumutului pe care doreИҷti sДғ Г®l actualizezi
                        updateLoanCommand2.ExecuteNonQuery();


                        // Commit the transaction
                        transaction.Commit();
                    }
                }
            }

            public static void QueryTables()
            {
                using (var connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))
                {
                    connection.Open();

                    // Interogare 1: SelecteazДғ toate cДғrИӣile de la un anumit autor
                    Console.WriteLine("Interogare 1: Toate cДғrИӣile de la autorul cu ID-ul 1.");
                    var selectBooksCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT * FROM Carti WHERE id_autor = @id_autor", connection);
                    selectBooksCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id_autor", 1);
                    using (var reader = selectBooksCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Titlu: {reader["titlu"]}, Gen: {reader["gen"]}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 2: SelecteazДғ toИӣi autorii Иҷi numДғrul de cДғrИӣi scrise de fiecare
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 2: Autori Иҷi numДғrul de cДғrИӣi scrise.");
                    var selectAuthorsCountBooksCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumarCarti FROM Autori JOIN Carti ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor GROUP BY Autori.id", connection);
                    using (var reader = selectAuthorsCountBooksCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Autor: {reader["nume"]} {reader["prenume"]}, NumДғr CДғrИӣi: {reader["NumarCarti"]}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 3: SelecteazДғ cДғrИӣile dintr-un anumit gen
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 3: Toate cДғrИӣile din genul 'Roman'.");
                    var selectBooksByGenreCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT titlu FROM Carti WHERE gen = @gen", connection);
                    selectBooksByGenreCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue("@gen", "Roman");
                    using (var reader = selectBooksByGenreCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Titlu: {reader["titlu"]}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 4: SelecteazДғ autorii care au numele Г®ncepГўnd cu litera 'P'
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 4: Autori cu numele de familie Г®ncepГўnd cu 'P'.");
                    var selectAuthorsBySurnameCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT nume, prenume FROM Autori WHERE nume LIKE 'P%'", connection);
                    using (var reader = selectAuthorsBySurnameCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Nume: {reader["nume"]}, Prenume: {reader["prenume"]}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 5: SelecteazДғ Г®mprumuturile Иҷi informaИӣiile despre cДғrИӣile Г®mprumutate
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 5: Detalii despre Г®mprumuturi Иҷi cДғrИӣile asociate.");
                    var selectLoansDetailsCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT Carti.titlu, Imprumuturi.data_imprumut FROM Imprumuturi JOIN Carti ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id", connection);
                    using (var reader = selectLoansDetailsCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            var dataImprumut = Convert.ToDateTime(reader["data_imprumut"]).ToString("d"); // FormateazДғ data ca "dd/MM/yyyy"
                            Console.WriteLine($"Carte: {reader["titlu"]}, Data ГҺmprumut: {dataImprumut}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 6: SelecteazДғ toИӣi utilizatorii Иҷi cДғrИӣile pe care le-au Г®mprumutat
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 6: Utilizatori Иҷi cДғrИӣile Г®mprumutate.");
                    var selectUsersLoansCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu FROM Utilizatori JOIN Imprumuturi ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator JOIN Carti ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id", connection);
                    using (var reader = selectUsersLoansCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Utilizator: {reader["nume"]} {reader["prenume"]}, Carte ГҺmprumutatДғ: {reader["titlu"]}");
                        }
                    }

                    // Interogare 7: SelecteazДғ utilizatorii care nu au returnat cДғrИӣile
                    Console.WriteLine("\nInterogare 7: Utilizatori cu cДғrИӣi neГ®ntoarse.");
                    var selectUnreturnedBooksCommand = new SqlCommand("SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu, Imprumuturi.data_imprumut FROM Utilizatori JOIN Imprumuturi ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator JOIN Carti ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL", connection);
                    using (var reader = selectUnreturnedBooksCommand.ExecuteReader())
                    {
                        while (reader.Read())
                        {
                            var dataImprumut = Convert.ToDateTime(reader["data_imprumut"]).ToString("d"); // FormateazДғ data ca "dd/MM/yyyy"
                            Console.WriteLine($"Utilizator: {reader["nume"]} {reader["prenume"]}, Carte NeГ®ntoarsДғ: {reader["titlu"]}, Data ГҺmprumut: {dataImprumut}");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

Desktop Old\fdsg.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;

public class SawChainController : MonoBehaviour
{
    private Animator animator;
    private bool isGoingUp = false;
    private bool reachedTop = false;
    private bool reachedBottom = false;

    [Header("Platform Settings")]
    public float moveSpeed = 2f; // Maximum speed at which the platform moves
    public float smoothTime = 1f; // Time to reach full speed or stop
    public float positionTolerance = 0.01f; // Tolerance for reaching the target position

    [SerializeField] private Vector3 topPositionOffset; // Top position offset for the lift platform
    [SerializeField] private Vector3 bottomPositionOffset; // Bottom position offset for the lift platform

    [Header("Start Position")]
    public bool startFromBottom = true; // Determine if the platform should start from the bottom

    private Vector3 topPosition; // Actual top position
    private Vector3 bottomPosition; // Actual bottom position

    private void Start()
    {
        animator = GetComponent<Animator>();

        // Calculate actual top and bottom positions based on offsets
        topPosition = transform.position + topPositionOffset;
        bottomPosition = transform.position + bottomPositionOffset;

        if (startFromBottom)
        {
            transform.position = bottomPosition;
            reachedBottom = true;
            reachedTop = false;
            isGoingUp = true;
        }
        else
        {
            transform.position = topPosition;
            reachedTop = true;
            reachedBottom = false;
            isGoingUp = false;
        }

        // Start the movement loop
        StartCoroutine(MovePlatform());
    }

    private IEnumerator MovePlatform()
    {
        while (true)
        {
            if (reachedBottom)
            {
                reachedBottom = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(topPosition));
                reachedTop = true;
                isGoingUp = false;
            }
            else if (reachedTop)
            {
                reachedTop = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(bottomPosition));
                reachedBottom = true;
                isGoingUp = true;
            }
            yield return null;
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator MoveToPosition(Vector3 targetPosition)
    {
        Vector3 startPosition = transform.position;
        float journeyLength = Vector3.Distance(startPosition, targetPosition);
        float startTime = Time.time;

        while (Vector3.Distance(transform.position, targetPosition) > positionTolerance)
        {
            float distanceCovered = (Time.time - startTime) * moveSpeed;
            float fractionOfJourney = distanceCovered / journeyLength;
            float smoothStep = Mathf.SmoothStep(0, 1, fractionOfJourney);

            transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(startPosition, targetPosition, smoothStep);
            yield return null;
        }
    }

    private void FixedUpdate()
    {
        // Update animator parameters
        animator.SetBool("IsGoingUp", isGoingUp);
        animator.SetBool("ReachedTop", reachedTop);
        animator.SetBool("ReachedBottom", reachedBottom);
    }

    private void OnDrawGizmos()
    {
        // Calculate actual top and bottom positions based on current position and offsets
        Vector3 gizmoTopPosition = Application.isPlaying ? topPosition : transform.position + topPositionOffset;
        Vector3 gizmoBottomPosition = Application.isPlaying ? bottomPosition : transform.position + bottomPositionOffset;

        Gizmos.color = Color.green;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoTopPosition, 0.1f);
        Gizmos.DrawLine(transform.position, gizmoTopPosition);

        Gizmos.color = Color.red;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoBottomPosition, 0.1f);
        Gizmos.DrawLine(transform.position, gizmoBottomPosition);
    }
}

```

#include "mainwindow.h"
#include "./ui_mainwindow.h"
#include <QDebug>  // Include for debug output

MainWindow::MainWindow(QWidget *parent)
    : QMainWindow(parent)
    , ui(new Ui::MainWindow)
{
    ui->setupUi(this);
    ui->mainDisplay->setReadOnly(true);

    // Initialize variables
    firstValue = 0.0;
    secondValue = 0.0;
    currentOperator = "";
    lastResult = 0.0;  // Initialize lastResult
    isNewEntry = true;
    lastPressedOperator = false;
    lastPressedOperand = false;  // Initialize lastPressedOperand
    QString mainText;

    // Set the mainDisplay to "0" when the app starts
    mainText = "0";  // Initially empty
    // Hide the mainDisplay when the app starts


    // Connect digit buttons to slots
    connect(ui->button0, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onDigitButtonClicked);
    connect(ui->button1, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onDigitButtonClicked);

    connect(ui->buttonMinus, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onOperatorButtonClicked);
    connect(ui->buttonMultiply, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onOperatorButtonClicked);
    connect(ui->buttonDivide, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onOperatorButtonClicked);

    connect(ui->buttonEquals, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onEqualsButtonClicked);

    // Connect clear button to slot
    connect(ui->buttonClear, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onClearButtonClicked);

    // Connect dot button to slot
    connect(ui->buttonDot, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::onDotButtonClicked);

MainWindow::~MainWindow()
{
    delete ui;
}

// Function to calculate and return the result
double MainWindow::calculateResult()
{
    double result = 0.0;

    if (currentOperator == "+") {
        result = firstValue + secondValue;
    } else if (currentOperator == "-") {
        result = firstValue - secondValue;
    } else if (currentOperator == "*") {
        result = firstValue * secondValue;
    } else if (currentOperator == "/") {
        if (secondValue != 0.0) {
            result = firstValue / secondValue;
        } else {
            mainText = "Error";
            qDebug() << "Error: Division by zero";
            return 0.0;
        }
    } else {
        // If no operator is selected, return the firstValue
        result = firstValue;
    }

    return result;
}

// Function to print expression and result
void MainWindow::printExpressionAndResult()
{
    double result = calculateResult();
    QString expressionStr;

    if (currentOperator.isEmpty()) {
        expressionStr = QString::number(firstValue);
    } else {
        expressionStr = QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue);
    }

    qDebug() << "Expression: " << expressionStr;
    qDebug() << "Result: " << result;
    lastResult = result;
}

void MainWindow::onDigitButtonClicked()
{
    QPushButton *button = qobject_cast<QPushButton*>(sender());
    QString digit = button->text();

    // If the last action was pressing '=', reset the expression
    if (!lastPressedOperator && !lastPressedOperand) {
        firstValue = digit.toDouble();  // Set firstValue to the new digit
        secondValue = 0.0;  // Reset secondValue
        currentOperator = "";  // Clear the operator
        mainText = digit;  // mainDisplay the new digit
        isNewEntry = true;  // Mark as new entry
    } else {
        // If the last pressed button was an operator, start a new entry
        if (lastPressedOperator) {
            mainText = digit;
            lastPressedOperator = false;
            isNewEntry = false;
        } else {
            // Append the new digit to the existing number
            mainText = mainText + digit;
        }
    }


    // Update the current value based on the mainDisplay
    if (currentOperator.isEmpty()) {
        firstValue = mainText.toDouble();
    } else {
        secondValue = mainText.toDouble();
    }

    lastPressedOperand = true;  // Mark as operand pressed
    // Print the expression and result to the console
    printExpressionAndResult();
}


void MainWindow::onOperatorButtonClicked()
{
    QPushButton *button = qobject_cast<QPushButton*>(sender());
    QString newOperator = button->text();

    if (!currentOperator.isEmpty() && lastPressedOperator == false) {
        // After '=', use the last result for the next operation
        firstValue = lastResult;
        secondValue = firstValue;
    }
    else if (!currentOperator.isEmpty() && lastPressedOperator == false) {
        // Calculate the result if there's already an operator and the last button pressed wasn't an operator
        firstValue = calculateResult();
    }

    // If the last action was not '=', reset the second operand to match the first operand
    else if (!currentOperator.isEmpty() && lastPressedOperator) {
        secondValue = firstValue;
    }     // Check if the last action was '=', and update the operands accordingly


    else {
        secondValue = firstValue;
    }



    // Update the operator
    currentOperator = newOperator;

    // mainDisplay the expression as "firstValue operator firstValue"
    mainText = QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue);

    lastPressedOperator = true;

    // Print the expression and result to the console
    printExpressionAndResult();
}




void MainWindow::onEqualsButtonClicked()
{
    if (!currentOperator.isEmpty()) {
        // Perform the calculation
        double result = calculateResult();

        // Update the mainDisplay to show the full expression, not just the result
        mainText = QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue);

        // Print the expression and result to the console
        printExpressionAndResult();

        // After showing the result, continue with the last operator and operand for next calculations
        firstValue = result;
        // Keep secondValue as is, so it can be reused with the same operator
    }

    lastPressedOperand = false;
    lastPressedOperator = false;  // Set this to false as the last action is now pressing '='
}


void MainWindow::onClearButtonClicked()
{
    firstValue = 0.0;
    secondValue = 0.0;
    currentOperator = "";
    mainText = "0";
    isNewEntry = true;
    lastPressedOperator = false;

    // Print the cleared state to the console
    qDebug() << "Expression cleared.";
}

void MainWindow::onDotButtonClicked()
{
    if (!mainText.contains(".")) {
        mainText = mainText + ".";
    }
}

    } else if (currentOperator == "-") {
        result = firstValue - secondValue;
    } else if (currentOperator == "*") {

    else if (!currentOperator.isEmpty() && lastPressedOperator == false) {
        // Calculate the result if there's already an operator and the last button pressed wasn't an operator
        firstValue = calculateResult();
    }

    // If the last action was not '=', reset the second operand to match the first operand
    else if (!currentOperator.isEmpty() && lastPressedOperator) {
        secondValue = firstValue;
    }     // Check if the last action was '=', and update the operands accordingly

        secondValue = firstValue;
    }

    currentOperator = newOperator;

    //ui->mainDisplay->setText(QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue));

    lastPressedOperator = true;

    // Print the expression and result to the console

void MainWindow::onEqualsButtonClicked()
{
    if (!currentOperator.isEmpty()) {
        // Perform the calculation
        double result = calculateResult();

        // Update the display to show the full expression, not just the result
        //ui->mainDisplay->setText(QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue));

        // Print the expression and result to the console
        printExpressionAndResult();

        // After showing the result, continue with the last operator and operand for next calculations
        firstValue = result;
        // Keep secondValue as is, so it can be reused with the same operator
    }

    lastPressedOperand = false;
    lastPressedOperator = false;  // Set this to false as the last action is now pressing '='
    lastPressedEqual = true;

    updateDisplays();
}


void MainWindow::onClearButtonClicked()
{
    firstValue = 0.0;
    secondValue = 0.0;
    currentOperator = "";
    // ui->mainDisplay->setText("0");
    isNewEntry = true;
    lastPressedOperator = false;

    // Print the cleared state to the console
    qDebug() << "Expression cleared.";

    updateDisplays();

void MainWindow::onDotButtonClicked()
{
    if (!ui->mainDisplay->text().contains(".")) {
        //ui->mainDisplay->setText(ui->mainDisplay->text() + ".");
    }
}

void MainWindow::updateDisplays()
{
    double result = calculateResult();
    QString expressionStr;

    if (currentOperator.isEmpty()) {
        expressionStr = QString::number(firstValue);
    } else {
        expressionStr = QString::number(firstValue) + " " + currentOperator + " " + QString::number(secondValue);
    }
    // Extract the operator and operands from the expressionStr
    QStringList expressionParts = expressionStr.split(" ");
    QString leftOperand = expressionParts[0];
    QString operatorSymbol = (expressionParts.size() > 1) ? expressionParts[1] : "";
    QString rightOperand = (expressionParts.size() > 2) ? expressionParts[2] : "";



    // Update exDisplay based on the expression
    if (operatorSymbol.isEmpty()) {
        ui->exDisplay->setText("");  // No operator, exDisplay should be empty
    } else if (!lastPressedEqual) {
        ui->exDisplay->setText(leftOperand + " " + operatorSymbol);  // Show left operand and operator
    } else {
        ui->exDisplay->setText(expressionStr + " =");  // Show full expression followed by '='
    }

    // Update mainDisplay based on the result
    if (operatorSymbol.isEmpty()) {
        //ui->mainDisplay->setText(QString::number(result));  // No operator, show the result (which is the only operand)
    } else if (!lastPressedEqual) {
        ui->mainDisplay->setText(rightOperand);  // Show the right operand
    } else {
        ui->mainDisplay->setText(QString::number(result));  // Show the result after '='
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel;

using System.Drawing;

using System.Text;

using System.Windows.Forms;

namespace WindowsFormsApp1
{
    public partial class Form1 : Form
    {
        public Form1()
        {
            InitializeComponent();

            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 1: Select all books by an author with ID 1.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 2: Retrieve authors and the number of books written by each.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 3: Select all books of genre Poezie.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 4: Retrieve authors with surnames starting with 'P'.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 5: Fetch details about loans and associated book information.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 6: Retrieve users and the books they have borrowed.");
            comboBoxQueries.Items.Add("Query 7: Find users who have not returned borrowed books.");

            comboBoxQueries.SelectedIndex = 0; // Set the default selected item
        }

        private void Form1_Load(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {

        }

        private void btnCreateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.CreateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables created Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void btnPopulateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.PopulateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Populated Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }

        private void btnUpdateTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.UpdateTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Updated Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void btnQueryTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                string query = GetSelectedQuery(comboBoxQueries.SelectedIndex);
                DataTable dataTable = DatabaseHelper.ExecuteQueryAndReturnDataTable(query);
                dataGridView1.DataSource = dataTable;

                MessageBox.Show("Query executed successfully.");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private string GetSelectedQuery(int selectedIndex)
        {
            string query = string.Empty;
            int authorId = 1; // Example author ID, adjust as needed
            string genre = "Poezie"; // Example genre, adjust as needed

            switch (selectedIndex)
            {
                case 0:
                    query = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE id_autor = {authorId};";
                    break;
                case 1:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Autori.nume, Autori.prenume, COUNT(Carti.id) AS NumberOfBooks
                    FROM [dbo].[Autori]
                    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Autori.id = Carti.id_autor
                    GROUP BY Autori.nume, Autori.prenume;";
                    break;
                case 2:
                    query = $"SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Carti] WHERE gen = '{genre}';";
                    break;
                case 3:
                    query = "SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Autori] WHERE prenume LIKE 'P%';";
                    break;
                case 4:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Imprumuturi.*, Carti.titlu, Carti.gen
                    FROM [dbo].[Imprumuturi]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    break;
                case 5:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id;";
                    break;
                case 6:
                    query = @"
                    SELECT Utilizatori.nume, Utilizatori.prenume, Carti.titlu
                    FROM [dbo].[Utilizatori]
                    JOIN [dbo].[Imprumuturi] ON Utilizatori.id = Imprumuturi.id_utilizator
                    JOIN [dbo].[Carti] ON Imprumuturi.id_carte = Carti.id
                    WHERE Imprumuturi.data_returnare IS NULL;";
                    break;
            }
            return query;
        }

        private void btnRemoveTables_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                DatabaseHelper.WipeAndDeleteAllTables();
                MessageBox.Show("Tables Removed Successfully");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("An error occurred: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }

        {

        }

    }
}

Desktop Old\GoodScript.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;

public class FallingPlatformController : MonoBehaviour
{
    private Animator animator;
    private bool isPlayerOnPlatform = false;
    private bool isGroundedOnPlatform = false;
    private Rigidbody2D rb;
    private Vector3 initialPosition;

    [Header("Platform Settings")]
    public float fallDelay = 1f; // Delay before the platform falls
    public float initialBumpDistance = 0.2f; // Distance for the initial downward bump
    public float initialBumpDuration = 0.1f; // Duration of the initial bump down and up
    public float repeatedBumpDistance = 0.05f; // Distance for the repeated smaller bumps
    public float repeatedBumpDuration = 0.05f; // Duration of the repeated bumps down and up

    private PlayerController playerController;

    private void Start()
    {
        animator = GetComponent<Animator>();
        rb = GetComponent<Rigidbody2D>();
        initialPosition = transform.position;

        // Ensure the platform starts in the "On" state
        animator.Play("On");
        rb.bodyType = RigidbodyType2D.Kinematic; // Initially kinematic
    }

    private void FixedUpdate()
    {
        isGroundedOnPlatform = playerController != null && playerController.IsGrounded() && playerController.groundCheck.IsGroundedOn().Contains("FanGround");
        if (isGroundedOnPlatform && !isPlayerOnPlatform)
        {
            isPlayerOnPlatform = true;
            StartCoroutine(BumpPlatform());
        }
        else if (!isGroundedOnPlatform)
        {
            isPlayerOnPlatform = false;
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator BumpPlatform()
    {
        // Initial bump
        Vector3 bumpTarget = initialPosition - new Vector3(0, initialBumpDistance, 0);
        yield return LerpPosition(transform.position, bumpTarget, initialBumpDuration);
        yield return LerpPosition(bumpTarget, initialPosition, initialBumpDuration);

        // Repeated smaller bumps
        float elapsed = 0f;
        while (elapsed < fallDelay)
        {
            bumpTarget = initialPosition - new Vector3(0, repeatedBumpDistance, 0);
            yield return LerpPosition(transform.position, bumpTarget, repeatedBumpDuration);
            yield return LerpPosition(bumpTarget, initialPosition, repeatedBumpDuration);
            elapsed += 2 * repeatedBumpDuration; // Account for both the down and up durations
        }

        // Make the platform fall
        rb.bodyType = RigidbodyType2D.Dynamic; // Make the platform fall
        rb.gravityScale = 3.5f; // Set gravity scale
        rb.freezeRotation = true; // Freeze Z rotation
        animator.Play("Off"); // Change to "Off" state
    }

    private IEnumerator LerpPosition(Vector3 start, Vector3 end, float duration)
    {
        float time = 0f;
        while (time < duration)
        {
            transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(start, end, time / duration);
            time += Time.deltaTime;
            yield return null;
        }
        transform.position = end;
    }

    private void OnTriggerEnter2D(Collider2D collider)
    {
        if (collider.CompareTag("Player"))
        {
            playerController = collider.GetComponent<PlayerController>();
        }
    }

    private void OnTriggerExit2D(Collider2D collider)
    {
        if (collider.CompareTag("Player"))
        {
            playerController = null;
        }
    }
}

```

Desktop Old\good_cond - Copy.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Audio;

[System.Serializable]
public class MusicClipInfo
{
    public string key;
    public AudioClip introClip; // Intro part of the music
    public AudioClip loopClip;  // Looping part of the music
    public float volume = 1.0f;
}

public class AudioManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public static AudioManager Instance { get; private set; }

    public AudioMixerGroup musicGroup;
    public List<MusicClipInfo> soundtrackClips;

    private Dictionary<string, MusicClipInfo> musicClipDictionary;
    private AudioSource musicAudioSource;
    private string currentMusicKey = null;

    private void Awake()
    {
        if (Instance == null)
        {
            Instance = this;
            DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
            InitializeMusicClipDictionary();
            InitializeMusicAudioSource();
        }
        else
        {
            Destroy(gameObject);
            return;
        }
    }

    private void InitializeMusicClipDictionary()
    {
        musicClipDictionary = new Dictionary<string, MusicClipInfo>();
        foreach (var musicClipInfo in soundtrackClips)
        {
            musicClipDictionary[musicClipInfo.key] = musicClipInfo;
        }
    }

    private void InitializeMusicAudioSource()
    {
        GameObject musicObject = new GameObject("MusicAudioSource");
        musicObject.transform.SetParent(transform);
        musicAudioSource = musicObject.AddComponent<AudioSource>();
        musicAudioSource.outputAudioMixerGroup = musicGroup;
        musicAudioSource.volume = 1.0f;
    }

    // Play the selected music
    public void PlayMusic(string key)
    {
        if (currentMusicKey == key)
        {
            // Already playing this music, do nothing
            return;
        }

        StopMusic(); // Stop any currently playing music

        currentMusicKey = key;

        if (musicClipDictionary.TryGetValue(key, out MusicClipInfo musicClipInfo))
        {
            StartCoroutine(PlayMusicCoroutine(musicClipInfo));
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning($"Music clip with key '{key}' not found!");
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator PlayMusicCoroutine(MusicClipInfo musicClipInfo)
    {
        float volume = musicClipInfo.volume;

        if (musicClipInfo.introClip != null && musicClipInfo.loopClip != null)
        {
            // Both intro and loop clips are provided
            double startTime = AudioSettings.dspTime + (1.0 / AudioSettings.outputSampleRate); // Schedule as soon as possible

            // Set up intro clip
            musicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.introClip;
            musicAudioSource.volume = volume;
            musicAudioSource.loop = false;
            musicAudioSource.PlayScheduled(startTime);

            // Calculate when the intro will finish
            double introEndTime = startTime + (double)musicClipInfo.introClip.samples / musicClipInfo.introClip.frequency;

            // Schedule the loop clip to start exactly when the intro ends
            musicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.loopClip;
            musicAudioSource.loop = true;
            musicAudioSource.PlayScheduled(introEndTime);
        }
        else if (musicClipInfo.loopClip != null)
        {
            // Only loop clip is provided, play and loop it
            musicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.loopClip;
            musicAudioSource.loop = true;
            musicAudioSource.volume = volume;
            musicAudioSource.Play();
        }
        else if (musicClipInfo.introClip != null)
        {
            // Only intro clip is provided, play it once
            musicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.introClip;
            musicAudioSource.loop = false;
            musicAudioSource.volume = volume;
            musicAudioSource.Play();
        }

        yield return null;
    }

    public void StopMusic()
    {
        musicAudioSource.Stop();
        currentMusicKey = null;
    }
}

Desktop Old\grafuri.txt:
```
#include <iostream>
using namespace std;

const int N = 10; // Dimensiunea maxima a matricei de adiacenta
const bool orientat = true;

void adaugaMuchie(int graf[N][N], int u, int v, bool orientat = false) {
    graf[u][v] = 1; // Adauga o muchie de la u la vc
    if (!orientat) {
        graf[v][u] = 1; // Adauga si invers pentru grafuri neorientate
    }
}

void afiseazaMatriceAdiacenta(int graf[N][N], int n) {
    cout << "Matricea de adiacenta:\n";
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) {
            cout << graf[i][j] << " ";
        }
        cout << "\n";
    }
}

void afiseazaMuchii(int graf[N][N], int n, bool orientat = false) {
    cout << "Lista de muchii:\n";
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = orientat ? 1 : i + 1; j <= n; j++) {
            if (graf[i][j]) {
                cout << "(" << i << ", " << j << ")\n";
            }
        }
    }
}

int numaraMuchii(int graf[N][N], int n, bool orientat = false) {
    int numarMuchii = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        for (int j = orientat ? 1 : i + 1; j <= n; j++) {
            if (graf[i][j]) {
                numarMuchii++;
            }
        }
    }
    return numarMuchii;
}

void citesteGrafDeLaTastatura(int graf[N][N], int& numarNoduri, bool orientat = false) {
   //cout << "Introdu muchiile sub forma 'nod_start nod_sfarsit', introdu 0 0 pentru a termina:\n";
    int u, v;
    while (true) {
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u == 0 && v == 0) break;
        adaugaMuchie(graf, u, v, orientat);
    }
}

int main() {
    int graf[N][N] = { 0 }; // Initializarea matricei de adiacenta cu 0
    int numarNoduri;
    cin >> numarNoduri;
    citesteGrafDeLaTastatura(graf, numarNoduri, orientat);
    cout << endl;
    afiseazaMatriceAdiacenta(graf, numarNoduri);
    cout << endl;
    afiseazaMuchii(graf, numarNoduri, orientat);
    cout << endl;
    // Afisarea numarului de muchii
    cout << "Numarul de muchii in graf: " << numaraMuchii(graf, numarNoduri, orientat) << endl;
    return 0;
}

Desktop Old\How_to_make_a_2D_OUTLINE_in_Unity__MqpyXhBIRSw_140.txt:
```
And before we get started, you want to make sure that you're using URP and that your project is set up to use the 2D renderer. If you're unsure how to do that, you can go ahead and watch our previous video on setting up Shader Graph for 2D. Again, a link for that in the description. All right, so I want to go ahead and give my player an outline. So to do that, let's start by going to the project here, and let's go under Shader, 2D Renderer, and create a sprite on Lit Graph. If you still want your sprite to receive lighting, you can choose Lit Graph instead. It's really not going to change anything. But I'm going to choose on Lit here, and I'm going to name it simply Sprite Outline. I'm also just going to right-click on this shader and create a material based on it. Let's call this Player, and I'm simply going to drag it onto my player object. And right away, we can see that our player turns into a white box. The reason for this is that our shader is currently completely empty, and so our player doesn't know what sprite to show. Let's go ahead and change this by opening up our sprite outline shader, and I'm actually just going to turn this into a full-screen window here. And as you can see in here, all we have is this empty master node. So let's go ahead and load our default sprite sheet into this node. To do that, we need to create a new property of type Texture2D, and let's call it Main Text. And in order for Unity to automatically input the right sprite, we need to set the reference here to exactly underscore Main Text. Again, we've talked about this in previous videos on Shader Graph, but this is just a value that Unity searches for, and make sure that this Main Text here is always going to display our sprite. Then we can convert this value here. So we'll put it into a Sample Texture node in order to convert it from a texture into an RGBA channel. And we can then take this into the color input of our master node. And right now, we don't really see anything happening in here, but that's just because we need to set a default texture here. So I'm simply going to hit Default, and I'm just going to input the Player Sprite Sheet. And right away, we can see that it loads into our Sample Texture. And under our Main Preview, if we right-click here and change to Quad, we can clearly see all the sprites making up our player. And if we save this asset and go back to our Scene View, we can clearly see that our player is currently showing up. In other words, Unity is now automatically loading the right sprite from our sprite renderer into our shader, as you can see right here. Now with that set up, we're ready to create our outline. And as we talked about, this starts by making a copy of our normal texture. So we'll take these two nodes here, hit Ctrl-C and Ctrl-V in order to duplicate them. And we're going to go ahead and offset this copy of the texture to the left.
 To do that, we need a tiling and offset node. So we'll hit space, search for tiling and offset, and we can then take the output of this node and put it into the UVs of our sample texture node. What this does is allow us to offset both the tiling of our sheet. As you can see here, we can stretch it in and out, and it also allows us to adjust the offset. And that's exactly what we want to do. We want to offset this a tiny bit to the left. So to do that, let's input a tiny value, something like 0.005. Of course, this value is going to depend on your sprite sheet. And now these two textures here are going to be slightly different. And because of that, what we can actually do is subtract one from the other. So if we take the alpha of our offset node here and put it into a subtract node, we can then take the alpha of our normal texture here and also put it into that subtract node. And what this does is actually show us the difference between these two textures. In other words, we're only seeing the outline, the part of these two textures that aren't the same. And this is giving us kind of the drop shadow effect. What we can then do with this is multiply it with some colours. Let's take the output of this, put it into a multiply node, and let's take some kind of colour node here, so colour, and put that into the other input. And as for the colour here, we want to go ahead and pick a bright colour. I'm just going to choose some kind of bright orange here. And you also want to make sure, and this is very important, that you set the alpha all the way to the top. This way we make sure that our outline won't be transparent. And now that we have our coloured outline here, or it's currently just a drop shadow, but you get the point, what we can do is add this back onto our original texture and then input it into our master node. So let's go ahead and instead of just going directly here, let's take this signal and add it together with our drop shadow, and take the output of that and put it into our master. And right away you can see we have this bright orange outline on the left side of our character. In fact, we should be able to go ahead and just save this asset, go into Unity, and voila, we can now see this bright outline on part of our character. Now, there might be a few things that are preventing this from working on your system, depending on your setup. So we need to make sure that we follow certain guidelines. The first one is that we need to make sure that we leave some room around our sprite. The reason for this is that when working with sprites and shaders in 2D, we can actually only display things inside of these borders. In fact, we can preview this by going into wireframe mode. And as you can see, our sprite here is pretty much just a 2D quad that we are drawing a bunch of colour data onto. And so if this isn't big enough, we won't be able to see the actual outline. So how do you leave room around your sprite? Well, you make sure that when you are designing your sprite that you have plenty of room around it. And if you're working with multiple sprites, like I am here, when you go into the sprite editor and slice your sprites, you need to make sure that you leave plenty of room around each individual one. As you can see, I've done that here, so I have no problem displaying the outline. And sometimes when you're working with just a single sprite, like I have this ninja character here, again, this is freely available on the asset store, link in the description. Unity is actually going to go ahead and cut the geometry of this 2D mesh to kind of fit the sprite. And in most cases, this is fine, but if you want to make sure that you can have an outline around your character that might not fit too well. See, if we go into wireframe mode on this character, we can see that the mesh is actually fitted to the character. So to turn that off, we can simply select the character and change the mesh type from tight to full-ranged. And as you can see, now it displays the entire image of our character. And if we go back into shaded, our character still remains the same. So that's a workaround for that. And the final thing that you want to make sure is that your sprite sheet is completely square. If your sprite sheet is stretched in one direction, it's actually going to go ahead and stretch the outline as well. So just something to keep in mind. Now with this, we can go ahead and add some more stuff to our shader. So let's open up our shader. And the first thing that we want to do is control the thickness. And this is done by simply adjusting the offset. So to be able to do this inside of the material, let's create a vector one property. Let's call it thickness. And let's default it to 0.005. We can also change the mode here from default to slider. And this way we can choose two values that we can go between. I'm going to set it between zero and 0.05. Then let's take this thickness value and drag it in here. And now we can just input it directly because we only want the thickness to control the offset on the X. So let's instead go from the thickness into a vector two. And here we can have the thickness going to the X component.
 we can leave the Y component at zero and then take the output of that onto the offset. And that should allow us to control the thickness through the material. Now let's go ahead and do the same thing for colour, but we already have a colour node here, so let's simply right click on this and convert it to a property. And that is simply going to put a property up here in our outline called colour. Let's also go ahead and change the mode here from default to HDR, which is going to allow us to input higher intensity values to make our outline glow. And with these changes, let's go ahead and save our asset. And if we now select our player material, as you can see, we have a slider here adjusting the thickness, as well as a colour value that we can change and even bump up the intensity on to make it glow. Of course, whenever you're working with glow, you also need to make sure that you have a bloom post-processing effect enabled. We have a whole video dedicated to glow in case you're interested. So now that our effect is working, let's go ahead and copy it to the other directions, starting with the right side. And doing this is actually super simple because we can take this entire section and just duplicate it. So let's move this out and let's remove this connection here. And let's instead take all of these nodes right here, hit Control C and Control V to duplicate them. Let's move them down here. And we can now take the thickness here. And instead of just inputting this directly into the X of our secondary group of nodes here, we want to make sure to reverse this to the other side. So if we move 0.005 to the left here, we want to move negative 0.005 to the right over here. And we're going to, of course, do this by just multiplying with minus one. And of course, that's a handy node for this. So let's go from our thickness into a negate node. Again, this just multiplies with minus one. And then from this node into our X. And what we now have is both the left and right side of our outline. And what we can simply do is add these two together. So let's take the alpha of our left side, go into an add node. Let's take the alpha of our right side, go into the same add node. And this might be a bit hard to see, but we now have the same sprite kind of shifted to each side. Now from here, you might think, well, let's just go straight into the subtract. But since we are adding values together here, some of these are actually going to be above one. And we want to make sure that our alpha always stays between zero and one. So to do that, we go from the output here into a clamp node. And we're just going to clamp the values between zero and one. So anything that's larger is just going to be one. Anything that's less is just going to be zero. It's a very simple node, but it's just going to make sure that when we subtract these two, nothing weird is going to happen. And we can now see that we have an outline on both the left and right side of our character. Really cool. And I'm just going to go ahead and sort these nodes so that they don't look as confusing. And just like we've done the left and the right side, we can actually take all of these nodes here and copy them in order to create up and down. And the only thing that we need to change here is instead of going from the thickness to our X, we'll go from the thickness to our Y here. And the same thing down here, except we go from our thickness to our negate node. And then from the negate node, instead of going to X, we go to Y. And that's pretty much it. So we can now take these two values and add them together. So we'll go into an add node here to add our two up and down directions together. And we can then add these two together. So we'll go into yet another add node here. And that now has all of the directions added together, left, right, up and down. And then finally, we'll go from this into our clamp, which goes to subtract, multiply with some colour, and then add everything back together. And right away, we can see that in our preview, our outline is now all the way around our character. And if we save this asset and go back into Unity, voila, our character indeed has an outline that goes all the way around. Awesome. And we can, of course, go ahead and adjust the thickness of this in any way that we'd like. We can adjust the colour of this and the glow amount. So there's plenty of opportunity to have fun with this. Of course, you will notice that if you go ahead and make the outline really large, like I do here, our technique will kind of start to falter because we can start seeing the individual copies of the sprite. An easy fix for this is to just create more copies diagonally, which will kind of help fill this out. But I'm just going to be completely honest, it is more of a hacky fix than it is a solution. Unfortunately, that's often how it is with shaders. But I'd say for most cases, this is going to work just fine. I think this outline is as thick as I wanted on this character. Now, if we zoom in here, we'll actually notice that this outline is a bit uneven. Some parts are brighter than others. In this case, I actually think it looks
 pretty cool, but you might just want a completely solid outline. Now, this doesn't always happen, but as you can see, sometimes the sprite sheet gets laid out in such a way that there's a bunch of colour around the actual character. That's the weird colour glitching we see here. I haven't been able to find out why this happens, so if any of you know something about this, definitely let us know in the comments. But luckily, there is an easy fix for this. What we can do is simply use the fact that we have an alpha channel and multiply it into the different colour channels in order to get rid of all this colour surrounding it. In other words, before we add all this stuff together, we'll take our colour channels and multiply them together with our alpha channel in order to remove all of the stuff around the character. Now, that's just blank. And this is great, but since we have the alpha as part of this 4 channel, we're kind of right now multiplying the alpha with itself, and we don't want to do that. So we'll take the output of this, go into a split node. We'll go from the split node into a combined node. So we'll take the red to red, green to green, blue to blue. And then instead of using the alpha here, we'll go from the alpha of our sample texture into our combined node instead. There we go. And we can then go from our combined node into the add down here. So just a tiny extra step. All we're really doing here is just making sure to remove all of the colour around our player by multiplying it with our alpha and then making sure our alpha still stays the same throughout this step. But the result of this is that if we go ahead and save our asset and now go into Unity, we can see that our outline is now completely even. So it's not going to be influenced by how our sprite sheet is actually laid out. And that's actually it for our outline. We can now go ahead and choose a colour that we think looks nice. We can, of course, play around with the intensity. And if we go ahead and hit play, we can move our character around and the outline is going to follow all of the animations. Awesome. That's pretty much it for this video. If you enjoyed it, make sure to subscribe and ring that notification bell so you don't miss the next one. Also, don't forget to check out NVIDIA Studio. If you want to optimize your creative workflow and speed up your processes, simply click the link in the description to check out NVIDIA's line of products. On that, thanks for watching and I will see you in the next video. Thanks to all of the awesome Patreon supporters who donated in March. Desktop Old\jkhgf.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;

public class BlueBirdEnemyController : Enemy
{
    [Header("Initial Settings")]
    public bool faceLeft = false; // Inspector field to set the initial facing direction
    public bool startFromEnd = false; // Inspector field to set if the bird starts from the end position

    [Header("Movement Settings")]
    public Vector3 startPositionOffset; // Start position offset for the bird
    public Vector3 endPositionOffset; // End position offset for the bird
    public float smoothTime = 1f; // Time to reach full speed or stop
    public float positionTolerance = 0.01f; // Tolerance for reaching the target position

    [Header("Floating Settings")]
    public float floatingAmplitude = 0.25f; // Amplitude of the floating effect
    public float floatingFrequency = 14f; // Frequency of the floating effect
    public float upwardForce = 5f; // The force applied upwards when propelling
    public float floatingStartLifetime = 0.0f; // Start time for the floating effect

    private Vector3 startPosition; // Actual start position
    private Vector3 endPosition; // Actual end position
    private bool isGoingToEnd = false;
    private bool reachedStart = false;
    private bool reachedEnd = false;
    private float baseY; // Base Y position for sinusoidal movement

    protected override void InitializeEnemy()
    {
        // Set initial facing direction based on faceLeft
        facingRight = !faceLeft;
        if (!faceLeft)
        {
            Flip(); // Ensure the sprite is facing the correct direction if starting to move left
        }

        // Calculate actual start and end positions based on offsets
        startPosition = transform.position + startPositionOffset;
        endPosition = transform.position + endPositionOffset;
        baseY = transform.position.y;

        // Set initial state
        if (startFromEnd)
        {
            transform.position = endPosition;
            reachedEnd = true;
            reachedStart = false;
            isGoingToEnd = false;
        }
        else
        {
            transform.position = startPosition;
            reachedStart = true;
            reachedEnd = false;
            isGoingToEnd = true;
        }

        // Start the movement loop
        StartCoroutine(MovePlatform());
    }

    protected override void CheckForObstacles()
    {
        // No obstacle checking for the bird
    }

    private IEnumerator MovePlatform()
    {
        while (true)
        {
            if (reachedStart)
            {
                reachedStart = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(endPosition));
                reachedEnd = true;
                isGoingToEnd = false;
                Flip();
            }
            else if (reachedEnd)
            {
                reachedEnd = false;
                yield return StartCoroutine(MoveToPosition(startPosition));
                reachedStart = true;
                isGoingToEnd = true;
                Flip();
            }
            yield return null;
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator MoveToPosition(Vector3 targetPosition)
    {
        Vector3 initialPosition = transform.position;
        float journeyLength = Mathf.Abs(targetPosition.x - initialPosition.x);
        float startTime = Time.time;

        while (Mathf.Abs(transform.position.x - targetPosition.x) > positionTolerance)
        {
            float distanceCovered = (Time.time - startTime) * moveSpeed;
            float fractionOfJourney = distanceCovered / journeyLength;
            float smoothStep = Mathf.SmoothStep(0, 1, fractionOfJourney);

            // Calculate the new x position using linear interpolation
            float newX = Mathf.Lerp(initialPosition.x, targetPosition.x, smoothStep);

            // Calculate the new y position using sinusoidal movement with offset
            float elapsedTime = (Time.time - startTime) + floatingStartLifetime;
            float newY = baseY + Mathf.Sin(elapsedTime * floatingFrequency) * floatingAmplitude;

            // Set the new position
            transform.position = new Vector3(newX, newY, transform.position.z);

            yield return null;
        }

        // Ensure the final position is exactly the target position
        transform.position = new Vector3(targetPosition.x, transform.position.y, transform.position.z);
    }

    public void PropulseUpward()
    {
        // Apply upward force for floating effect
        rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, upwardForce);
    }

    private void OnDrawGizmos()
    {
        // Calculate actual start and end positions based on current position and offsets
        Vector3 gizmoStartPosition = Application.isPlaying ? startPosition : transform.position + startPositionOffset;
        Vector3 gizmoEndPosition = Application.isPlaying ? endPosition : transform.position + endPositionOffset;

        Gizmos.color = Color.green;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoStartPosition, 0.1f);

        Gizmos.color = Color.red;
        Gizmos.DrawSphere(gizmoEndPosition, 0.1f);

        // Draw yellow line between start and end positions
        Gizmos.color = Color.yellow;
        Gizmos.DrawLine(gizmoStartPosition, gizmoEndPosition);
    }
}

import com.example.youtubeconverter.ui.theme.MP4ToMP3ConverterTheme
import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
