Desktop Old\new37.txt:
```
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <time.h>
#include <windows.h>  // API Windows
#include <conio.h>    // _kbhit(), _getch()

// CONSTANTE SI MACRO
#define LUNGIME_MAXIMA       256
#define RASPUNSURI_MAXIME      4
#define LUNGIME_NUME_JUCATOR  50
#define NR_MAXIM_JUCATORI      100  // Capacitate maxima scorboard

// STRUCTURI
typedef struct {
    char text[LUNGIME_MAXIMA];                  // Textul intrebarii
    char optiuni[RASPUNSURI_MAXIME][LUNGIME_MAXIMA];  // Variantele de raspuns (A, B, C, D)
    char raspunsCorect;                     // Raspunsul corect (A/B/C/D)
    char dificultate[10];                    // Dificultatea (ex. "usor", "mediu", "greu")
    char domeniu[50];                        // Domeniul (ex. "politica", "geografie")
} Intrebare;

typedef struct {
    char nume[LUNGIME_NUME_JUCATOR];
    int scor;
} Jucator;

// INTREBARILE (hardcodate in cod)

static Intrebare setIntrebari[] = {
    {
        "Ce reprezinta acronimul 'RSA' in criptografie?",
        { "A) Rivest-Shamir-Adleman", "B) Random Secure Algorithm", "C) Reversible Substitution Algorithm", "D) Randomized Symmetric Approach" },
        'A',
        "usor",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este o cheie publica in criptografie?",
        { "A) O cheie folosita pentru criptare", "B) O cheie folosita pentru decriptare", "C) O cheie folosita atat pentru criptare cat si pentru decriptare", "D) O cheie secreta" },
        'A',
        "usor",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este functia hash?",
        { "A) O functie care cripteaza datele", "B) O functie care genereaza un rezumat de lungime fixa din date de orice dimensiune", "C) O functie care decripteaza datele", "D) O functie care genereaza chei criptografice" },
        'B',
        "mediu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce reprezinta criptografia simetrica?",
        { "A) Foloseste o singura cheie pentru criptare si decriptare", "B) Foloseste o pereche de chei, publica si privata", "C) Nu foloseste chei, ci algoritmi de transformare", "D) Foloseste mai multe chei pentru criptare si decriptare" },
        'A',
        "mediu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Care este diferenta principala intre criptografia simetrica si criptografia asimetrica?",
        { "A) Simetrica foloseste o cheie, asimetrica foloseste doua chei", "B) Simetrica este mai sigura decat asimetrica", "C) Asimetrica este folosita pentru criptare, simetrica pentru semnaturi digitale", "D) Nu exista diferente" },
        'A',
        "greu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este criptografia cuantica?",
        { "A) O forma de criptografie care foloseste computere cuantice", "B) O forma de criptografie neafectata de atacurile cuantice", "C) O forma de criptografie care se bazeaza pe proprietatile cuantice ale particulelor", "D) O forma de criptografie care foloseste algoritmi cuantici pentru criptare" },
        'C',
        "greu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este un certificat digital?",
        { "A) Un document care confirma identitatea unei chei publice", "B) Un document care contine o cheie secreta", "C) Un document care cripteaza datele", "D) Un document care decripteaza datele" },
        'A',
        "mediu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este SSL in contextul criptografiei?",
        { "A) Secure Sockets Layer, un protocol de securitate pentru comunicatii pe internet", "B) Simple Symmetric Layer, un protocol de criptare", "C) Secure Standard Layer, o metoda de criptare", "D) Secure Sockets Language, un limbaj de programare criptografic" },
        'A',
        "usor",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este atacul de tip 'man-in-the-middle' in criptografie?",
        { "A) Un atac in care atacatorul introduce propriile chei criptografice", "B) Un atac in care atacatorul asculta si modifica comunicatiile intre doua parti", "C) Un atac in care atacatorul fura cheile criptografice", "D) Un atac in care atacatorul cripteaza datele utilizatorului" },
        'B',
        "mediu",
        "cryptografie"
    },
    {
        "Ce este criptarea AES?",
        { "A) Advanced Encryption Standard, un algoritm simetric de criptare", "B) Asymmetric Encryption Scheme, un algoritm asimetric de criptare", "C) Advanced Encryption System, o metoda de criptare", "D) Asymmetric Encryption Standard, un standard de criptare asimetrica" },
        'A',
        "usor",
        "cryptografie"
    }
};


// Numar total de intrebari
static int contorIntrebari = sizeof(setIntrebari) / sizeof(setIntrebari[0]);

// TABELA DE SCOR (in memorie)

static Jucator jucatori[NR_MAXIM_JUCATORI];
static int contorJucatori = 0;   // Cati jucatori exista in clasament

// PROTOTIPURI DE FUNCTII

void afisareMeniu(void);
void incepeQuiz(void);
void afisareScor(void);

// Functii ajutatoare
static int  obtinePuncteDupaDificultate(const char* dificultate);
static void actualizeazaClasamentul(const char* nume, int scor);
static void sortareScor(void);
static void curataBufferulDeInput(void);

// FUNCTIA CARE OBTINE RASPUNSUL CU TIMEOUT (Windows, fara threads)
char obtineRaspunsCuTimeout(int limitaDeTimpInSecunde) {
    int timpTrecut = 0;
    int interval = 100; // Interval de verificare in milisecunde (100 ms)
    int intervaleTotale = limitaDeTimpInSecunde * 1000 / interval;
    char c = 0;

    for(int i = 0; i < intervaleTotale ; i++) {
        if (_kbhit()) {
            c = _getch();
            // Ignoram tastele de enter
            if (c == '\r' || c == '\n') {
                continue;
            }
            // Transformam in litera mare, daca este cazul
            if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'd') {
                c -= 32; // 'a' -> 'A'
            }
            printf("%c\n", c); // Echo the character
            return c;
        }
        Sleep(interval); // Sleep pentru 100 ms
    }

    printf("\n[DEBUG] Timpul a expirat.\n");
    curataBufferulDeInput(); // Curatam buffer-ul pentru a preveni input-uri ramase
    return 0; // Timpul a expirat
}

// FLUSH INPUT BUFFER
static void curataBufferulDeInput(void) {
    while (_kbhit()) {
        _getch(); // Read and discard
    }
}

// IMPLEMENTARI FUNCTII OBISNUITE


// Functie pentru afisarea meniului principal
void afisareMeniu(void) {
    printf("\n===== MENIU PRINCIPAL =====\n");
    printf("1. Incepe Quiz\n");
    printf("2. Vezi Clasament\n");
    printf("3. Iesire\n");
    printf("==========================\n");
    printf("Alege o optiune: ");
}

// Functie care calculeaza punctajul in functie de dificultate
static int obtinePuncteDupaDificultate(const char* dificultate) {
    if (strcmp(dificultate, "usor") == 0)  return 10;
    if (strcmp(dificultate, "mediu") == 0) return 20;
    if (strcmp(dificultate, "greu") == 0)  return 30;
    return 10; // fallback
}

// Functie pentru adaugarea si sortarea clasamentului
static void actualizeazaClasamentul(const char* nume, int scor) {
    if (contorJucatori < NR_MAXIM_JUCATORI) {
        // Adaugam jucatorul
        strncpy(jucatori[contorJucatori].nume, nume, LUNGIME_NUME_JUCATOR - 1);
        jucatori[contorJucatori].nume[LUNGIME_NUME_JUCATOR - 1] = '\0'; // siguranta
        jucatori[contorJucatori].scor = scor;
        contorJucatori++;

        // Sortam descrescator
        sortareScor();
    } else {
        printf("Clasamentul este plin. Nu se mai poate adauga un nou jucator.\n");
    }
}

// Functie de comparare pentru sortarea descrescatoare
static int compareJucators(const void* a, const void* b) {
    const Jucator* pa = (const Jucator*)a;
    const Jucator* pb = (const Jucator*)b;
    // Sortam descrescator dupa scor
    return pb->scor - pa->scor;
}

// Functie care sorteaza clasamentul
static void sortareScor(void) {
    qsort(jucatori, contorJucatori, sizeof(Jucator), compareJucators);
    //printf("[DEBUG] Clasamentul a fost sortat.\n"); // Am comentat pentru a reduce mesageria
}

// Functie pentru afisarea clasamentului
void afisareScor(void) {
    printf("\n===== CLASAMENT JUCATORI =====\n");
    if (contorJucatori == 0) {
        printf("Niciun jucator inregistrat inca!\n");
    } else {
        for (int i = 0; i < contorJucatori; i++) {
            printf("%d. %s - %d puncte\n", i + 1, jucatori[i].nume, jucatori[i].scor);
        }
    }
    printf("=============================\n\n");
}

// Functie principala de quiz
void incepeQuiz(void) {
    // Cerem numele jucatorului
    char numeJucator[LUNGIME_NUME_JUCATOR];
    printf("Introduceti numele jucatorului: ");
    scanf("%s", numeJucator);

    int scor = 0;

    // Implementare conceptuala a unui timp-limita de 10 secunde
    int limitaDeTimpPeIntrebare = 10;

    for (int i = 0; i < contorIntrebari; i++) {
        // Afisam intrebarea cu dificultatea in paranteza
        printf("\n=====================================\n");
        printf("Intrebare %d (%s): %s\n", i + 1, setIntrebari[i].dificultate, setIntrebari[i].text);

        // Afisam cele 4 variante
        for (int j = 0; j < RASPUNSURI_MAXIME; j++) {
            printf("%s\n", setIntrebari[i].optiuni[j]);
        }

        printf("Ai %d secunde sa raspunzi. Introdu raspunsul (A, B, C, D): ", limitaDeTimpPeIntrebare);

        // Citim raspunsul cu timeout (Windows, fara threads)
        char raspunsUtilizator  = obtineRaspunsCuTimeout(limitaDeTimpPeIntrebare);

        if (raspunsUtilizator  == 0) {
            // A expirat timpul (sau nu s-a introdus nimic)
            printf("\nAi depasit limita de timp! Se considera raspuns gresit.\n");
            continue;
        }

        // Verificam validitatea
        if (raspunsUtilizator  < 'A' || raspunsUtilizator  > 'D') {
            printf("Raspuns invalid! (A, B, C, D)\n");
            continue;
        }

        // Verificam daca e corect
        if (raspunsUtilizator  == setIntrebari[i].raspunsCorect) {
            int puncte = obtinePuncteDupaDificultate(setIntrebari[i].dificultate);
            scor += puncte;
            printf("Corect! +%d puncte. Scor curent: %d\n", puncte, scor);
        } else {
            printf("Gresit! Raspunsul corect era: %c\n", setIntrebari[i].raspunsCorect);
        }
    }

    // La final, actualizam clasamentul
    actualizeazaClasamentul(numeJucator, scor);
    printf("\n** Felicitari, %s! Scorul final este: %d **\n", numeJucator, scor);
}

// MAIN

int main(void) {
    srand((unsigned int)time(NULL));

    int ruleaza = 1;
    while (ruleaza) {
        afisareMeniu();

        int optiune;
        if (scanf("%d", &optiune) != 1) {
            // Daca utilizatorul a introdus ceva invalid
            printf("Eroare la citirea optiunii. Terminare program.\n");
            break;
        }

        switch (optiune) {
            case 1:
                // Incepe Quiz
                incepeQuiz();
                break;

            case 2:
                // Vezi Clasamentul
                afisareScor();
                break;

            case 3:
                // Iesire
                printf("La revedere!\n");
                ruleaza = 0;
                break;

            default:
                printf("Optiune invalida, incearca din nou!\n");
                break;
        }
    }

    return 0;
}

Desktop Old\old - Copy.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Audio;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

[System.Serializable]
public class AudioClipInfo
{
    public string key;
    public AudioClip clip;
    public float volume = 1.0f;
    public float pitch = 1.0f;
}

[System.Serializable]
public class MusicClipInfo
{
    public string key;
    public AudioClip introClip; // Intro part of the music
    public AudioClip loopClip;  // Looping part of the music
    public float volume = 1.0f;
}

[System.Serializable]
public class SpecificAudioSetting
{
    public string audioName;
    public float overlapThreshold;
}

public class AudioManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public static AudioManager Instance { get; private set; }

    public List<AudioClipInfo> audioClips;
    // Soundtracks
    public List<MusicClipInfo> soundtrackClips;
    public int poolSize = 10;
    public AudioMixerGroup sfxGroup;
    public AudioMixerGroup musicGroup;
    public List<SpecificAudioSetting> specificAudioSettings;

    private Dictionary<string, AudioClipInfo> audioClipDictionary;
    private Dictionary<string, MusicClipInfo> musicClipDictionary;
    private List<AudioSource> audioSourcePool;
    private int currentAudioSourceIndex = 0;
    private List<AudioSource> activeAudioSources = new List<AudioSource>();
    private Dictionary<string, float> lastPlayTimes = new Dictionary<string, float>();

    private AudioSource introMusicAudioSource;
    private AudioSource loopMusicAudioSource;

    private string currentMusicKey = null;

    private void Awake()
    {
        // Singleton pattern to ensure only one instance of AudioManager exists
        if (Instance == null)
        {
            Instance = this;
            DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);

            InitializeAudioClipDictionary();
            InitializeMusicClipDictionary();
            InitializeAudioSourcePool();
            InitializeMusicAudioSources();

            StartCoroutine(PreloadAllAudioClips());

            // Subscribe to scene loaded event to change music based on level
            SceneManager.sceneLoaded += OnSceneLoaded;

            // Load volume settings and apply them
            LoadVolumeSettings();
        }
        else
        {
            Destroy(gameObject);
            return;
        }
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        SceneManager.sceneLoaded -= OnSceneLoaded;
    }

    private void InitializeAudioClipDictionary()
    {
        audioClipDictionary = new Dictionary<string, AudioClipInfo>();
        foreach (var audioClipInfo in audioClips)
        {
            audioClipDictionary[audioClipInfo.key] = audioClipInfo;
        }
    }

    private void InitializeMusicClipDictionary()
    {
        musicClipDictionary = new Dictionary<string, MusicClipInfo>();
        foreach (var musicClipInfo in soundtrackClips)
        {
            musicClipDictionary[musicClipInfo.key] = musicClipInfo;
        }
    }

    private void InitializeAudioSourcePool()
    {
        audioSourcePool = new List<AudioSource>();
        for (int i = 0; i < poolSize; i++)
        {
            GameObject audioObject = new GameObject("PooledAudioSource_" + i);
            audioObject.transform.SetParent(transform);
            AudioSource audioSource = audioObject.AddComponent<AudioSource>();
            audioSource.outputAudioMixerGroup = sfxGroup;
            audioSource.volume = 1.0f; // Set default volume to 1.0f
            audioSourcePool.Add(audioSource);
        }
    }

    private void InitializeMusicAudioSources()
    {
        GameObject introMusicObject = new GameObject("IntroMusicAudioSource");
        introMusicObject.transform.SetParent(transform);
        introMusicAudioSource = introMusicObject.AddComponent<AudioSource>();
        introMusicAudioSource.outputAudioMixerGroup = musicGroup;
        introMusicAudioSource.volume = 1.0f; // Set default volume to 1.0f

        GameObject loopMusicObject = new GameObject("LoopMusicAudioSource");
        loopMusicObject.transform.SetParent(transform);
        loopMusicAudioSource = loopMusicObject.AddComponent<AudioSource>();
        loopMusicAudioSource.outputAudioMixerGroup = musicGroup;
        loopMusicAudioSource.volume = 1.0f; // Set default volume to 1.0f
        loopMusicAudioSource.loop = true; // This source will loop its clip
    }

    // Preload all audio and music clips to ensure they are loaded into memory
    private IEnumerator PreloadAllAudioClips()
    {
        foreach (var clipInfo in audioClips)
        {
            if (clipInfo.clip != null && !clipInfo.clip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
            {
                clipInfo.clip.LoadAudioData();  // Preload the audio clip
                while (!clipInfo.clip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
                {
                    yield return null;  // Wait until the audio clip is fully loaded
                }
            }
        }

        foreach (var musicClipInfo in soundtrackClips)
        {
            if (musicClipInfo.introClip != null && !musicClipInfo.introClip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
            {
                musicClipInfo.introClip.LoadAudioData();
                while (!musicClipInfo.introClip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
                {
                    yield return null;
                }
            }
            if (musicClipInfo.loopClip != null && !musicClipInfo.loopClip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
            {
                musicClipInfo.loopClip.LoadAudioData();
                while (!musicClipInfo.loopClip.loadState.Equals(AudioDataLoadState.Loaded))
                {
                    yield return null;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Sound Effects Methods
    public void PlaySound(string key)
    {
        if (audioClipDictionary.TryGetValue(key, out AudioClipInfo clipInfo))
        {
            AudioSource audioSource = GetNextAvailableAudioSource();
            if (clipInfo.clip.loadState == AudioDataLoadState.Loaded)  // Check if the clip is loaded before playing
            {
                StartCoroutine(PlaySoundCoroutine(audioSource, clipInfo));
            }
            else
            {
                Debug.LogWarning($"Audio clip with key '{key}' is not fully loaded yet.");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning($"Audio clip with key '{key}' not found!");
        }
    }

    public void StopAllSounds()
    {
        foreach (var audioSource in audioSourcePool)
        {
            audioSource.Stop();
        }
        activeAudioSources.Clear();
    }

    private IEnumerator PlaySoundCoroutine(AudioSource audioSource, AudioClipInfo clipInfo)
    {
        float currentTime = Time.time;
        bool isOverlap = false;
        float threshold = 0f;

        // Check for overlap settings
        if (specificAudioSettings != null)
        {
            foreach (var setting in specificAudioSettings)
            {
                if (setting.audioName == clipInfo.key)
                {
                    threshold = setting.overlapThreshold;
                    isOverlap = lastPlayTimes.TryGetValue(clipInfo.key, out float lastPlayTime) && (currentTime - lastPlayTime <= threshold);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        activeAudioSources.Add(audioSource);

        // Set the volume based on whether the sound overlaps
        audioSource.volume = isOverlap ? clipInfo.volume / activeAudioSources.Count : clipInfo.volume;

        lastPlayTimes[clipInfo.key] = currentTime;

        // Set pitch and play the clip
        audioSource.pitch = clipInfo.pitch;
        audioSource.clip = clipInfo.clip;
        audioSource.Play();

        yield return new WaitWhile(() => audioSource.isPlaying);

        activeAudioSources.Remove(audioSource);
    }

    private AudioSource GetNextAvailableAudioSource()
    {
        AudioSource audioSource = audioSourcePool[currentAudioSourceIndex];
        currentAudioSourceIndex = (currentAudioSourceIndex + 1) % poolSize;
        return audioSource;
    }

    // Music Methods
    public void PlayMusic(string key)
    {
        if (currentMusicKey == key)
        {
            // Already playing this music, do nothing
            return;
        }

        StopMusic(); // Stop any currently playing music

        currentMusicKey = key;

        if (musicClipDictionary.TryGetValue(key, out MusicClipInfo musicClipInfo))
        {
            StartCoroutine(PlayMusicCoroutine(musicClipInfo));
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning($"Music clip with key '{key}' not found!");
        }
    }

    private IEnumerator PlayMusicCoroutine(MusicClipInfo musicClipInfo)
    {
        float volume = musicClipInfo.volume;

        if (musicClipInfo.introClip != null)
        {
            if (musicClipInfo.loopClip != null)
            {
                // Both intro and loop clips are provided
                double startTime = AudioSettings.dspTime + (1.0 / AudioSettings.outputSampleRate); // Schedule as soon as possible
                double introDuration = (double)musicClipInfo.introClip.samples / musicClipInfo.introClip.frequency;

                // Set up intro AudioSource
                introMusicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.introClip;
                introMusicAudioSource.loop = false;
                introMusicAudioSource.volume = volume;
                introMusicAudioSource.PlayScheduled(startTime);

                // Set up loop AudioSource
                loopMusicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.loopClip;
                loopMusicAudioSource.loop = true;
                loopMusicAudioSource.volume = volume;
                double loopStartTime = startTime + introDuration;
                loopMusicAudioSource.PlayScheduled(loopStartTime);
            }
            else
            {
                // Only intro clip is provided, play it once
                introMusicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.introClip;
                introMusicAudioSource.loop = false;
                introMusicAudioSource.volume = volume;
                introMusicAudioSource.Play();
            }
        }
        else if (musicClipInfo.loopClip != null)
        {
            // Only loop clip is provided, play and loop it
            loopMusicAudioSource.clip = musicClipInfo.loopClip;
            loopMusicAudioSource.loop = true;
            loopMusicAudioSource.volume = volume;
            loopMusicAudioSource.Play();
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("No intro or loop clip provided for the music track.");
        }

        yield return null;
    }

    public void StopMusic()
    {
        introMusicAudioSource.Stop();
        loopMusicAudioSource.Stop();
        currentMusicKey = null;
    }

    private void OnSceneLoaded(Scene scene, LoadSceneMode mode)
    {
        PlayMusicBasedOnLevel();
        // Re-apply volume settings
        LoadVolumeSettings();
    }

    public void PlayMusicBasedOnLevel()
    {
        string currentSceneName = SceneManager.GetActiveScene().name;

        if (currentSceneName == "MainMenu")
        {
            PlayMusic("main_menu_clip");
        }
        else if (currentSceneName == "Level1" || currentSceneName == "Level2" || currentSceneName == "Level3")
        {
            PlayMusic("level_new_clip");
        }
        else
        {
            // Handle other levels or default music
            PlayMusic("default_level_clip");
        }
    }

    // Load and apply volume settings from PlayerPrefs
    private void LoadVolumeSettings()
    {
        // Load Music volume setting
        float musicVolume = PlayerPrefs.GetInt("MusicVolume_ToggleState", 1) == 1 ? 1.0f : 0.0f;
        SetMusicGroupVolume(musicVolume);

        // Load SFX volume setting
        float sfxVolume = PlayerPrefs.GetInt("SFXVolume_ToggleState", 1) == 1 ? 1.0f : 0.0f;
        SetSFXGroupVolume(sfxVolume);
    }

    // Adjust the volume of the musicGroup via AudioMixer
    public void SetMusicGroupVolume(float volume)
    {
        // volume is expected to be between 0.0 and 1.0
        if (musicGroup != null)
        {
            float decibelVolume = (volume > 0.0001f) ? Mathf.Log10(volume) * 20 : -80f; // -80 dB is effectively silence
            if (!musicGroup.audioMixer.SetFloat("MusicVolume", decibelVolume))
            {
                Debug.LogWarning("MusicVolume parameter not found in the AudioMixer.");
            }
        }
    }

    // Adjust the volume of the sfxGroup via the AudioMixer
    public void SetSFXGroupVolume(float volume)
    {
        if (sfxGroup != null)
        {
            float decibelVolume = (volume > 0.0001f) ? Mathf.Log10(volume) * 20 : -80f; // -80 dB is effectively silence
            if (!sfxGroup.audioMixer.SetFloat("SFXVolume", decibelVolume))
            {
                Debug.LogWarning("SFXVolume parameter not found in the AudioMixer.");
            }
        }
    }

    // Optional: Resume Audio Context for WebGL
    public void ResumeAudioContext()
    {
        // Implementation if needed
    }
}

Desktop Old\old-new-exit-pois-scripts\new_gridmanager.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

public class GridManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public GameObject cellPrefab; // Assign in editor
    public float cellSpacing = 0.2f; // Adjust this value to increase or decrease the space between cells
    [SerializeField]
    private float padding = 4f;
    private Cell lastGreenCell = null; // Track the last cell that was turned green
    // Add a 2D array to hold references to all cell GameObjects
    private GameObject[,] cellObjects;
    private int visitableCells = 0;
    private GameObject currentlyClickedCell = null;
    private Bounds gridBounds;
    private LevelManager levelManager;
    private Cell startCell;
    private Cell exitCell;
    public bool hintsActive = false; // Tracks whether hints are currently shown
    private bool levelFinished = false;
    private bool inputDebounced = false; // Debouncing flag
    private InputManager inputManager; // Declare InputManager instance


    //private float debounceDelay = 0.01f; // Set debounce delay to 0.2 seconds
    Vector3 mouseWorldPos;

    // Reference to the DebugText object
    //public TextMeshProUGUI debugText; // Make sure this matches your TextMeshPro UI element


    // Start is called before the first frame update
    void Start()
    {
        QualitySettings.vSyncCount = 0; 
        Application.targetFrameRate = 60;
        levelManager = FindObjectOfType<LevelManager>();
        startFirstLevel();
        inputManager = InputManager.Instance;
        // Initialize the DebugText reference by finding it in the scene
        //debugText = GameObject.Find("DebugText").GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
        //debugPrint();
    }

    public void ToggleHints()
    {
        hintsActive = !hintsActive; // Toggle the hintsActive state

        if (hintsActive)
        {
            //Debug.Log("Show Hints");
            // Show hints
            ShowHints();
        }
        else
        {
            // Hide hints
            HideHints();
        }
    }

    public void ResetHints()
    {
        if (hintsActive)
        {
            hintsActive = !hintsActive;
        }
    }

    private void ShowHints()
    {
        string[][] solution = LevelManager.solutions[GameState.currentLevel];

        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                GameObject cell = cellObjects[i, j]; // Directly use the GameObject
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'O') // Check if it's an "O" cell
                {
                    string hintText = solution[i][j].ToString(); // Get the hint from the solution
                    cellComponent.ChangeLabelText(hintText, GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.33f); // Add the hint label to the cell
                }
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'F')
                {
                    cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.1f);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private void HideHints()
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                GameObject cell = cellObjects[i, j]; // Directly use the GameObject
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'O') // Check if it's an "O" cell
                {
                    ClearLabelText(cellComponent); // Remove the label text from the cell
                }
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'F' && !GameState.levelStarted)
                {
                    ClearLabelText(cellComponent);
                }

            }
        }
    }

    /*
    // Update the DebugText with variable values
    void UpdateDebugText()
    {
        debugText.text += $"Currently Clicked Cell: {(currentlyClickedCell != null ? currentlyClickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId() : "None")}\n";
        //debugText.text += $"Input Debounced: {inputDebounced}";
        debugText.text += $"Is mouse down: {isPressing}\n";
        debugText.text += $"Waiting for Release: {waitingForRelease}\n"; // Debug flag
    }*/



    void FixedUpdate()
    {
        // Check if the Back button was pressed this frame
        if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape))
        {
            // Change "Main Scene" to the actual name of your main scene
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
        }

        // Call the encapsulated waiting-for-release logic
        if (!inputManager.CheckAndHandleWaitingForRelease())
        {
            return; // Skip input handling if still waiting for the mouse release
        }

        if (!levelFinished)
        {
            if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.D))
            {
                ToggleHints();
            }

            // Handle when mouse is held down and dragging
            if (inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                mouseWorldPos = Camera.main.ScreenToWorldPoint(Input.mousePosition);
                mouseWorldPos.z = 0;

                if (GameState.levelStarted && !gridBounds.Contains(mouseWorldPos))
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                    return;
                }

                // Continuously handle mouse down while dragging
                TryHandleMouseDown();
            }

            // Check for mouse input
            if (inputManager.IsMouseDown())// && !inputDebounced) // 0 is the left mouse button
            {
                ClearLabelText(startCell);
                exitCell.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.1f);
                //}
                //Debug.Log("Try Handle Down Mouse");

            }
            // Check if the left mouse button was released
            if (inputManager.IsMouseUp())
            {
                currentlyClickedCell = null;


                // Apply debouncing after releasing the button
                if (!inputDebounced)
                {
                    //StartCoroutine(ApplyDebounce());
                }

                if (GameState.levelStarted)
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                }
                else
                {
                    if (!hintsActive)
                    {
                        ClearLabelText(exitCell);
                    }
                    startCell.ChangeLabelText("START");
                }
            }
        }
    }

    void LoadLevel(int levelIndex)
    {

        ResetAndClearLevel();
        visitableCells = 0;
        if (inputManager)
        {
            inputManager.SetWaitingForRelease(true);
        }

        // After the grid is fully set up, adjust its scale to fit the window
        char[][] level = LevelManager.levels[levelIndex];
        int rows = level.Length;
        int cols = level[0].Length; // Assuming all rows have the same number of columns

        // Initialize or clear the cellObjects array
        cellObjects = new GameObject[rows, cols];

        // Adjust the total size calculation to account for spacing
        float gridWidth = (cols * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing; // Subtract cellSpacing once to avoid extra space at the end
        float gridHeight = (rows * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Calculate the offset needed to center the grid
        Vector2 gridOffset = new Vector2(-gridWidth / 2 + 0.5f, gridHeight / 2 - 0.5f);

        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                Vector2 position = new Vector2(j * (1 + cellSpacing), -i * (1 + cellSpacing)) + gridOffset;
                GameObject cell = Instantiate(cellPrefab, position, Quaternion.identity, transform);
                cellObjects[i, j] = cell; // Store the cell reference

                // Assign a tag to your cellPrefab in the Unity Editor and use it here
                cell.tag = "Cell";

                // Assuming the cell prefab has a CircleCollider2D component
                BoxCollider2D collider = cell.GetComponent<BoxCollider2D>();
                if (collider != null)
                {
                    // Calculate the adjustment factor based on cellSpacing
                    float adjustmentFactor = 1 + (cellSpacing); // Adjust by half of cellSpacing

                    // Adjust the collider's size by the adjustment factor
                    // This increases both the width and height by the calculated amount
                    collider.size *= adjustmentFactor;
                }

                // Assign row and column to the Cell component
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>(); // Add the Cell component
                cellComponent.row = i;
                cellComponent.col = j;
                cellComponent.initialType = level[i][j];
                cellComponent.state = cellComponent.initialType;
                SpriteRenderer cellRenderer = cell.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
                switch (level[i][j])
                {
                    case 'S':
                        cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("START", GameState.DefaultFontSize);
                        cellComponent.StartFlashing();
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        startCell = cellComponent;
                        // Set the label's text to "START"
                        break;
                    case 'O':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        visitableCells++;
                        break;
                    case 'X':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        cellComponent.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                        break;
                    case 'F':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        exitCell = cellComponent;
                        //cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize*1.1f);
                        break;
                    default:
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear; // Default color
                        break;
                }

                /*Transform circleBorderTransform = cell.transform.Find("CircleBorder"); // Replace "CircleBorder" with the actual name of the child GameObject
                if (circleBorderTransform != null)
                {
                    SpriteRenderer borderRenderer = circleBorderTransform.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
                    if (borderRenderer != null)
                    {
                        // Instantiate a new Material from the shared Material
                        Material uniqueMat = new Material(borderRenderer.sharedMaterial);
                        // Change the color of the new Material instance to Aqua
                                                                   // Assign the new Material instance to the SpriteRenderer
                        borderRenderer.material = uniqueMat;
                    }
                }*/
            }
        }
        //Debug.Log(visitableCells);
        AdjustGridToFitScreen();
        UpdateGridBounds();
    }

    private void ClearLabelText(Cell cell)
    {
        // Assuming your LabelText GameObjects are named consistently, including when instantiated
        cell.ChangeLabelText("", 0);
    }

    /*
    // Debouncing logic to avoid multiple quick inputs
    IEnumerator ApplyDebounce()
    {
        inputDebounced = true; // Activate debounce
        yield return new WaitForSeconds(debounceDelay); // Wait for the debounce delay
        inputDebounced = false; // Deactivate debounce, allowing input again
    }*/

    void TryHandleMouseDown()
    {

        // Define the radius of the circle cast. Adjust this value as needed.
        //float castRadius = cellSpacing/2;
        //castRadius *= transform.localScale.x;
        RaycastHit2D hit = Physics2D.Raycast(mouseWorldPos, Vector2.zero);

        if (hit.collider != null && hit.collider.gameObject.CompareTag("Cell"))
        {
            GameObject clickedCell = hit.collider.gameObject;

            if (currentlyClickedCell == null)
            {
                //Debug.Log("Try null");
                currentlyClickedCell = clickedCell; // Update the currently clicked cell
                HandleMouseInput(clickedCell); // Process the new cell click
            }
            else
            {
                if (currentlyClickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId() != clickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId())
                {
                    currentlyClickedCell = clickedCell; // Update the currently clicked cell
                    HandleMouseInput(clickedCell); // Process the new cell click
                }
            }
        }
    }

    void HandleMouseInput(GameObject clickedObject)
    {
        Cell clickedCell = clickedObject.GetComponent<Cell>();
        //Debug.Log("Cell clicked?");
        //Debug.Log(clickedCell);
        if (clickedCell != null)
        {
            // Retrieve the SpriteRenderer and Cell component from the clicked cell
            SpriteRenderer cellRenderer = clickedObject.gameObject.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
            // Check if it's the first interaction and the cell is 'S'
            if (lastGreenCell == null && clickedCell.initialType == 'S' && inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                // This is the first interaction and the clicked cell is 'S'
                GameState.levelStarted = true;
                ClearLabelText(clickedCell);
                cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua;
                clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                clickedCell.state = 'V';
                lastGreenCell = clickedCell; // Update the last green cell
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.state == 'V' && inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                // The cell has already been visited, so reload the level
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                return;
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.state == 'V' && !inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }
            else if (clickedCell.initialType == 'X' && GameState.levelStarted)
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.initialType == 'O' && !IsAdjacent(clickedCell, lastGreenCell))
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }

            else if (lastGreenCell != null && IsAdjacent(clickedCell, lastGreenCell))
            {
                // For subsequent interactions, check if the clicked cell is adjacent to the last green cell
                if (clickedCell.initialType == 'F')
                {
                    ClearLabelText(clickedCell);
                    cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua;
                    clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                    if (visitableCells == 0)
                    {
                        levelFinished = true;
                        // Proceed to the next level
                        StartCoroutine(WaitAndPerformAction(0.15f, () => GoToNextLevel()));
                        return;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        levelFinished = true;
                        StartCoroutine(WaitAndPerformAction(0.15f, () => LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel)));
                        return;
                    }

                }
                if (clickedCell.state == 'O')
                {
                    cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua; // Change to green only if adjacent to the last green cell
                    clickedCell.state = 'V';
                    visitableCells--;
                    //Debug.Log(visitableCells);
                    lastGreenCell = clickedCell; // Update the last green cell

                    // Now, change the color of the CircleBorder
                    // Now, change the color of the CircleBorder
                    clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);

                }
                if (!HasValidMoves(clickedCell))
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Coroutine for delay

    IEnumerator WaitAndPerformAction(float delay, System.Action action)
    {
        yield return new WaitForSeconds(delay); // Wait for the specified delay
        action(); // Perform the action after the delay
        levelFinished = false;
    }


    void UpdateGridBounds()
    {
        // Calculate the unscaled grid width and height
        float gridWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Adjust the gridWidth and gridHeight based on the GridManager's scale
        gridWidth *= transform.localScale.x;
        gridHeight *= transform.localScale.y;

        // Assuming the center of your grid aligns with the GridManager's position
        Vector3 gridCenter = transform.position;

        float expansionAmount = 2 * cellSpacing * Mathf.Max(transform.localScale.x, transform.localScale.y);

        gridWidth += expansionAmount; // Expand width by cellSpacing
        gridHeight += expansionAmount; // Expand height by cellSpacing

        // Now create a new Bounds that incorporates the scale
        Vector3 size = new Vector3(gridWidth, gridHeight, 0); // Assuming a 2D grid, Z-size is not relevant
        gridBounds = new Bounds(gridCenter, size);
    }


    void AdjustGridToFitScreen()
    {
        Camera mainCamera = Camera.main;
        float screenHeight = 2f * mainCamera.orthographicSize;
        float screenWidth = screenHeight * mainCamera.aspect;

        // Define padding as a percentage of the screen size
        float paddingPercentage = padding / 100; // 4% padding
        float paddedScreenHeight = screenHeight * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce height by padding on top and bottom
        float paddedScreenWidth = screenWidth * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce width by padding on left and right

        float gridPhysicalWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridPhysicalHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Calculate scale factors based on the padded screen size
        float scaleX = paddedScreenWidth / gridPhysicalWidth;
        float scaleY = paddedScreenHeight / gridPhysicalHeight;
        float scale = Mathf.Min(scaleX, scaleY);

        // Adjust the scale of the grid
        transform.localScale = new Vector3(scale, scale, 1);

        // Optionally adjust the position if needed
        // Since you're scaling the grid down, you might not need to adjust its position.
    }

    bool HasValidMoves(Cell lastCell)
    {
        int[] dRow = { -1, 1, 0, 0 }; // Up, Down
        int[] dCol = { 0, 0, -1, 1 }; // Left, Right

        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) // Check all four directions
        {
            int newRow = lastCell.row + dRow[i];
            int newCol = lastCell.col + dCol[i];

            // Check bounds
            if (newRow >= 0 && newRow < cellObjects.GetLength(0) && newCol >= 0 && newCol < cellObjects.GetLength(1))
            {
                Cell potentialCell = cellObjects[newRow, newCol].GetComponent<Cell>();
                //Debug.Log(potentialCell.state);
                // Check if the cell is not visited and not an obstacle
                if (potentialCell.state != 'V' && potentialCell.initialType != 'X')
                {
                    return true; // There is at least one valid move
                }
            }
        }
        return false; // No valid moves found
    }




    bool IsAdjacent(Cell cell1, Cell cell2)
    {
        // Check if cell1 is adjacent to cell2 (not including diagonal adjacency)
        return (cell1.row == cell2.row && Mathf.Abs(cell1.col - cell2.col) == 1) ||
               (cell1.col == cell2.col && Mathf.Abs(cell1.row - cell2.row) == 1);
    }

    private void startFirstLevel()
    {
        try
        {
            levelManager.GenerateAndAddLevel(GameState.numRows, GameState.numCols, GameState.freqObstacles);
            LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            //GameState.PrintState();
        }
        catch (System.Exception ex)
        {
            // Log the error
            Debug.LogError("Failed to generate a new level: " + ex.Message);
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
            GameState.Reset();
        }
    }

    private void debugPrint()
    {
        Debug.Log("Levels count: " + LevelManager.levels.Count);
        // Iterate through each level and print its content
        LevelManager.PrintLevels(); // Print all levels to the console
        //LevelManager.PrintSolutions(); // Print all levels to the console
        GameState.PrintState();
        Debug.Log("Current Level: " + GameState.currentLevel);
    }


    void GoToNextLevel()
    {
        GameState.currentLevel++;
        // Update rows, cols, and frequency based on the current level
        GameState.UpdateLevelSettings();
        //debugPrint();
        //GameState.PrintState();
        // Attempt to generate and add a new level with specified parameters
        if (GameState.currentLevel + 1 >= LevelManager.levels.Count)
        {
            if (levelManager != null)
            {
                try
                {
                    levelManager.GenerateAndAddLevel(GameState.numRows, GameState.numCols, GameState.freqObstacles);
                    //debugPrint();
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    // Log the error
                    Debug.Log("Failed to generate a new level: " + ex.Message);
                    //Debug.Log(numRows + " " + numCols + " " + freqObstacles + " " + GameState.currentLevel);
                    //Debug.Log(LevelManager.levels.Count);
                    LevelManager.levels.Clear();
                    LevelManager.solutions.Clear();
                    GameState.currentLevel = 1;
                    // Navigate back to the main menu
                    SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
                    GameState.Reset();
                }

            }
            else
            {
                throw new System.Exception("LevelManager not found.");
            }
        }
        if (GameState.currentLevel < LevelManager.levels.Count)
        {
            //Debug.Log("Load next level");
            LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
        }
        else
        {
            LevelManager.levels.Clear();
            LevelManager.solutions.Clear();
            GameState.currentLevel = 0;
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
            GameState.Reset();
            Debug.Log("Error cannot load level");
        }
        //numRows++;
        //numCols++;
        //freqObstacles += 0.1;

        // If the new level index is valid, load the level
        //

    }

    private void ResetAndClearLevel()
    {

        // Reset the grid scale to its default value
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one;

        // Reset the last green cell reference
        lastGreenCell = null;

        // Clear existing cells if any
        if (cellObjects != null)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
            {
                for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
                {
                    if (cellObjects[i, j] != null)
                    {
                        Destroy(cellObjects[i, j]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        GameState.levelStarted = false;
        currentlyClickedCell = null; // Allow for new cell clicks
        ResetHints();

        // Optionally, reset or clear other level-specific data or states here
    }
}

Desktop Old\old-new-exit-pois-scripts\new_inputmanager.txt:
```
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;
using System.Collections; // This is needed for IEnumerator and Coroutines

public class InputManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public static InputManager Instance { get; private set; }

    private bool isPressing = false;
    private bool lastFrameIsPressing = false;

    // Centralize waitingForRelease in InputManager
    private bool waitingForRelease = false;
    private bool canProcessInput = false; // Flag for debouncing

    private void Awake()
    {
        if (Instance == null)
        {
            Instance = this;
            DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);

            // Register the sceneLoaded event to handle setting waitingForRelease
            SceneManager.sceneLoaded += OnSceneLoaded;
        }
        else
        {
            Destroy(gameObject);
        }
    }

    private void OnSceneLoaded(Scene scene, LoadSceneMode mode)
    {
        // Reset waitingForRelease when a new scene is loaded
        waitingForRelease = true;
        canProcessInput = false; // Block input initially for debounc
        // Start the debounce timer (e.g., 0.01s)
        StartCoroutine(DebounceInput(0.01f));
    }

    private IEnumerator DebounceInput(float debounceTime)
    {
        yield return new WaitForSeconds(debounceTime);
        canProcessInput = true; // Allow input processing after debounce time
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        // Unsubscribe from the event when this object is destroyed
        SceneManager.sceneLoaded -= OnSceneLoaded;
    }


    public void Update()
    {
        // Capture the state from the previous frame
        lastFrameIsPressing = isPressing;

        // Update the current state
        isPressing = Input.GetMouseButton(0);
    }

    public bool IsPressing()
    {
        return isPressing;
    }

    public bool IsMouseDown()
    {
        return isPressing && !lastFrameIsPressing;
    }

    public bool IsMouseUp()
    {
        return !isPressing && lastFrameIsPressing;
    }

    // Getter for waitingForRelease
    public bool IsWaitingForRelease()
    {
        return waitingForRelease;
    }

    // Setter for waitingForRelease
    public void SetWaitingForRelease(bool state)
    {
        waitingForRelease = state;
    }

    // New method to handle waitingForRelease logic
    public bool CheckAndHandleWaitingForRelease()
    {
        // If waiting for the release of the mouse, skip input handling
        if (waitingForRelease)
        {
            // Check if the mouse has been released
            if (!IsPressing())
            {
                waitingForRelease = false; // Stop waiting when the mouse is released
            }
            else
            {
                return false; // Skip further input handling until mouse is released
            }
        }
        // Check if input can be processed (debouncing)
        return canProcessInput;
    }
}
