Desktop Old\old-new-exit-pois-scripts\old_gridmanager.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

public class GridManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    public GameObject cellPrefab; // Assign in editor
    public float cellSpacing = 0.2f; // Adjust this value to increase or decrease the space between cells
    [SerializeField]
    private float padding = 4f;
    private Cell lastGreenCell = null; // Track the last cell that was turned green
    // Add a 2D array to hold references to all cell GameObjects
    private GameObject[,] cellObjects;
    private int visitableCells = 0;
    private GameObject currentlyClickedCell = null;
    private Bounds gridBounds;
    private LevelManager levelManager;
    private Cell startCell;
    private Cell exitCell;
    public bool hintsActive = false; // Tracks whether hints are currently shown
    private bool levelFinished = false;
    private bool inputDebounced = false; // Debouncing flag
    private bool waitingForRelease = false; // New flag to wait for mouse release after restart
    private InputManager inputManager; // Declare InputManager instance


    //private float debounceDelay = 0.01f; // Set debounce delay to 0.2 seconds
    Vector3 mouseWorldPos;

    // Reference to the DebugText object
    //public TextMeshProUGUI debugText; // Make sure this matches your TextMeshPro UI element


    // Start is called before the first frame update
    void Start()
    {
        QualitySettings.vSyncCount = 0; 
        Application.targetFrameRate = 60;
        levelManager = FindObjectOfType<LevelManager>();
        startFirstLevel();
        inputManager = new InputManager(); // Initialize InputManager
        // Initialize the DebugText reference by finding it in the scene
        //debugText = GameObject.Find("DebugText").GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
        //debugPrint();
    }

    public void ToggleHints()
    {
        hintsActive = !hintsActive; // Toggle the hintsActive state

        if (hintsActive)
        {
            //Debug.Log("Show Hints");
            // Show hints
            ShowHints();
        }
        else
        {
            // Hide hints
            HideHints();
        }
    }

    public void ResetHints()
    {
        if (hintsActive)
        {
            hintsActive = !hintsActive;
        }
    }

    private void ShowHints()
    {
        string[][] solution = LevelManager.solutions[GameState.currentLevel];

        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                GameObject cell = cellObjects[i, j]; // Directly use the GameObject
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'O') // Check if it's an "O" cell
                {
                    string hintText = solution[i][j].ToString(); // Get the hint from the solution
                    cellComponent.ChangeLabelText(hintText, GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.33f); // Add the hint label to the cell
                }
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'F')
                {
                    cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.1f);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private void HideHints()
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
            {
                GameObject cell = cellObjects[i, j]; // Directly use the GameObject
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>();
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'O') // Check if it's an "O" cell
                {
                    ClearLabelText(cellComponent); // Remove the label text from the cell
                }
                if (cellComponent.initialType == 'F' && !GameState.levelStarted)
                {
                    ClearLabelText(cellComponent);
                }

            }
        }
    }

    /*
    // Update the DebugText with variable values
    void UpdateDebugText()
    {
        debugText.text += $"Currently Clicked Cell: {(currentlyClickedCell != null ? currentlyClickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId() : "None")}\n";
        //debugText.text += $"Input Debounced: {inputDebounced}";
        debugText.text += $"Is mouse down: {isPressing}\n";
        debugText.text += $"Waiting for Release: {waitingForRelease}\n"; // Debug flag
    }*/



    void FixedUpdate()
    {
        // Check if the Back button was pressed this frame
        if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape))
        {
            // Change "Main Scene" to the actual name of your main scene
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
        }

        // If waiting for the release of the mouse, skip input handling
        if (waitingForRelease)
        {
            // Check if the mouse has been released
            if (!inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                waitingForRelease = false; // Once released, stop waiting
            }
            else
            {
                return; // Skip further input handling until mouse is released
            }
        }

        if (!levelFinished)
        {
            if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.D))
            {
                ToggleHints();
            }

            // Handle when mouse is held down and dragging
            if (inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                mouseWorldPos = Camera.main.ScreenToWorldPoint(Input.mousePosition);
                mouseWorldPos.z = 0;

                if (GameState.levelStarted && !gridBounds.Contains(mouseWorldPos))
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                    return;
                }

                // Continuously handle mouse down while dragging
                TryHandleMouseDown();
            }

            // Check for mouse input
            if (inputManager.IsMouseDown())// && !inputDebounced) // 0 is the left mouse button
            {
                ClearLabelText(startCell);
                exitCell.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize * 1.1f);
                //}
                //Debug.Log("Try Handle Down Mouse");

            }
            // Check if the left mouse button was released
            if (inputManager.IsMouseUp())
            {
                currentlyClickedCell = null;


                // Apply debouncing after releasing the button
                if (!inputDebounced)
                {
                    //StartCoroutine(ApplyDebounce());
                }

                if (GameState.levelStarted)
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                }
                else
                {
                    if (!hintsActive)
                    {
                        ClearLabelText(exitCell);
                    }
                    startCell.ChangeLabelText("START");
                }
            }
        }
        inputManager.UpdateMouseState(); // Update mouse state each frame
    }

    void LoadLevel(int levelIndex)
    {

        ResetAndClearLevel();
        visitableCells = 0;

        waitingForRelease = true; // Set the flag to wait for mouse release

        // After the grid is fully set up, adjust its scale to fit the window
        char[][] level = LevelManager.levels[levelIndex];
        int rows = level.Length;
        int cols = level[0].Length; // Assuming all rows have the same number of columns

        // Initialize or clear the cellObjects array
        cellObjects = new GameObject[rows, cols];

        // Adjust the total size calculation to account for spacing
        float gridWidth = (cols * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing; // Subtract cellSpacing once to avoid extra space at the end
        float gridHeight = (rows * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Calculate the offset needed to center the grid
        Vector2 gridOffset = new Vector2(-gridWidth / 2 + 0.5f, gridHeight / 2 - 0.5f);

        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++)
            {
                Vector2 position = new Vector2(j * (1 + cellSpacing), -i * (1 + cellSpacing)) + gridOffset;
                GameObject cell = Instantiate(cellPrefab, position, Quaternion.identity, transform);
                cellObjects[i, j] = cell; // Store the cell reference

                // Assign a tag to your cellPrefab in the Unity Editor and use it here
                cell.tag = "Cell";

                // Assuming the cell prefab has a CircleCollider2D component
                BoxCollider2D collider = cell.GetComponent<BoxCollider2D>();
                if (collider != null)
                {
                    // Calculate the adjustment factor based on cellSpacing
                    float adjustmentFactor = 1 + (cellSpacing); // Adjust by half of cellSpacing

                    // Adjust the collider's size by the adjustment factor
                    // This increases both the width and height by the calculated amount
                    collider.size *= adjustmentFactor;
                }

                // Assign row and column to the Cell component
                Cell cellComponent = cell.GetComponent<Cell>(); // Add the Cell component
                cellComponent.row = i;
                cellComponent.col = j;
                cellComponent.initialType = level[i][j];
                cellComponent.state = cellComponent.initialType;
                SpriteRenderer cellRenderer = cell.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
                switch (level[i][j])
                {
                    case 'S':
                        cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("START", GameState.DefaultFontSize);
                        cellComponent.StartFlashing();
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        startCell = cellComponent;
                        // Set the label's text to "START"
                        break;
                    case 'O':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        visitableCells++;
                        break;
                    case 'X':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        cellComponent.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                        break;
                    case 'F':
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear;
                        exitCell = cellComponent;
                        //cellComponent.ChangeLabelText("EXIT", GameState.DefaultFontSize*1.1f);
                        break;
                    default:
                        cellRenderer.color = Color.clear; // Default color
                        break;
                }

                /*Transform circleBorderTransform = cell.transform.Find("CircleBorder"); // Replace "CircleBorder" with the actual name of the child GameObject
                if (circleBorderTransform != null)
                {
                    SpriteRenderer borderRenderer = circleBorderTransform.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
                    if (borderRenderer != null)
                    {
                        // Instantiate a new Material from the shared Material
                        Material uniqueMat = new Material(borderRenderer.sharedMaterial);
                        // Change the color of the new Material instance to Aqua
                                                                   // Assign the new Material instance to the SpriteRenderer
                        borderRenderer.material = uniqueMat;
                    }
                }*/
            }
        }
        //Debug.Log(visitableCells);
        AdjustGridToFitScreen();
        UpdateGridBounds();
    }

    private void ClearLabelText(Cell cell)
    {
        // Assuming your LabelText GameObjects are named consistently, including when instantiated
        cell.ChangeLabelText("", 0);
    }

    /*
    // Debouncing logic to avoid multiple quick inputs
    IEnumerator ApplyDebounce()
    {
        inputDebounced = true; // Activate debounce
        yield return new WaitForSeconds(debounceDelay); // Wait for the debounce delay
        inputDebounced = false; // Deactivate debounce, allowing input again
    }*/

    void TryHandleMouseDown()
    {

        // Define the radius of the circle cast. Adjust this value as needed.
        //float castRadius = cellSpacing/2;
        //castRadius *= transform.localScale.x;
        RaycastHit2D hit = Physics2D.Raycast(mouseWorldPos, Vector2.zero);

        if (hit.collider != null && hit.collider.gameObject.CompareTag("Cell"))
        {
            GameObject clickedCell = hit.collider.gameObject;

            if (currentlyClickedCell == null)
            {
                //Debug.Log("Try null");
                currentlyClickedCell = clickedCell; // Update the currently clicked cell
                HandleMouseInput(clickedCell); // Process the new cell click
            }
            else
            {
                if (currentlyClickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId() != clickedCell.GetComponent<Cell>().getUniqueId())
                {
                    currentlyClickedCell = clickedCell; // Update the currently clicked cell
                    HandleMouseInput(clickedCell); // Process the new cell click
                }
            }
        }
    }

    void HandleMouseInput(GameObject clickedObject)
    {
        Cell clickedCell = clickedObject.GetComponent<Cell>();
        //Debug.Log("Cell clicked?");
        //Debug.Log(clickedCell);
        if (clickedCell != null)
        {
            // Retrieve the SpriteRenderer and Cell component from the clicked cell
            SpriteRenderer cellRenderer = clickedObject.gameObject.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
            // Check if it's the first interaction and the cell is 'S'
            if (lastGreenCell == null && clickedCell.initialType == 'S' && inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                // This is the first interaction and the clicked cell is 'S'
                GameState.levelStarted = true;
                ClearLabelText(clickedCell);
                cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua;
                clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                clickedCell.state = 'V';
                lastGreenCell = clickedCell; // Update the last green cell
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.state == 'V' && inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                // The cell has already been visited, so reload the level
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                return;
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.state == 'V' && !inputManager.IsPressing())
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }
            else if (clickedCell.initialType == 'X' && GameState.levelStarted)
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }
            else if (lastGreenCell != null && clickedCell.initialType == 'O' && !IsAdjacent(clickedCell, lastGreenCell))
            {
                LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            }

            else if (lastGreenCell != null && IsAdjacent(clickedCell, lastGreenCell))
            {
                // For subsequent interactions, check if the clicked cell is adjacent to the last green cell
                if (clickedCell.initialType == 'F')
                {
                    ClearLabelText(clickedCell);
                    cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua;
                    clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);
                    if (visitableCells == 0)
                    {
                        levelFinished = true;
                        // Proceed to the next level
                        StartCoroutine(WaitAndPerformAction(0.15f, () => GoToNextLevel()));
                        return;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        levelFinished = true;
                        StartCoroutine(WaitAndPerformAction(0.15f, () => LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel)));
                        return;
                    }

                }
                if (clickedCell.state == 'O')
                {
                    cellRenderer.color = CustomColors.Aqua; // Change to green only if adjacent to the last green cell
                    clickedCell.state = 'V';
                    visitableCells--;
                    //Debug.Log(visitableCells);
                    lastGreenCell = clickedCell; // Update the last green cell

                    // Now, change the color of the CircleBorder
                    // Now, change the color of the CircleBorder
                    clickedCell.SetBorderMaterialColor(Color.clear);

                }
                if (!HasValidMoves(clickedCell))
                {
                    LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Coroutine for delay

    IEnumerator WaitAndPerformAction(float delay, System.Action action)
    {
        yield return new WaitForSeconds(delay); // Wait for the specified delay
        action(); // Perform the action after the delay
        levelFinished = false;
    }


    void UpdateGridBounds()
    {
        // Calculate the unscaled grid width and height
        float gridWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Adjust the gridWidth and gridHeight based on the GridManager's scale
        gridWidth *= transform.localScale.x;
        gridHeight *= transform.localScale.y;

        // Assuming the center of your grid aligns with the GridManager's position
        Vector3 gridCenter = transform.position;

        float expansionAmount = 2 * cellSpacing * Mathf.Max(transform.localScale.x, transform.localScale.y);

        gridWidth += expansionAmount; // Expand width by cellSpacing
        gridHeight += expansionAmount; // Expand height by cellSpacing

        // Now create a new Bounds that incorporates the scale
        Vector3 size = new Vector3(gridWidth, gridHeight, 0); // Assuming a 2D grid, Z-size is not relevant
        gridBounds = new Bounds(gridCenter, size);
    }


    void AdjustGridToFitScreen()
    {
        Camera mainCamera = Camera.main;
        float screenHeight = 2f * mainCamera.orthographicSize;
        float screenWidth = screenHeight * mainCamera.aspect;

        // Define padding as a percentage of the screen size
        float paddingPercentage = padding / 100; // 4% padding
        float paddedScreenHeight = screenHeight * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce height by padding on top and bottom
        float paddedScreenWidth = screenWidth * (1 - paddingPercentage * 2); // Reduce width by padding on left and right

        float gridPhysicalWidth = (cellObjects.GetLength(1) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;
        float gridPhysicalHeight = (cellObjects.GetLength(0) * (1 + cellSpacing)) - cellSpacing;

        // Calculate scale factors based on the padded screen size
        float scaleX = paddedScreenWidth / gridPhysicalWidth;
        float scaleY = paddedScreenHeight / gridPhysicalHeight;
        float scale = Mathf.Min(scaleX, scaleY);

        // Adjust the scale of the grid
        transform.localScale = new Vector3(scale, scale, 1);

        // Optionally adjust the position if needed
        // Since you're scaling the grid down, you might not need to adjust its position.
    }

    bool HasValidMoves(Cell lastCell)
    {
        int[] dRow = { -1, 1, 0, 0 }; // Up, Down
        int[] dCol = { 0, 0, -1, 1 }; // Left, Right

        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) // Check all four directions
        {
            int newRow = lastCell.row + dRow[i];
            int newCol = lastCell.col + dCol[i];

            // Check bounds
            if (newRow >= 0 && newRow < cellObjects.GetLength(0) && newCol >= 0 && newCol < cellObjects.GetLength(1))
            {
                Cell potentialCell = cellObjects[newRow, newCol].GetComponent<Cell>();
                //Debug.Log(potentialCell.state);
                // Check if the cell is not visited and not an obstacle
                if (potentialCell.state != 'V' && potentialCell.initialType != 'X')
                {
                    return true; // There is at least one valid move
                }
            }
        }
        return false; // No valid moves found
    }




    bool IsAdjacent(Cell cell1, Cell cell2)
    {
        // Check if cell1 is adjacent to cell2 (not including diagonal adjacency)
        return (cell1.row == cell2.row && Mathf.Abs(cell1.col - cell2.col) == 1) ||
               (cell1.col == cell2.col && Mathf.Abs(cell1.row - cell2.row) == 1);
    }

    private void startFirstLevel()
    {
        try
        {
            levelManager.GenerateAndAddLevel(GameState.numRows, GameState.numCols, GameState.freqObstacles);
            LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
            //GameState.PrintState();
        }
        catch (System.Exception ex)
        {
            // Log the error
            Debug.LogError("Failed to generate a new level: " + ex.Message);
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
            GameState.Reset();
        }
    }

    private void debugPrint()
    {
        Debug.Log("Levels count: " + LevelManager.levels.Count);
        // Iterate through each level and print its content
        LevelManager.PrintLevels(); // Print all levels to the console
        //LevelManager.PrintSolutions(); // Print all levels to the console
        GameState.PrintState();
        Debug.Log("Current Level: " + GameState.currentLevel);
    }


    void GoToNextLevel()
    {
        GameState.currentLevel++;
        // Update rows, cols, and frequency based on the current level
        GameState.UpdateLevelSettings();
        //debugPrint();
        //GameState.PrintState();
        // Attempt to generate and add a new level with specified parameters
        if (GameState.currentLevel + 1 >= LevelManager.levels.Count)
        {
            if (levelManager != null)
            {
                try
                {
                    levelManager.GenerateAndAddLevel(GameState.numRows, GameState.numCols, GameState.freqObstacles);
                    //debugPrint();
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    // Log the error
                    Debug.Log("Failed to generate a new level: " + ex.Message);
                    //Debug.Log(numRows + " " + numCols + " " + freqObstacles + " " + GameState.currentLevel);
                    //Debug.Log(LevelManager.levels.Count);
                    LevelManager.levels.Clear();
                    LevelManager.solutions.Clear();
                    GameState.currentLevel = 1;
                    // Navigate back to the main menu
                    SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
                    GameState.Reset();
                }

            }
            else
            {
                throw new System.Exception("LevelManager not found.");
            }
        }
        if (GameState.currentLevel < LevelManager.levels.Count)
        {
            //Debug.Log("Load next level");
            LoadLevel(GameState.currentLevel);
        }
        else
        {
            LevelManager.levels.Clear();
            LevelManager.solutions.Clear();
            GameState.currentLevel = 0;
            SceneManager.LoadScene("Main Menu");
            GameState.Reset();
            Debug.Log("Error cannot load level");
        }
        //numRows++;
        //numCols++;
        //freqObstacles += 0.1;

        // If the new level index is valid, load the level
        //

    }

    private void ResetAndClearLevel()
    {

        // Reset the grid scale to its default value
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one;

        // Reset the last green cell reference
        lastGreenCell = null;

        // Clear existing cells if any
        if (cellObjects != null)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < cellObjects.GetLength(0); i++)
            {
                for (int j = 0; j < cellObjects.GetLength(1); j++)
                {
                    if (cellObjects[i, j] != null)
                    {
                        Destroy(cellObjects[i, j]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        GameState.levelStarted = false;
        currentlyClickedCell = null; // Allow for new cell clicks
        ResetHints();

        // Optionally, reset or clear other level-specific data or states here
    }
}


```

Desktop Old\old-new-exit-pois-scripts\old_inputmanager.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;

public class InputManager
{
    private bool wasMouseDown = false;

    // Check if the mouse button is being pressed
    public bool IsPressing()
    {
        return Input.GetMouseButton(0);
    }

    // Check if the mouse button was just pressed
    public bool IsMouseDown()
    {
        return IsPressing() && !wasMouseDown;
    }

    // Check if the mouse button was just released
    public bool IsMouseUp()
    {
        return !IsPressing() && wasMouseDown;
    }

    // Update the mouse state for the next frame
    public void UpdateMouseState()
    {
        wasMouseDown = IsPressing();
    }
}

```

Pe un raft sunt 29 bluze, unele cu 4 nasturi, altele cu 5 nasturi. \u015etiind c\u0103 num\u0103rul total al nasturilor este 128, arat\u0103 c\u0103<br>num\u0103rul bluzelor cu 4 nasturi este prim, compus.<br>\u200b&quot;,&quot;subject_id&quot;:2,&quot;grade_id&quot;:3,&quot;user_id&quot;:3674609,&quot;created&quot;:&quot;2024-11-28T18:33:26+02:00&quot;,&quot;created_timestamp&quot;:1732811606,&quot;responses&quot;:[{&quot;id&quot;:11496041,&quot;userId&quot;:38878,&quot;taskId&quot;:11553426,&quot;points&quot;:5,&quot;created&quot;:&quot;2024-11-28T19:00:22+02:00&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;<p><strong>Definirea variabilelor:<\/strong><\/p><p>- S\u0103 not\u0103m cu [tex] x [\/tex] num\u0103rul de bluze care au 4 nasturi.<\/p><p>- Atunci, num\u0103rul de bluze care au 5 nasturi este [tex] 29 - x [\/tex].<\/p><p><strong><br \/><\/strong><strong>Formularea ecua\u021biei pentru totalul nasturilor:<\/strong><\/p><p>[tex]4x + 5\\cdot(29 - x) = 128[\/tex]<strong><\/strong><\/p><p><strong><br \/>Rezolvarea ecua\u021biei:<\/strong><\/p><p>[tex]4x + 145 - 5x = 128 \\\\ -x + 145 = 128 \\\\ -x = -17 \\\\ x = 17[\/tex]<\/p><p><strong><br \/>Calcularea num\u0103rului de bluze cu 5 nasturi:<\/strong><\/p><p>[tex]29 - x = 29 - 17 = 12 [\/tex]<\/p><p><strong><br \/>Verificarea caracterului numerelor ob\u021binute:<\/strong><\/p><p>- 17 este un num\u0103r prim, deoarece are exact doi divizori: 1 \u0219i 17.<\/p><p>- 12 este un num\u0103r compus, deoarece are mai mul\u021bi divizori dec\u00e2t 1 \u0219i el \u00eensu\u0219i (de exemplu, 2, 3, 4, 6).<\/p><p><strong><br \/>Concluzie:<\/strong><\/p><p>Num\u0103rul de bluze cu 4 nasturi este 17, care este un num\u0103r prim, iar num\u0103rul de bluze cu 5 nasturi este 12, care este un num\u0103r ```
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
#if UNITY_EDITOR
using UnityEditor;
#endif

[RequireComponent(typeof(Image))]
public class ShadowUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private bool hasShadow = true;
    public Vector2 offset = new Vector2(2, -2);
    public float shadowAlpha = 0.5f;

    private GameObject shadowObject;
    private Image shadowImage;
    private Image originalImage;

    void Awake()
    {
        originalImage = GetComponent<Image>();
        FindOrCreateShadow();
    }

    void Start()
    {
        UpdateShadow();
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (shadowObject != null)
        {
            shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;
        }
    }

    void OnDestroy()
    {
        if (shadowObject != null)
        {
            DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
            shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
        }
    }

    void OnValidate()
    {
#if UNITY_EDITOR
        EditorApplication.delayCall += ValidateShadow;
#endif
    }

    private void ValidateShadow()
    {
        if (this == null) return; // Ensure the component still exists

        originalImage = GetComponent<Image>();

        if (hasShadow)
        {
            FindOrCreateShadow();
            UpdateShadowProperties();
        }
        else
        {
            if (shadowObject != null)
            {
                DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
                shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
            }
        }
    }

    private void FindOrCreateShadow()
    {
        // Check if shadow already exists
        Transform existingShadowTransform = transform.parent.Find("Shadow");
        if (existingShadowTransform != null)
        {
            shadowObject = existingShadowTransform.gameObject;
            shadowImage = shadowObject.GetComponent<Image>();
        }
        else
        {
            CreateShadow();
        }
    }

    private void CreateShadow()
    {
        // Create a new GameObject for the shadow
        shadowObject = new GameObject("Shadow");

        // Set the shadow's parent to be the same as the original image's parent
        shadowObject.transform.SetParent(transform.parent);

        // Add an Image component to the shadow and set its sprite to be the same as the original image
        shadowImage = shadowObject.AddComponent<Image>();
        shadowImage.sprite = originalImage.sprite;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta = originalImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta;

        // Set the shadow color to black with the specified alpha
        shadowImage.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, shadowAlpha);

        // Set the position of the shadow relative to the original image
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchorMin = originalImage.rectTransform.anchorMin;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchorMax = originalImage.rectTransform.anchorMax;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.pivot = originalImage.rectTransform.pivot;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.localScale = originalImage.rectTransform.localScale;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;

        // Ensure the shadow is rendered beneath the original image
        shadowObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform.GetSiblingIndex() - 1);
    }

    private void UpdateShadowProperties()
    {
        if (shadowObject == null) return;

        shadowImage.sprite = originalImage.sprite;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta = originalImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta;
        shadowImage.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, shadowAlpha);
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;

        // Ensure the shadow is rendered beneath the original image
        shadowObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform.GetSiblingIndex() - 1);
    }

    private void UpdateShadow()
    {
        if (hasShadow)
        {
            FindOrCreateShadow();
            UpdateShadowProperties();
        }
        else
        {
            if (shadowObject != null)
            {
                DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
                shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
            }
        }
    }
}

```

Desktop Old\P2.txt:
```
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
#if UNITY_EDITOR
using UnityEditor;
#endif

[RequireComponent(typeof(Image))]
public class ShadowUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private bool hasShadow = true;
    public Vector2 offset = new Vector2(2, -2);
    public float shadowAlpha = 0.5f;

    private GameObject shadowObject;
    private Image shadowImage;
    private Image originalImage;

    void Awake()
    {
        originalImage = GetComponent<Image>();
        FindOrCreateShadow();
    }

    void Start()
    {
        UpdateShadow();
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (shadowObject != null)
        {
            shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;
        }
    }

    void OnDestroy()
    {
        if (shadowObject != null)
        {
            DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
            shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
        }
    }

    void OnValidate()
    {
#if UNITY_EDITOR
        EditorApplication.delayCall += ValidateShadow;
#endif
    }

    private void ValidateShadow()
    {
        if (this == null) return; // Ensure the component still exists

        originalImage = GetComponent<Image>();

        if (hasShadow)
        {
            FindOrCreateShadow();
            UpdateShadowProperties();
        }
        else
        {
            if (shadowObject != null)
            {
                DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
                shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
            }
        }
    }

    private void FindOrCreateShadow()
    {
        // Check if shadow already exists
        Transform existingShadowTransform = transform.parent.Find("Shadow");
        if (existingShadowTransform != null)
        {
            shadowObject = existingShadowTransform.gameObject;
            shadowImage = shadowObject.GetComponent<Image>();
        }
        else
        {
            CreateShadow();
        }
    }

    private void CreateShadow()
    {
        // Create a new GameObject for the shadow
        shadowObject = new GameObject("Shadow");

        // Set the shadow's parent to be the same as the original image's parent
        shadowObject.transform.SetParent(transform.parent);

        // Add an Image component to the shadow and set its sprite to be the same as the original image
        shadowImage = shadowObject.AddComponent<Image>();
        shadowImage.sprite = originalImage.sprite;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta = originalImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta;

        // Set the shadow color to black with the specified alpha
        shadowImage.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, shadowAlpha);

        // Set the position of the shadow relative to the original image
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchorMin = originalImage.rectTransform.anchorMin;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchorMax = originalImage.rectTransform.anchorMax;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.pivot = originalImage.rectTransform.pivot;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.localScale = originalImage.rectTransform.localScale;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;

        // Ensure the shadow is rendered beneath the original image
        shadowObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform.GetSiblingIndex());
    }

    private void UpdateShadowProperties()
    {
        if (shadowObject == null) return;

        shadowImage.sprite = originalImage.sprite;
        shadowImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta = originalImage.rectTransform.sizeDelta;
        shadowImage.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, shadowAlpha);
        shadowImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition = originalImage.rectTransform.anchoredPosition + offset;

        // Ensure the shadow is rendered beneath the original image
        shadowObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform.GetSiblingIndex() - 1);
    }

    private void UpdateShadow()
    {
        if (hasShadow)
        {
            FindOrCreateShadow();
            UpdateShadowProperties();
        }
        else
        {
            if (shadowObject != null)
            {
                DestroyImmediate(shadowObject);
                shadowObject = null;  // Prevent multiple destructions
            }
        }
    }
}

```

Desktop Old\PlayerController;.txt:
```
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Unity.VisualScripting;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;
using static UnityEngine.PlayerLoop.PostLateUpdate;

public class PlayerController: MonoBehaviour
{

    [Header("Movement Settings")]
    public float moveSpeed = 9f;
    public float runAccelAmount = 10f;
    public float runDeccelAmount = 10f;
    [Range(0f, 1)] public float accelInAir = 0.5f;
    public float gravityScale = 9.5f;

    [Header("Jump Settings")]
    public float jumpForce = 19f;
    public float jumpCutGravityMult = 0.5f;

    [Header("Wall Jump Settings")]
    public Vector2 wallJumpForce = new Vector2(12f, 12.5f);
    [Range(0f, 1f)] public float wallJumpRunLerp = 0.5f;
    [Range(0f, 1.5f)] public float wallJumpTime = 0.2f;

    [Header("Wall Slide Settings")]
    public float wallSlideSpeed = 3f;

    private DustEffect dustEffect; // Reference to the DustEffect script

    private Rigidbody2D rb;
    private GroundCheck groundCheck;
    private WallCheck wallCheck;
    private float fallSpeedThreshold = -10f; // Adjust this threshold as needed


    // Add this variable to the top of the class
    private bool hasKey = false;
    private bool isGrounded => groundCheck.isGrounded;
    private bool isTouchingWall => wallCheck.isTouchingWall;
    private bool isTouchingLeftWall => wallCheck.isTouchingLeftWall;
    private bool isTouchingRightWall => wallCheck.isTouchingRightWall;

    private bool isJumping;
    private bool isWallJumping;
    private float wallJumpStartTime;
    private int lastWallJumpDir;

    private Vector2 moveInput;


    public float wallHop = 1f;
    public float jumpFreezeTime = 1f;
    private bool isDoubleJumping = false; // Declare the isDoubleJumping variable
    private int jumpsRemaining; // Track the remaining jumps during play
    public int extraJumps = 1; // Public variable to specify the number of extra jumps
    private SpriteRenderer spriteRenderer;
    //private bool isTransparent = false; // Declare the isTransparent variable
    private Animator anim;
    private bool isRunning = false;
    //private bool inputLocked = false; // New variable to track input lock
    //public bool isGrounded = true;
    private bool isFalling = false;  // Declare the isFalling variable
    private bool isDead = false; // Declare the isDead variable
    private BoxCollider2D boxCollider;
    //private bool nearDoor = false;
    private bool isWallSliding = false;
    private float flipDirection = 0;
    //private bool lastFallingState = false;

    private float targetHorizontal = 0; // Target horizontal input
    public float inputRampTime = 0.5f; // Time to reach full input from 0 to 1
    public float jumpSoundVolume = 1.0f; // Volume for object expulsion sound
    private int originalLayerCollisionMask; // Store the original collision mask
    //private Coroutine flickerCoroutine;
    //private float lastYVelocity = 0;
    //private bool wasFalling = false;
    //private bool wasGrounded = false;
    //private Coroutine groundAnimCoroutine; // Coroutine to delay grounded animation update
    private bool jumpRequested = false;
    private bool doubleJumpRequested = false;
    private Camera mainCamera;
    //private float wallDirection = 0;
    //private bool jumping = false;
    private int oneWayPlatformLayer;


    // Name of the next scene
    public string nextSceneName = "Level2";
    private void Start()
    {
        jumpsRemaining = extraJumps; // Initialize jumpsRemaining with extraJumps
        rb = GetComponent<Rigidbody2D>();
        spriteRenderer = GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
        dustEffect = GetComponent<DustEffect>();
        flipDirection = transform.localScale.x;
        if (spriteRenderer == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("SpriteRenderer is not assigned!");
        }
        anim = GetComponent<Animator>();
        groundCheck = GetComponentInChildren<GroundCheck>(); // Make sure GroundCheck is a child of the player
        wallCheck = GetComponentInChildren<WallCheck>();
        boxCollider = GetComponent<BoxCollider2D>();
        SetGravityScale(gravityScale);
        mainCamera = Camera.main;
        //Debug.Log(groundCheck);
        // Save the original collision mask for the player's layer
        originalLayerCollisionMask = Physics2D.GetLayerCollisionMask(gameObject.layer);
        oneWayPlatformLayer = LayerMask.NameToLayer("OneWayPlatform");

        // Ensure the PlayerDead component is initially disabled
        PlayerDead playerDead = gameObject.GetComponent<PlayerDead>();
        if (playerDead != null)
        {
            playerDead.enabled = false;
        }
    }

    private void Update()
    {

        // Capture input in Update
        targetHorizontal = Input.GetAxisRaw("Horizontal");
        moveInput.x = Input.GetAxisRaw("Horizontal");

        // Check for jump input (space bar, up arrow key, or X key)
        if (Input.GetButtonDown("Jump") || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.X))
        {
            jumpRequested = true;
            doubleJumpRequested = !isGrounded && jumpsRemaining > 0 && !isTouchingWall;
        }

        // Check for jump release input (space bar, up arrow key, or X key)
        if (Input.GetButtonUp("Jump") || Input.GetKeyUp(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyUp(KeyCode.X))
        {
            OnJumpUpInput();
        }


    }
    
    public bool IsGrounded()
    {
        return isGrounded;
    }



    private void FixedUpdate()
    {
        //targetHorizontal = Input.GetAxisRaw("Horizontal");
        //HandleInput();
        HandleDustEffect();
        HandleMovement();
        HandleJump();
        UpdateAnimations();
        UpdateCollisionDetectionMode();
    }

    // Add this method to the class
    public void CollectKey()
    {
        hasKey = true;
    }

    public bool HasKey()
    {
        return hasKey;
    }
    private void HandleInput()
    {
        moveInput.x = Input.GetAxisRaw("Horizontal");

        // Check for jump input (space bar, up arrow key, or X key)
        if (Input.GetButtonDown("Jump") || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.X))
        {
            OnJumpInput();
        }

        // Check for jump release input (space bar, up arrow key, or X key)
        if (Input.GetButtonUp("Jump") || Input.GetKeyUp(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyUp(KeyCode.X))
        {
            OnJumpUpInput();
        }

        // Add double jump logic
        if ((Input.GetButtonDown("Jump") || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.X)) && !isGrounded && jumpsRemaining > 0 && !isTouchingWall)
        {
            //Debug.Log("Double Jump requested");
            doubleJumpRequested = true;
        }
    }

    private void HandleDustEffect()
    {
        if (isRunning && isGrounded && !dustEffect.dustParticleSystem.isPlaying)
        {
            dustEffect.PlayDustEffect();
        }
        else if (!isRunning || !isGrounded)
        {
            dustEffect.StopDustEffect();
        }
    }

    private void HandleMovement()
    {
        //Flip(moveInput.x);
        Flip(targetHorizontal);
        float wallDirection = isTouchingLeftWall ? 1 : -1;
        if (isWallSliding && targetHorizontal == wallDirection)
        {
            //Debug.Log("FLIPPED");
            Flip(-wallDirection);
        }
        float targetSpeed = moveInput.x * moveSpeed;
        float speedDiff = targetSpeed - rb.velocity.x;
        float accelRate;

        if (Mathf.Abs(moveInput.x) > 0.01f)
        {
            accelRate = (isGrounded) ? runAccelAmount : runAccelAmount * accelInAir;
        }
        else
        {
            accelRate = (isGrounded) ? runDeccelAmount : runDeccelAmount * accelInAir;
        }

        float movement = speedDiff * accelRate;
        rb.AddForce(movement * Vector2.right, ForceMode2D.Force);

        if (isTouchingWall && !isGrounded && rb.velocity.y < 0)
        {
            rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, Mathf.Max(rb.velocity.y, -wallSlideSpeed));
            isWallSliding = true;
            resetJumpsRemaining(); // Reset extra jumps when grounded
        }
        else
        {
            isWallSliding = false;
        }
    }

    private void HandleJump()
    {
        if (isJumping && rb.velocity.y < 0)
        {
            isJumping = false;
        }

        if (isWallJumping && Time.time - wallJumpStartTime > wallJumpTime)
        {
            isWallJumping = false;
        }

        if (isFalling || isGrounded)
        {
            isDoubleJumping = false;
        }

        if (jumpRequested)
        {
            PerformJump(jumpForce);
            jumpRequested = false;
            dustEffect.PlayDustEffect(); // Play dust effect when jumping
        }
        
        if (isGrounded)
        {
            resetJumpsRemaining(); // Reset extra jumps when grounded
        }

        if (doubleJumpRequested)
        {
            PerformDoubleJump(jumpForce);
            doubleJumpRequested = false;
        }
    }

    private void OnJumpInput()
    {
        if (isGrounded)
        {
            jumpRequested = true;
            resetJumpsRemaining(); // Reset extra jumps when grounded
            dustEffect.PlayDustEffect(); // Play dust effect when jumping
        }
        else if (isWallSliding && !isGrounded)
        {
            WallJump();
        }
    }

    private void OnJumpUpInput()
    {
        if (rb.velocity.y > 0)
        {
            rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, rb.velocity.y * jumpCutGravityMult);
        }
    }

    public void PerformJump(float force)
    {
        isJumping = true;
        rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, force);
    }

    public void PerformDownPush(float force)
    {
        rb.AddForce(Vector2.down * force, ForceMode2D.Impulse); // Apply a downward force to the player
    }

    private void PerformDoubleJump(float force)
    {
        isDoubleJumping = true;
        jumpsRemaining--;
        rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, force);
    }
    private void WallJump()
    {
        isWallJumping = true;
        isJumping = true;
        wallJumpStartTime = Time.time;
        lastWallJumpDir = (isTouchingLeftWall) ? 1 : -1;
        //Flip(lastWallJumpDir);

        Vector2 jumpDirection = new Vector2(wallJumpForce.x * lastWallJumpDir, wallJumpForce.y);

        if (Mathf.Sign(rb.velocity.x) != Mathf.Sign(jumpDirection.x))
        {
            jumpDirection.x -= rb.velocity.x;
        }

        if (rb.velocity.y < 0)
        {
            jumpDirection.y -= rb.velocity.y;
        }


        rb.velocity = jumpDirection;
        resetJumpsRemaining(); // Reset extra jumps on wall jump

    }

    public void resetJumpsRemaining()
    {
        jumpsRemaining = extraJumps; // Reset extra jumps on wall jump
    }


    Transform FindChildByName(Transform parent, string name)
    {
        foreach (Transform child in parent)
        {
            if (child.name == name)
            {
                return child;
            }
            Transform grandChild = FindChildByName(child, name);
            if (grandChild != null)
            {
                return grandChild;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    public void Die()
    {

        // Disable freeze rotation on the Z-axis
        rb.constraints = RigidbodyConstraints2D.None;
        anim.SetBool("isDead", true);
        isDead = true;
        //Debug.Log("Hit by Icicle");
        rb.velocity = new Vector2(0, 0); // Stop all movement
        targetHorizontal = 0;
        moveSpeed = 0;
        boxCollider.enabled = false; // Deactivate the BoxCollider2D

        rb.constraints = RigidbodyConstraints2D.None;
        //UIManager.Instance.DecreaseLives();
        // Start the death animation coroutine
        DeathAnimation();
        DeactivatePlayerController();
        ActivatePlayerDead();
    }

    private void DeathAnimation()
    {
        // Add an upward force and some rotation to simulate the classic death animation
        rb.AddForce(new Vector2(0, jumpForce), ForceMode2D.Impulse);
        rb.AddTorque(200.0f); // Adjust the torque value as needed

        // Wait for the death animation to complete (adjust the time as needed)
        //yield return new WaitForSeconds(2.0f);

        // Handle the player's respawn or game over logic here
    }

    private void ActivatePlayerDead()
    {
        PlayerDead playerDead = gameObject.GetComponent<PlayerDead>();
        if (playerDead == null)
        {
            playerDead = gameObject.AddComponent<PlayerDead>();
        }
        playerDead.enabled = true;
    }

    private void DeactivatePlayerController()
    {
        PlayerController playerController = gameObject.GetComponent<PlayerController>();
        if (playerController != null)
        {
            playerController.enabled = false; // Disable the PlayerController on this gameObject
        }
    }



    private void OnTriggerEnter2D(Collider2D collision)
    {
        //Debug.Log("Collisioned Trigger");
    }
    private void OnCollisionEnter2D(Collision2D collision)
    {
        //Debug.Log("Collisioned Entered");
    }




    // New Flip function to encapsulate sprite flipping logic
    private void Flip(float moveHorizontal)
    {
        // Instead of flipping the sprite's flipX, we'll scale the whole GameObject
        if (moveHorizontal > 0.01f)
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(1, 1, 1); // Normal orientation
        }
        else if (moveHorizontal < -0.01f)
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(-1, 1, 1); // Flipped orientation
        }
        // Update running state based on horizontal movement
        isRunning = Mathf.Abs(moveHorizontal) > 0.1f && isGrounded && !isTouchingWall;
        flipDirection = transform.localScale.x;
        //Debug.Log(flipDirection);
    }

    public void SetFacingDirection(bool faceLeft)
    {
        if (faceLeft)
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(-1, 1, 1);
        }
        else
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(1, 1, 1);
        }
    }


    private void UpdateAnimations()
    {
        //Debug.Log(groundAnimCoroutine);
        // Check falling condition
        isFalling = rb.velocity.y < -0.001f && !groundCheck.isGrounded;
        anim.SetBool("isRunning", isRunning);
        anim.SetBool("isGrounded", isGrounded);
        //Debug.Log(groundCheck.isGrounded);
        anim.SetBool("isJumping", isJumping);
        anim.SetBool("isFalling", isFalling);
        anim.SetBool("isTouchingWall", wallCheck.isTouchingLeftWall || wallCheck.isTouchingRightWall);
        anim.SetBool("isWallSliding", isWallSliding);
        anim.SetBool("isDoubleJumping", isDoubleJumping); // Trigger double jump animation
    }

    private void UpdateCollisionDetectionMode()
    {
        if (rb.velocity.y < fallSpeedThreshold)
        {
            rb.collisionDetectionMode = CollisionDetectionMode2D.Continuous;
        }
        else
        {
            rb.collisionDetectionMode = CollisionDetectionMode2D.Discrete;
        }
    }

    private void SetGravityScale(float scale)
    {
        rb.gravityScale = scale;
    }

    public bool IsDead()
    {
        return isDead;
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
 
    }

}

```

Desktop Old\shader.txt:
```
Shader "Shader Graphs/CircleShader"
{
    Properties
    {
        _Radius("Radius", Float) = 0.3
        _Ring_Thickness("Ring Thickness", Float) = 0.03
        [HideInInspector]_BUILTIN_QueueOffset("Float", Float) = 0
        [HideInInspector]_BUILTIN_QueueControl("Float", Float) = -1
    }
    SubShader
    {
        Tags
        {
            // RenderPipeline: <None>
            "RenderType"="Opaque"
            "BuiltInMaterialType" = "Lit"
            "Queue"="AlphaTest"
            // DisableBatching: <None>
            "ShaderGraphShader"="true"
            "ShaderGraphTargetId"="BuiltInLitSubTarget"
        }
        Pass
        {
            Name "BuiltIn Forward"
            Tags
            {
                "LightMode" = "ForwardBase"
            }
        
        // Render State
        Cull Back
        Blend One Zero
        ZTest LEqual
        ZWrite On
        
        // Debug
        // <None>
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Pass
        
        HLSLPROGRAM
        
        // Pragmas
        #pragma target 3.0
        #pragma multi_compile_instancing
        #pragma multi_compile_fog
        #pragma multi_compile_fwdbase
        #pragma vertex vert
        #pragma fragment frag
        
        // Keywords
        #pragma multi_compile _ _SCREEN_SPACE_OCCLUSION
        #pragma multi_compile _ LIGHTMAP_ON
        #pragma multi_compile _ DIRLIGHTMAP_COMBINED
        #pragma multi_compile _ _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS_CASCADE _MAIN_LIGHT_SHADOWS_SCREEN
        #pragma multi_compile _ADDITIONAL_LIGHTS_VERTEX _ADDITIONAL_LIGHTS _ADDITIONAL_OFF
        #pragma multi_compile _ _ADDITIONAL_LIGHT_SHADOWS
        #pragma multi_compile _ _SHADOWS_SOFT
        #pragma multi_compile _ LIGHTMAP_SHADOW_MIXING
        #pragma multi_compile _ SHADOWS_SHADOWMASK
        // GraphKeywords: <None>
        
        // Defines
        #define _NORMALMAP 1
        #define _NORMAL_DROPOFF_TS 1
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_NORMAL
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TANGENT
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TEXCOORD0
        #define ATTRIBUTES_NEED_TEXCOORD1
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_POSITION_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_NORMAL_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_TANGENT_WS
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_TEXCOORD0
        #define VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
        #define FEATURES_GRAPH_VERTEX
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'PassInstancing' */
        #define SHADERPASS SHADERPASS_FORWARD
        #define BUILTIN_TARGET_API 1
        #define _BUILTIN_AlphaClip 1
        #define _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON 1
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT
        #define _SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT _BUILTIN_SURFACE_TYPE_TRANSPARENT
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON
        #define _ALPHATEST_ON _BUILTIN_ALPHATEST_ON
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_AlphaClip
        #define _AlphaClip _BUILTIN_AlphaClip
        #endif
        #ifdef _BUILTIN_ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON
        #define _ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON _BUILTIN_ALPHAPREMULTIPLY_ON
        #endif
        
        
        // custom interpolator pre-include
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'sgci_CustomInterpolatorPreInclude' */
        
        // Includes
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/ShaderLibrary/Shim/Shims.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.render-pipelines.core/ShaderLibrary/Color.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/ShaderLibrary/Core.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.render-pipelines.core/ShaderLibrary/Texture.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/ShaderLibrary/Lighting.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/LegacySurfaceVertex.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/ShaderLibrary/ShaderGraphFunctions.hlsl"
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Structs and Packing
        
        // custom interpolators pre packing
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'CustomInterpolatorPrePacking' */
        
        struct Attributes
        {
             float3 positionOS : POSITION;
             float3 normalOS : NORMAL;
             float4 tangentOS : TANGENT;
             float4 uv0 : TEXCOORD0;
             float4 uv1 : TEXCOORD1;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : INSTANCEID_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        struct Varyings
        {
             float4 positionCS : SV_POSITION;
             float3 positionWS;
             float3 normalWS;
             float4 tangentWS;
             float4 texCoord0;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float2 lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float3 sh;
            #endif
             float4 fogFactorAndVertexLight;
             float4 shadowCoord;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : CUSTOM_INSTANCE_ID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 : BLENDINDICES0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx : SV_RenderTargetArrayIndex;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
             FRONT_FACE_TYPE cullFace : FRONT_FACE_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        struct SurfaceDescriptionInputs
        {
             float3 TangentSpaceNormal;
             float4 uv0;
        };
        struct VertexDescriptionInputs
        {
             float3 ObjectSpaceNormal;
             float3 ObjectSpaceTangent;
             float3 ObjectSpacePosition;
        };
        struct PackedVaryings
        {
             float4 positionCS : SV_POSITION;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float2 lightmapUV : INTERP0;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
             float3 sh : INTERP1;
            #endif
             float4 tangentWS : INTERP2;
             float4 texCoord0 : INTERP3;
             float4 fogFactorAndVertexLight : INTERP4;
             float4 shadowCoord : INTERP5;
             float3 positionWS : INTERP6;
             float3 normalWS : INTERP7;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
             uint instanceID : CUSTOM_INSTANCE_ID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 : BLENDINDICES0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx : SV_RenderTargetArrayIndex;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
             FRONT_FACE_TYPE cullFace : FRONT_FACE_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        
        PackedVaryings PackVaryings (Varyings input)
        {
            PackedVaryings output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(PackedVaryings, output);
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS.xyzw = input.tangentWS;
            output.texCoord0.xyzw = input.texCoord0;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight;
            output.shadowCoord.xyzw = input.shadowCoord;
            output.positionWS.xyz = input.positionWS;
            output.normalWS.xyz = input.normalWS;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        Varyings UnpackVaryings (PackedVaryings input)
        {
            Varyings output;
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS = input.tangentWS.xyzw;
            output.texCoord0 = input.texCoord0.xyzw;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw;
            output.shadowCoord = input.shadowCoord.xyzw;
            output.positionWS = input.positionWS.xyz;
            output.normalWS = input.normalWS.xyz;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Graph
        
        // Graph Properties
        CBUFFER_START(UnityPerMaterial)
        float _Radius;
        float _Ring_Thickness;
        CBUFFER_END
        
        
        // Object and Global properties
        
        // -- Property used by ScenePickingPass
        #ifdef SCENEPICKINGPASS
        float4 _SelectionID;
        #endif

        #ifdef SCENESELECTIONPASS

        int _PassValue;
        #endif
        
        // Graph Includes
        // GraphIncludes: <None>
        
        // Graph Functions
        
        void Unity_TilingAndOffset_float(float2 UV, float2 Tiling, float2 Offset, out float2 Out)
        {
            Out = UV * Tiling + Offset;
        }
        
        void Unity_Distance_float2(float2 A, float2 B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = distance(A, B);
        }
        
        void Unity_Subtract_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A - B;
        }
        
        void Unity_Absolute_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = abs(In);
        }
        
        void Unity_DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            
                    #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_RAY_TRACING) && defined(RAYTRACING_SHADER_GRAPH_DEFAULT)
                    #error 'DDXY' node is not supported in ray tracing, please provide an alternate implementation, relying for instance on the 'Raytracing Quality' keyword
                    #endif
            Out = abs(ddx(In)) + abs(ddy(In));
        }
        
        void Unity_Divide_float(float A, float B, out float Out)
        {
            Out = A / B;
        }
        
        void Unity_OneMinus_float(float In, out float Out)
        {
            Out = 1 - In;
        }
        
        // Custom interpolators pre vertex
        /* WARNING: $splice Could not find named fragment 'CustomInterpolatorPreVertex' */
        
        // Graph Vertex
        struct VertexDescription
        {
            float3 Position;
            float3 Normal;
            float3 Tangent;
        };
        
        VertexDescription VertexDescriptionFunction(VertexDescriptionInputs IN)
        {
            VertexDescription description = (VertexDescription)0;
            description.Position = IN.ObjectSpacePosition;
            description.Normal = IN.ObjectSpaceNormal;
            description.Tangent = IN.ObjectSpaceTangent;
            return description;
        }
        
        // Custom interpolators, pre surface
        #ifdef FEATURES_GRAPH_VERTEX
        Varyings CustomInterpolatorPassThroughFunc(inout Varyings output, VertexDescription input)
        {
        return output;
        }
        #define CUSTOMINTERPOLATOR_VARYPASSTHROUGH_FUNC
        #endif
        
        // Graph Pixel
        struct SurfaceDescription
        {
            float3 BaseColor;
            float3 NormalTS;
            float3 Emission;
            float Metallic;
            float Smoothness;
            float Occlusion;
            float Alpha;
            float AlphaClipThreshold;
        };
        
        SurfaceDescription SurfaceDescriptionFunction(SurfaceDescriptionInputs IN)
        {
            SurfaceDescription surface = (SurfaceDescription)0;
            float4 _UV_b21d1fac8347421eac7c2122dfe4e7d1_Out_0_Vector4 = IN.uv0;
            float2 _TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2;
            Unity_TilingAndOffset_float((_UV_b21d1fac8347421eac7c2122dfe4e7d1_Out_0_Vector4.xy), float2 (1, 1), float2 (-0.5, -0.5), _TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2);
            float _Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Distance_float2(_TilingAndOffset_b9e38ad03ac141219801d4cbe79f3ba9_Out_3_Vector2, float2(0, 0), _Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float);
            float _Property_92bc60458f75460fba7c800bc2954b82_Out_0_Float = _Radius;
            float _Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Subtract_float(_Distance_3292e33447584033a6708128a2e6498a_Out_2_Float, _Property_92bc60458f75460fba7c800bc2954b82_Out_0_Float, _Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float);
            float _Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_Absolute_float(_Subtract_c949e3bd190243c0a793be854eb52380_Out_2_Float, _Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float);
            float _Property_1c542ce026034f18a1c252ed7131a7de_Out_0_Float = _Ring_Thickness;
            float _Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Subtract_float(_Absolute_4b2aa22cc42d458db45b4a76270b1b81_Out_1_Float, _Property_1c542ce026034f18a1c252ed7131a7de_Out_0_Float, _Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float);
            float _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_float(_Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float, _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float);
            float _Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float;
            Unity_Divide_float(_Subtract_60cb714424d5488185aab68632cdaeb8_Out_2_Float, _DDXY_1674f14a4db242ddaa8e89372c7c5696_Out_1_Float, _Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float);
            float _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float;
            Unity_OneMinus_float(_Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float, _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float);
            surface.BaseColor = (_Divide_4ab67ff26d374855b8f890c1a0f778ba_Out_2_Float.xxx);
            surface.NormalTS = IN.TangentSpaceNormal;
            surface.Emission = float3(0, 0, 0);
            surface.Metallic = 0;
            surface.Smoothness = 0.5;
            surface.Occlusion = 1;
            surface.Alpha = _OneMinus_e7332e0442f146fd9ed6cf6906a00902_Out_1_Float;
            surface.AlphaClipThreshold = 0.5;
            return surface;
        }
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Build Graph Inputs
        
        VertexDescriptionInputs BuildVertexDescriptionInputs(Attributes input)
        {
            VertexDescriptionInputs output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(VertexDescriptionInputs, output);
        
            output.ObjectSpaceNormal =                          input.normalOS;
            output.ObjectSpaceTangent =                         input.tangentOS.xyz;
            output.ObjectSpacePosition =                        input.positionOS;
        
            return output;
        }
        SurfaceDescriptionInputs BuildSurfaceDescriptionInputs(Varyings input)
        {
            SurfaceDescriptionInputs output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(SurfaceDescriptionInputs, output);
        
            
        
        
        
            output.TangentSpaceNormal = float3(0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        
        
            #if UNITY_UV_STARTS_AT_TOP
            #else
            #endif
        
        
            output.uv0 = input.texCoord0;
        #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
        #define BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN output.FaceSign =                    IS_FRONT_VFACE(input.cullFace, true, false);
        #else
        #define BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN
        #endif
        #undef BUILD_SURFACE_DESCRIPTION_INPUTS_OUTPUT_FACESIGN
        
                return output;
        }
        
        void BuildAppDataFull(Attributes attributes, VertexDescription vertexDescription, inout appdata_full result)
        {
            result.vertex     = float4(attributes.positionOS, 1);
            result.tangent    = attributes.tangentOS;
            result.normal     = attributes.normalOS;
            result.texcoord   = attributes.uv0;
            result.texcoord1  = attributes.uv1;
            result.vertex     = float4(vertexDescription.Position, 1);
            result.normal     = vertexDescription.Normal;
            result.tangent    = float4(vertexDescription.Tangent, 0);
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
        }
        
        void VaryingsToSurfaceVertex(Varyings varyings, inout v2f_surf result)
        {
            result.pos = varyings.positionCS;
            result.worldPos = varyings.positionWS;
            result.worldNormal = varyings.normalWS;
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
        
            result._ShadowCoord = varyings.shadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = varyings.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lmap.xy = varyings.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogCoord = varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x;
                COPY_TO_LIGHT_COORDS(result, varyings.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(varyings, result);
        }
        
        void SurfaceVertexToVaryings(v2f_surf surfVertex, inout Varyings result)
        {
            result.positionCS = surfVertex.pos;
            result.positionWS = surfVertex.worldPos;
            result.normalWS = surfVertex.worldNormal;
            // viewDirectionWS is never filled out in the legacy pass' function. Always use the value computed by SRP
            // World Tangent isn't an available input on v2f_surf
            result.shadowCoord = surfVertex._ShadowCoord;
        
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            #endif
            #if UNITY_SHOULD_SAMPLE_SH
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.sh = surfVertex.sh;
            #endif
            #endif
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            result.lightmapUV = surfVertex.lmap.xy;
            #endif
            #ifdef VARYINGS_NEED_FOG_AND_VERTEX_LIGHT
                result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.x = surfVertex.fogCoord;
                COPY_FROM_LIGHT_COORDS(result.fogFactorAndVertexLight.yzw, surfVertex);
            #endif
        
            DEFAULT_UNITY_TRANSFER_VERTEX_OUTPUT_STEREO(surfVertex, result);
        }
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Main
        
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/ShaderPass.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/Varyings.hlsl"
        #include "Packages/com.unity.shadergraph/Editor/Generation/Targets/BuiltIn/Editor/ShaderGraph/Includes/PBRForwardPass.hlsl"
        
        ENDHLSL
        }

                "LightMode" = "ForwardAdd"

            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 : BLENDINDICES0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
             uint stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx : SV_RenderTargetArrayIndex;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
             FRONT_FACE_TYPE cullFace : FRONT_FACE_SEMANTIC;
            #endif
        };
        
        PackedVaryings PackVaryings (Varyings input)
        {
            PackedVaryings output;
            ZERO_INITIALIZE(PackedVaryings, output);
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS.xyzw = input.tangentWS;
            output.texCoord0.xyzw = input.texCoord0;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight;
            output.shadowCoord.xyzw = input.shadowCoord;
            output.positionWS.xyz = input.positionWS;
            output.normalWS.xyz = input.normalWS;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        Varyings UnpackVaryings (PackedVaryings input)
        {
            Varyings output;
            output.positionCS = input.positionCS;
            #if defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.lightmapUV = input.lightmapUV;
            #endif
            #if !defined(LIGHTMAP_ON)
            output.sh = input.sh;
            #endif
            output.tangentWS = input.tangentWS.xyzw;
            output.texCoord0 = input.texCoord0.xyzw;
            output.fogFactorAndVertexLight = input.fogFactorAndVertexLight.xyzw;
            output.shadowCoord = input.shadowCoord.xyzw;
            output.positionWS = input.positionWS.xyz;
            output.normalWS = input.normalWS.xyz;
            #if UNITY_ANY_INSTANCING_ENABLED
            output.instanceID = input.instanceID;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_MULTIVIEW_ENABLED)) || (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED) && (defined(SHADER_API_GLES3) || defined(SHADER_API_GLCORE)))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0 = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsBlendIdx0;
            #endif
            #if (defined(UNITY_STEREO_INSTANCING_ENABLED))
            output.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx = input.stereoTargetEyeIndexAsRTArrayIdx;
            #endif
            #if defined(SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT) && defined(VARYINGS_NEED_CULLFACE)
            output.cullFace = input.cullFace;
            #endif
            return output;
        }
        
        
        // --------------------------------------------------
        // Graph
        
        // Graph Properties
        CBUFFER_START(UnityPerMaterial)
        float _Radius;
        float _Ring_Thickness;
        CBUFFER_END
        
        
        // Object and Global properties
        
        // -- Property used by ScenePickingPass
        #ifdef SCENEPICKINGPASS
        float4 _SelectionID;
        #endif

        #ifdef SCENESELECTIONPASS
